name: Eric Schmitt
subject: I prayed this wouldn’t happen…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Senate
body:
I wish it didn’t have to be like this

Friend, I prayed this wouldn’t happen. I’m afraid of what this news means for the future of our country.
I’m sending you a memo I just drafted to get you up to speed. [Please read it as soon as you can.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bwZj/?__vbtrk=MzM1MDg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1MDg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[READ NOW - CLICK HERE
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bwZj/?__vbtrk=MzM1MDg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1MDg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)This news won’t be easy to swallow, but it’s important that you know what we’re up against.
Good luck,
Senator Eric Schmitt|

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: 'Punishable by death'
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111773/images/AL%20Green/al%20green%20new%20banner.png]
Friends,
I am writing to you with a sense of grave urgency.
While the Supreme Court was busy blocking the ruling against Texas's racist maps—effectively giving the GOP a green light to silence our vote—President Trump was on social media issuing what can only be described as death threats against his political opponents.
He explicitly called the actions of Democratic lawmakers "SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!"
Let that sink in. The sitting President of the United States is threatening the execution of public servants who disagree with him.
This is why I am not backing down. While others in Congress, like Marjorie Taylor Greene, are quitting and heading for the exits in the middle of this chaos, I am digging in.
I am not quitting. I am filing.
Next month, I will bring a privileged resolution to the floor demanding the impeachment of President Donald Trump. We cannot wait. We cannot normalize a President who threatens to kill his opposition while his appointed judges dismantle our voting rights.
This fight has shifted from a battle for seats to a battle for the survival of our democracy.
I need you with me. Please, rush a contribution to our Legal Defense & Impeachment Fund. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
We must meet this threat with overwhelming force.
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
Unafraid,
Congressman Al Green
Fight with Me [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign

Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
PO Box 56761
Houston, TX 77256
United States

name: Kellyanne Conway, Senior Advisor
subject: 2025 GOP Wake-Up Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Republicans just got a wake-up call. Kellyanne Conway needs your input to shape the GOP strategy for 2026. |
Fellow American,

I've seen plenty of elections in my lifetime — but what happened on November 4th?

That was a catastrophe for America.

_Virginia_. _New Jersey_. _New York City_. Even _California_.
We didn't just lose - we got _**lapped**_.

Democrats are already dancing in the streets, convinced they've found the playbook to take back the Senate in 2026.

**[And if we don't wake up right now, they'll be right.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f2cba63eec8f4f7fbf520c75ecf88b88&_e=4lUXgfg7wosU9unuO9f20QwZByKzSvqPmj3is4p18CGw-PJOksLV812CHttIwtSBoVkExTplgYsO7Dq8wAow9407iyPN9untA4D5ywxn85fG6W4O73yAoR3gvtPDp-i8hLzp_f8F_Yy9VLluoE0cZ6YIb3dus-1lAgv5Rne4F5fJ3Vk0M7Ng-QV_tDSKs1c0nq5ILm03dz_U_hre00behtLYb4wgK9umnHez9u4yy_-AWvXbJ3t-gc6hf86VLbAm4kwVSlPGY_fJPRiNVsyKQSwqR0NwGm_SQDD8lAWa-twOUVX5V4zq1KxXgGLgVB01EZLMDR1Uutpl3P917fHgzA8aopaWlOq2kGD2aEZ3ghNOW-k0nYKITvK9HsFc3btpGEQ7z2NphTAXZ1T6K2tqaW8WnnDn3lM7Kyg7DNQ8n7EV1PqKgjzsLAT749DcJkMUpJ7twvfjvEhRBMLJaLhNS2s_iyfBUkeqL-SSxvradYv4V9CZz19jYC77traH_haXo7_fQSnWdK0rPfMr58onRlVPObft7g82ZbvgHb8t0iHfxwBETbhYb_MAH2IDjRCoRJXI5jp1crcZYUMzPRRCIkEuy0t0RpKKYkOlXmnftQ9vBMvHi96tQhw_5nUlPhknqvxFnjW4kzeNetgEMJC9It7brz8V4J_2BT3NxsE5wHWbckDKfyylI05sfFQJXtqo8Gt-HR_ZEkzAPmDGiO2qlv6vZtBt_g9HHHz-hAciBtqBvpZY3O2bj7YJY_TIA0Wvrf9DcP3gHTo6JYasXXlW1_YFmEU_6f1PqnrQMnuVRtvDEpTdISEE1XS5ViBDp72fuWxSx6Tgdov053WNGhiIX6Idr0uplNr06GN--HNOUSUh5CnrmWCxG7WdOoJxaQtl9mv4byKZbmWtTeIYBTBSKgpHLxTPqilLxKcuTDHh-G0%3D)**

**I don't sugarcoat the truth: the Republican Party is bleeding out in blue states, and the ripple effect is coming for our majority.** We've got the better ideas, the stronger record, and the momentum - but we're losing the messaging war.

That's where you come in.

I've teamed up with the Senate Republicans to sound the alarm and refocus our movement on what matters most: winning back the voters we lost and holding the line in the Senate.

**[Complete your 2025 Election Aftermath Survey right now. >>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f2cba63eec8f4f7fbf520c75ecf88b88&_e=4lUXgfg7wosU9unuO9f20QwZByKzSvqPmj3is4p18CGw-PJOksLV812CHttIwtSBoVkExTplgYsO7Dq8wAow9407iyPN9untA4D5ywxn85fG6W4O73yAoR3gvtPDp-i8hLzp_f8F_Yy9VLluoE0cZ6YIb3dus-1lAgv5Rne4F5fJ3Vk0M7Ng-QV_tDSKs1c0nq5ILm03dz_U_hre00behtLYb4wgK9umnHez9u4yy_-AWvXbJ3t-gc6hf86VLbAm4kwVSlPGY_fJPRiNVsyKQSwqR0NwGm_SQDD8lAWa-twOUVX5V4zq1KxXgGLgVB01EZLMDR1Uutpl3P917fHgzA8aopaWlOq2kGD2aEZ3ghOGRsMjjACiWlpbg1wR9XUIodL2PpHHxSXSHNBnQiMWaPyo3nln_1Fso0b3USNnp9WE5dPna_j6z-BM19cbSnpFHvfWjyNSvU88epEOBkSVlygNhd3M6UDe_fPnWUnPBpT1f06-WlApMCujs5-JxX8ymgKxPwtkj8KH61wSgI3GzJO9oKS3y4mNZ656fgCzyilFGCnrSgmcR1sZ9URhdrzjU7A-IqsjHTG0GzRDqMWJrEXgD3xWa7LdHk2DU9akGjp7NVzYxzunzgep9uUiA_KzCk-1w4UPWibyp4Mu6VfuLxWV_u-YwUGhi5w3teszjll0NHZAyeOy8lGNVHEgUNWMZCP_IFU0B7TODCoJuew-irR7loa3UTtKpwnuptIj_yJ3XYDg9DOZ64XAcpksdGafgjudAu5pDdL3mwGH77__RQhIqSuJEyzl6ZOX39T7UigP3IV9U5o706etHXZWl7z_5yruoGxQfw80GYNI9Jd0g6RXTfiBdefdFXB_qVzfPPjC_rocoJHhpX0zf01XmV0BKEOyTMHuEyMBUfUbiYr8lJDuGgX6yY5UTUDYppHQSqA%3D)**

For America,

clean_body: Republicans just got a wake-up call. Kellyanne Conway needs your input to shape the GOP strategy for 2026. | Fellow American, I've seen plenty of elections in my lifetime — but what happened on November 4th? That was a catastrophe for America. Virginia. New Jersey. New York City. Even California. We didn't just lose - we got lapped. Democrats are already dancing in the streets, convinced they've found the playbook to take back the Senate in 2026. I don't sugarcoat the truth: the Republican Party is bleeding out in blue states, and the ripple effect is coming for our majority. We've got the better ideas, the stronger record, and the momentum - but we're losing the messaging war. That's where you come in. I've teamed up with the Senate Republicans to sound the alarm and refocus our movement on what matters most: winning back the voters we lost and holding the line in the Senate. Your answers will help guide strategy, funding, and messaging in the most competitive races in America. The Democrats are organized, funded, and fired up. We need to match their energy. Every second we delay is another inch they take. For America, Kellyanne Conway If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.
Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.
At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.
It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.
As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.
There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.
**[Can you split a donation with Tim Walz and I to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251122_2kelly.JVt5X8&amount=5&refcode=em20251122-140&t=1&akid=140%2E34582%2EnkAV1o)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251122_2kelly.JVt5X8&amount=5&refcode=20251122-140&t=20&akid=140%2E34582%2EnkAV1o)**
I really appreciate this.
Thank you,
Mark
Prepared and paid for by Mark Kelly for Senate

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251122-140&t=21&refcode2=140_34582_nkAV1o&akid=140%2E34582%2EnkAV1o)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

# [A Rapid Breakthrough for Zahid Chaudhry: The District Judge Takes Up the Emergency Motion](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=179675429&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Njc1NDI5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM4NTg5ODYsImV4cCI6MTc2NjQ1MDk4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2sUBjFLYDOh9K-lBFJmnn2A5odeUexXXlDyofPesdIs)
### The federal district court has taken swift action on Zahid's emergency request for release -- and the next few days may be decisive.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Nov 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=179675429&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Njc1NDI5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2Mzg1ODk4NiwiZXhwIjoxNzY2NDUwOTg2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dVLL6wKiFsUUCKRyUdgvVMKnj5GJM7GxXdQTZi7lkjs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=179675429&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Njc1NDI5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM4NTg5ODYsImV4cCI6MTc2NjQ1MDk4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2sUBjFLYDOh9K-lBFJmnn2A5odeUexXXlDyofPesdIs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=179675429&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Njc1NDI5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM4NTg5ODYsImV4cCI6MTc2NjQ1MDk4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2sUBjFLYDOh9K-lBFJmnn2A5odeUexXXlDyofPesdIs)
---
| | [](https://substack..E5fAmebYvy_cOOcmjvtI615pvKVhxqGjxjLxor-Ep6w?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/a-rapid-breakthrough-for-zahid-chaudhry?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
For the first time since ICE seized Zahid at his citizenship interview on August 21st, we have a genuinely meaningful shift in the legal landscape -- and it came _fast_.
Yesterday, the federal district court (Western District of Washington) formally accepted the emergency motion the Ninth Circuit transferred down earlier this week. Not only did they accept it, they **acted on it immediately**. Within a single day, the judge [issued an order](https://substack.com/redirect/b6f50447-493f-4b64-a58e-eb6c355a3feb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that clears the procedural path for reviewing Zahid's request for release.
In the world of federal courts -- especially in habeas petitions -- this kind of speed is uncommon. And it signals something important: _the court recognizes the urgency.
_
### **What the Court Just Did**
The district judge set the framework for what comes next:
* ICE must meet and confer with us on a rapid briefing schedule.
* If they don't, the government is required to file their response on the fast timeline set by the local rules.
* Once ICE files, the judge has everything they need to rule on Zahid's emergency request for release.
* The judge provided Zahid with an unusual opportunity - in these types of cases, a reply brief is not usually permitted, but the judge explicitly gave Zahid that opportunity. The judge is anticipating bluff and bluster from ICE and is providing a chance for Zahid to directly respond.
* And critically - _the judge left the door open to ruling immediately._

This is not a decision _on_ the motion yet -- but it is the first real movement toward one. It means Zahid's plea is no longer sitting in a bureaucratic fog. It is on the desk of a judge who has acknowledged the case, asserted jurisdiction, and begun the clock.
For those who've been following closely: _**yes, this is a very big deal.**_

### **Meanwhile, Inside the Detention Center ...**
Last night, Zahid told me that ICE is suddenly approaching him to "coordinate" his medical care.
This is the same agency that ignored his specialists for weeks. The same agency that has allowed his eyesight to deteriorate. The same agency that placed him in a cell under 24/7 bright lights despite his brain injury. Now -- under federal scrutiny -- they've decided to take an interest in helping him.
I don't think anyone who knows how ICE operates will be surprised by the timing. Pressure creates attention. Accountability creates motion. And lawsuits, unfortunately, are the only language the agency seems to understand.
It is extremely likely the government's upcoming filing will try to paint this sudden burst of activity as evidence that Zahid is getting "appropriate care."
We know better. You know better. And the court will see through it.
### **What Happens Now**
Sometime in the next few days, the government must file its response to Zahid's emergency motion.
Once they do, the judge is free to rule -- and has already indicated they may do so quickly.
This could all move very fast.
There is a chance, a real one, that Zahid could be home soon. And there is a chance the government will try to stall, bluff, or muddy the waters. We are preparing for both.
### **What I Need From You**
For now, just keep us in your prayers, your thoughts, your circles of care.
The kids are so little. Zahid is tired and hurting but still hopeful. And every message, every prayer, every share, every bit of solidarity makes a difference -- not only practically, but emotionally, spiritually, and morally.
This case is about one man, yes. But it is also about what we are willing to tolerate in our system -- and what we aren't.
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for walking with us.
I'll keep you updated as soon as the government files, or sooner if something breaks loose.
With love and determination,
**Melissa**

| **Anthony Kern For State Senate:

Sign my [e-qual](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=1547589eed&e=b78dc6f299) to put me on the ballot!**
---
|
---
| Supporters and Friends,

Today I have for you an important task because it’s what gets the ball rolling on everything else: [**adding your signature to put my name on the ballot**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=33257e9fd5&e=b78dc6f299). _**This is not my first rodeo**_. I’ve served four successful and productive terms in the Arizona House and State Senate, and I know how important it is to gather signatures and turn them in promptly. [**If you follow this link, sign up will only take one minute**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=ce49797f30&e=b78dc6f299) of your time and won’t cost you a dime. _Election integrity is one of the most important problems affecting the United States, and Arizona in particular_. I’ve made the need to trust free, fair, and honest elections one of the personal causes of my public career. I can personally testify that this online sign-up process is both the easiest method and the most protective against fraud. Digital sign-ups require confirmed identity, and cannot be forged like other signatures. [**E-QUAL is the way to go, and it starts by following this link**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=59be40186b&e=b78dc6f299). **I only need a couple thousand signatures from committed supporters** like you before my campaign will be ready to hit the ground running from a solid starting point. So before I begin championing conservative legislation in Phoenix again, or holding Katie Hobbs and her comrades accountable, or helping President Trump to Make America Great Again (starting here in our beautiful community), _we need to check these boxes and put “Anthony Kern” on the ballot_. [**Let’s collect these signatures**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=959fcd443f&e=b78dc6f299) and wrap up this paperwork so we can start the heavy lifting of making LD-27 more affordable, safer, and a better home for all of us.
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: If everyone reading this email pitched in $7:
body:
Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose:
---
Derek, With so much happening right now, you may not think that $7, $10, or $25 can make a difference in checking Trump’s power. **But you’d be wrong.** Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose: laying the groundwork to take back Congress. Investing in our state parties. Holding Trump and congressional Republicans accountable in the courts, in their own districts, online, and in the media — and making sure voters are hearing that message loud and clear. We are able to do this work because thousands of grassroots supporters just like you have chipped in what they could, when they could, to support our mission. Today, we’re going to ask you to join them — but first, let us tell you why. **Here’s what our path forward looks like:** It’s clearer than ever that we need to take back Congress and elect more Democrats who will prevent Trump’s worst instincts from becoming our new reality. To win the Senate majority, we need to build strong, statewide organizing programs in at least eight states — places like Georgia, North Carolina, Maine, and New Hampshire. On top of that, we’ll need strong Democratic infrastructure in districts all over the map, to win in 35 vulnerable Republican House seats. As you can imagine, all of that will take a HUGE number of resources. **[That’s why we’re asking for a chance to earn your first contribution of 2025. If winning back Congress is important to you, can you make your first $7 contribution today to help us keep building the strongest possible Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251122_5343_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5343_22930333_RCr6rd&akid=5343%2E22930333%2ERCr6rd) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251122_5343_fr&refcode2=5343_22930333_RCr6rd&akid=5343%2E22930333%2ERCr6rd)**

The Democrats
⛅To all Democrats: 🇺🇸
If everyone reading this email chipped in $7 right now, we’d be well on our way to building the resources we need to organize and reach voters all over the country.
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. That’s why we’re counting on all Democrats who know how high the stakes are to step up in this moment.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: What Marjorie Taylor Greene’s resignation means:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s sudden resignation has instantly changed the math for 2026.
With her departure, the GOP majority narrows again. And in a chamber already divided by razor-thin margins, every vacancy, every special election, every turnout operation matters more than it did a week ago.
Which brings us to Tennessee’s 7th District:
TN-07 is a district Republicans should win without a second thought, but after their congressman's resignation and months of unusually low GOP turnout across the region, Democrat Aftyn Behn is running a race that is far closer than national analysts expected.
It’s a stretch -- but it’s not impossible, not with the volatility we’re seeing across the House map.
And with MTG gone, this race suddenly matters more. A narrower GOP majority means fewer seats required to flip control. If we can force Republicans to defend a district they normally take for granted, we shift the battlefield, and the narrative, heading into 2026.
GOTV PAC is launching a turnout program in TN-07, but to ramp it up before December 2, we need the resources now. Can you pitch in $25 to strengthen our GOTV effort in TN-07 and take full advantage of this shrinking GOP margin? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11222025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11222025]
Thanks for being part of that fight.
— GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002

clean_body: [] Peter , Marjorie Taylor Greene’s sudden resignation has instantly changed the math for 2026. With her departure, the GOP majority narrows again. And in a chamber already divided by razor-thin margins, every vacancy, every special election, every turnout operation matters more than it did a week ago. Which brings us to Tennessee’s 7th District: TN-07 is a district Republicans should win without a second thought, but after their congressman's resignation and months of unusually low GOP turnout across the region, Democrat Aftyn Behn is running a race that is far closer than national analysts expected. It’s a stretch -- but it’s not impossible, not with the volatility we’re seeing across the House map. And with MTG gone, this race suddenly matters more. A narrower GOP majority means fewer seats required to flip control. If we can force Republicans to defend a district they normally take for granted, we shift the battlefield, and the narrative, heading into 2026. GOTV PAC is launching a turnout program in TN-07, but to ramp it up before December 2, we need the resources now. Can you pitch in $25 to strengthen our GOTV effort in TN-07 and take full advantage of this shrinking GOP margin? [] Donate Now [] Thanks for being part of that fight. — GOTV PAC [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. Learn more at: gotv.vote [] PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE GOTV PAC 712 H St NE PMB 96591 Washington, DC 20002 United States Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. name: Kathy Hochul
subject: re: Elise Stefanik
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96975?t=6&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A) Team, I have some news to share:

**Republican Elise Stefanik announced her campaign for Governor.**

And Stefanik’s special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red.

I’ve never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won’t start now.

But Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising day to show Stefanik she doesn’t stand a chance.

[That’s why I’m calling on my top supporters to help me reach my goal of 1,000 gifts before midnight and prove the strength of our team. Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between myself and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96975?t=7&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A)

I’ll be blunt: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump’s approval than what’s best for New York families.

She supports Trump’s expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the Child Tax Credit.

Stefanik brags about being the “deciding vote” for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put 5 rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block.

And when the Trump administration threatened to cut NY police funding, Stefanik stayed silent.

**New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them.**

[I need all hands on deck to fight back. So I’m asking again: Will you split $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before midnight to help me outraise Stefanik and win this race for every New Yorker?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96975?t=8&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96976?t=9&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96975?t=13&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A)
Thank you and ever upward,

Kathy

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21980%2E878179%2EHl9X6A).**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Don't forget: Trump's sham roundtable = war on ALL grassroots Democrats!
body:
Peter, this is it. It's all out in the open now.
The Trump administration recently held an “Antifa Roundtable” - a staged event designed to brand Democratic organizers, grassroots fundraisers, and progressive movements as domestic threats.
They’re targeting Democratic PACs, nonprofits, and voter outreach groups in coordinated political hit jobs, claming that they're engaging in TERRORIST ACTIVITIES.
They’re calling your $5 donations “money laundering.”
This is a CRUCIAL MOMENT. We must fight back NOW.
We’re launching an emergency rapid-response fund to protect Democratic operations under attack. Chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to show the Trump administration that grassroots Democrats will never be silenced. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stopfascism?refcode=112225_4]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. body:
True leadership emerges in the heat of battle

Hey, Matt Van Epps here.

You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay.

**What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:_Night Stalkers Don’t Quit._**

We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks.

What I learned was this: **true leadership emerges in the heat of battle.** Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – _no matter the odds._

**Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance.**

**On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast.[_Will you rush in a donation now?_](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=363f1ef7e7d54f9aae0959ee04c8cc41&_e=lxOba9IYIXOtcivOu3Lk9kLMU-HGNhMIKaT6OwG0ZXWpbgxz9DUiv1EpbToq3xIY5Mo3Ev10r2ktcGvIBtqxPRhnGA3tKLNmpANbGP2ZwgL7_gB-v-b7xTVzJ0_ySReaCEYRXVFUHLrCuYEu-gnU2qVg25H_eaCUdl8Cw2eqbBvxXWt4kufpVtYZdBiyuVcWwYyW68ucdrmYPOi2mzV3E_C4VFngtRXppur62KKMUrpSRA6K55dFNqHSHrYleNXcI2F4L4q_k2579XTfjEPun85LQHl99YEFFOGwRcrw8yqC7H5A1CMzfRdlcjG54asr74FauiIB5RR2QXoym-i7PjAPpzYj30L2NkiiZFIyK24wZ--1NaTkUsWl9GtFCis5tbiv8LMNFlRKnu-jlYFcEJDy1NPaKCLekyS8oag60DorTm4MV4XgwM5rsz2E6u8BXu8uI2x-v4xfaVPT9Riga2o7DK7jMAvNB0VGLWuFqLTrQvEBOYJwkM68l3veketv4TV_n70GfY6deLyfUGi43A%3D%3D)**

The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside **Jasmine Crockett** , was previously **endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America** , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal **bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement.** She's already being called "_**the AOC of Tennessee**_ " and is gunning to be the **newest member of "The Squad."** _No thank you._

**I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government.**

**President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.”**

_I’m running to prove him right._

Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. **This race, right now, is the firewall._And it's the only game in town._**

**[I’m not asking for much – just your endorsement and whatever you can pitch in right now. $5 keeps a door-knocker on the street. $25 fuels a mail piece. $100 runs digital ads that could flip undecideds.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=363f1ef7e7d54f9aae0959ee04c8cc41&_e=lxOba9IYIXOtcivOu3Lk9kLMU-HGNhMIKaT6OwG0ZXWpbgxz9DUiv1EpbToq3xIY5Mo3Ev10r2ktcGvIBtqxPRhnGA3tKLNmpANbGP2ZwgL7_gB-v-b7xTVzJ0_ySReaCEYRXVFUHLrCuYEu-gnU2rbEPVE0vFkDr2P_ib--UsDjqlGKf79zrxNSmwzbx0RBQdruK5Lu9PSFhgG9xcjS1nIQKLUWl5MRL3QdxS8ffFnzZikavuT14M8PF-x-3jezcZ3rpgpWKpuISfyLoeqn7j0CgEWm5vthRWCX3m0d2HmcPG-41domDjcRAz5aOydmORq5o3iLHheYSiMYEGWOhufWmaLcDw3YHivUWJgeLnTecaE062DpqYOKoW5rTGFBMQ3zpDmWY2fxVbiCyAFHljtf3LuE9uUl34znYgPT5xApLCLeMGwY3Er-X_6Vy3lyvIz6y0Xc3zMLUzquK5Zk2FoL1D_mbLaf3dGkjdrpn0RcGeTSzirP2GCzSn6CNAWeb2BDk_EPAn8mAu5fvYWolQ%3D%3D)**

_**Night Stalkers Don’t Quit.**_

**But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time.**

Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,
Matt Van Epps

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie showed us how we take back our culture for good
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zba8u3p8trf8e859d152924ugddd56gmmprk0spg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2cjh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvoe7jk7rs51stqujbajic2ed6o76g93npegett0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7f8qobnuhp2iuhkhm8olkd1i3f678edpk3ad79g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2cjh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zloim36j2fismklqekrrvegbifg1eh17ucnv0j08_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2cjh2bs)
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z40o3urael5c7q54n1ep4dqmdt7kvcjbm1pmjn58_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2cjh2bs)
---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---

name: Lawrence Reed
subject: A troubling milestone for America
body:
Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism.

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0i0396s45rqe2uvn4j5r2rq81jpj9s413ges5mo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs) Friend,

Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism.

This news shows us that many people today have a profound misunderstanding of history and human nature.

When people think that socialism means “fairness” or “sharing,” they forget what it really entails: **state control over individual choice, innovation, and opportunity.**

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has been warning about the dangers and failures of socialism for nearly 80 years. **Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.**

If you’ve never donated to FEE, or if it’s been over a year since your last gift, a member of FEE’s Board will DOUBLE — or even TRIPLE — your donation!
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb34h4m280so26popgovc12935u0b2ngu960mdio_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
[To help share these truths, I’d like to send you a digital copy of _Reflections on the Failure of Socialism_ — a powerful book we use to show young people what history has already proven about socialism’s empty promises — when you donate today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z96mq6f6qu2iff4fls5pcqpmt2bghvn14qlh7d30_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z60qvkl6qcup7fe88amo829fm81vsr33rl24cu48_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
As Max Eastman warns in his book: _“Yearning to do good and obsessed by the power of the state to do it... they are destroying in the name of social welfare the foundations of freedom.”_

At FEE, we know that liberty must be chosen, learned, and lived anew in every generation. This is why sparking curiosity, deepening understanding, and building future advocates for liberty is at the heart of everything we do.

**Through our classroom programs, teacher training, online content, and transformative in-person events, we teach young people the truth!**

We’re showing them that:
* Innovation and voluntary exchange create prosperity for everyone.
* Central planning and government control lead to poverty, stagnation, and oppression.
* Freedom is both a moral and practical necessity for human dignity and opportunity.

One of the tools we use to teach these lessons is _**Reflections on the Failure of Socialism**_. This powerful book shows students, with history and logic, why socialism fails — again and again — and why freedom works. [And I will send you a FREE digital copy of the book when you donate today. As a bonus, your first-time gift will be MATCHED!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zec10dsmn65mh6fttjus34gffta4c04lm450t8q0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
[Donate $35 → $70](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgaos5vrinvg4g9mpc81q2n23c9hchso9t8bp80g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

[Donate $50 → $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi7dijobcann55h3ubbcqr0mok4makmnq9juu470_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

[Donate $100 → $200](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv9t2aab9fu23hp8ggtqpbakceui0v2vbfl5fujg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

[Donate $500 → $1,000](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg10odbo661n4f65g3s2s9m0k60kkvkf0vcdmv8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,0000 → $3,000](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zubv0duhhk8d2tur0nkqse9fsieu8ei51gm08q88_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,500 → $4,500](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfp0k5glji7puc6t1vle0jog97rgd713d43oolg0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv4gdp0h328lccmo3d0aiklf5nf7ph5s82c2rhto_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
Back in the 1980s, long before I became President Emeritus of FEE, I was a young American in Poland, determined to bring the ideas of liberty to those trapped behind the Iron Curtain.

I didn’t just see the failures of socialism firsthand — I lived among them.

I remember seeing fear in people’s eyes — fear of speaking their minds, fear of their own government.

There were empty shelves and full prisons.

**I saw that under socialism, everyone was equal... equally poor, equally powerless, equally oppressed.**

When I finally came home, I made a promise: I would spend the rest of my life teaching others what socialism really means — and why freedom is the only system that allows humanity to flourish.

Because if we don’t equip young people with these truths, they risk repeating these mistakes.

[You can help FEE show young people what history has already proven about socialism’s empty promises by donating today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg336m0s0bgeacc2t42vphr9eaisk93n6lk5u0t0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh6dqnduslm2ke152gqafi66gg2rg0gih6srs7jo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)
In liberty,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus, Humphreys Family Senior Fellow, and Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty

**P.S.** **LIMITED-TIME MATCH!** If you’ve never donated to FEE — or if it’s been a year since your last gift — a member of FEE’s Board will **MATCH** your donation. Gifts under $1,000 will be **DOUBLED** , and gifts between $1,000-$5,000 will be **TRIPLED**.
[Get Your Donation MATCHED](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuqdlloe2d31n5q3m3hupu2hg6nbho19sbj6cs1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ieaor2c1h2bs)

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

name: I AM DONALD J. TRUMP
subject: Please I am starting to worry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I’d be heartbroken if I missed your response!

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zidut54p8f32q6fbsi57pmaieso1a2s74tl6r7bo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie6pb2c5h2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Equip yourself with truth for every season of 2026
body:
Daily Devotional just in time for Christmas

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zik6mek09l20ih2fmbau9s2cv0bp9cbmgplsango_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, There has never been a more important time to grow strong in your faith. And today, I am thrilled to share a brand-new resource designed to help you do just that. The [_2026 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu5l62q1kd5i53l3hmiunc0e3l39vgbme1l0nem0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs) is now available—just in time for Christmas. This beautiful, suede tan leather-bound volume features rich brown and gold foil accents, and includes 532 pages of spiritual nourishment. Each weekday devotional is filled with biblical insight and practical encouragement to help you walk closely with the Lord every day.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7eoapa7ideqv5e3n7uopkr2lumtji3ju82m0qu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs)
---
This is one of the most spiritually rich and beautifully designed resources we’ve ever produced:
---
* 532 pages of spiritual growth and inspiration
* Suede tan leather cover with inlaid rich brown and gold foil
* 260 devotionals for weekday reading and prayer
* Larger print for easier readability
* Organized by season to guide you through the year

---
Here’s a glimpse of your journey through the year:
---
* January–March - Begin the year with firm footing by delving into the foundational truths of Christianity.
* Spring - Strip away the clutter of Christianity and learn what God desires from you every day.
* Summer - Take a fresh look at God’s instruction manual for living and Jesus’s instruction manual for prayer.
* Fall & Winter - Study the ultimate example of someone who is planted in God’s truth—Jesus Christ—through the Gospel of Luke.

---
Make your generous gift today to receive your [_2026 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp1ppk4j0moulu7retke0ksc1cm63068kb02kvj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs) in time to start the New Year in God’s Word. [Request Your Devotional Today »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg37iqdkka575sp3ikgqbcjtmp95ns69ig7p9evg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs) Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. If you would like to share this beautiful resource with others, I’d be honored to send you [10 copies of the _2026 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9d4pbjujv6ea2r0fm4mqmmnnd72c5d5angr0380_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs) when you give $300 or more. It’s a meaningful gift—one that points people to God’s Word all year long. [https://secure.ptv.org/10pack-2026-daily-devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq0en71ktt47srbhlcpf5re9smjbp67s879l1ug8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3ie9oj2cjh2bs)

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Gunfire disrupts Christmas tree lighting in North Carolina town
body:
Gunshots rang out Friday, Nov. 21, 2025, during the Christmas tree lighting in downtown Concord. A WCNC Charlotte photojournalist was filming the event when he reported shots were fired around 7:40 p.m. The incident caused a disruption to the event, with officers setting up crime scene tape shortly after. Emergency crews were seen as well, [...]...Click to read more | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/1wwMbLqhvOxH_u7ljZ_Gmg)

# **[The laywoman whose mission helped lead to the feast of Christ the King](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

null / Credit: Courtesy of the Benedictines of Mary, Queen of Apostles Dublin, Ireland, Nov 22, 2025 / 13:00 pm (CNA). Marthe de Noaillat, called the “Apostle of Christ the King” by her biographer, had a singular mission in life that she believed had been entrusted to her: to promote the universal kingship of Jesus Christ.“Marthe was the woman who single-handedly brought this to the Church. This is not unusual, indeed the hard lifting in many of these causes was done by women of profound faith,” Father Bernard McGuckian, SJ, host of a new EWTN Ireland television series, told CNA.De Noaillat was the seventh child in a family of 12 whose parents, Jean-Baptiste Devuns and Anne Zélina, were pious Catholics.

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros.

| |
---
| | I'm writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc91fq8k2jm4khouqne4vp1p24k8vbl7cp3dar80_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message- will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8raba6rarm3lmilkdqkrs8p4t6ki3rnpk18a60_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs) ** You're one of America's most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system. And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal. >> George Soros' push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York's horrible Letitia James who's now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants. It's their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros' native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the "Stop Soros Law." The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn't drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens. That's exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It's why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive - and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjlgg24o8e8l70uiu7g70ejg9ok6kqc8cicnr11o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaku1ela9bu3eprui46ukecd3rmoebjfhgkc7dtg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros' globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we! After the "Stop Soros Law" passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted. And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...** **...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did. **_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we'll lose the House or the Senate -\- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now. Great change comes from embracing great opportunities - and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8fdes5lv9jhd0beio8bt0b3a72se9ocru2op8b0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs) ** **My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I 'm the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** "AMAC" stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, "action" is what we're known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we're fighting against George Soros not alongside him. You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of "climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom" and their mission is "justice and equity." You know that's just globalist speak for 'destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.' And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of "America's Greatest Innovators" who's**** "changing the world, $100 million at a time." It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it's under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. But today, I'm not writing to those seniors. **[I'm writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhrojhme4g2ud3kl61h78ate036rullid40gpfmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs) ** If the AARP wants to betray America's seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ** **And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we'll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnam18u9bv7hhlf91svfa95ichk7mh9nqejafm8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn't take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we're certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you're able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. **[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbg1gunl80mb3opc10nieius8p22iq8nfcdrufpg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs) ** Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_** **AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjpmnttco8u5nm8dkjp13pp6ujqt6ih2dau81grg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a "Stop Soros Law" and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zki4oo4dm7282ae0dmfu8l5jbmu95gr4volu7rng_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00jaiu7i9prhimggdq1jtkckn2btmrpp5nnbdv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6kb4osuo02a0jblri80v2r90gnrelbsllp41f8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoi4f7vemmkbjeaeprrqsgrbrv7tg2pp9bbf92l0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqek110ctag1a6blcs1jb7hrc4r22ejt5olpk76g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg60p32c5h2bs)
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Your weekday walk with Christ begins here
body:
Daily Devotional just in time for Christmas

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcbnkdudr9l736ahjaouflk69v1go4br67ftber8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, There has never been a more important time to grow strong in your faith. And today, I am thrilled to share a brand-new resource designed to help you do just that. The [_2026 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6ip2hbhnd3ph1s3one7litm7pfd4o3vp792gl8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs) is now available—just in time for Christmas. This beautiful, suede tan leather-bound volume features rich brown and gold foil accents, and includes 532 pages of spiritual nourishment. Each weekday devotional is filled with biblical insight and practical encouragement to help you walk closely with the Lord every day.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zefjvkoh323j12mo68mot6l91ap685u5rikosnjg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs)
---
This is one of the most spiritually rich and beautifully designed resources we’ve ever produced:
---
* 532 pages of spiritual growth and inspiration
* Suede tan leather cover with inlaid rich brown and gold foil
* 260 devotionals for weekday reading and prayer
* Larger print for easier readability
* Organized by season to guide you through the year

---
Here’s a glimpse of your journey through the year:
---
* January–March - Begin the year with firm footing by delving into the foundational truths of Christianity.
* Spring - Strip away the clutter of Christianity and learn what God desires from you every day.
* Summer - Take a fresh look at God’s instruction manual for living and Jesus’s instruction manual for prayer.
* Fall & Winter - Study the ultimate example of someone who is planted in God’s truth—Jesus Christ—through the Gospel of Luke.

---
Make your generous gift today to receive your [_2026 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zskl0gqi6qbn50tdbmtffselpl65o7aksguo529g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs) in time to start the New Year in God’s Word. [Request Your Devotional Today »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq40r9s0ued4uc6vlor74dmikt5v70s6bmbdtp1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs) Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. If you would like to share this beautiful resource with others, I’d be honored to send you [10 copies of the _2026 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8unju2rdd59m60rffca8pptnsf7u5qcgol405mo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs) when you give $300 or more. It’s a meaningful gift—one that points people to God’s Word all year long. [https://secure.ptv.org/10pack-2026-daily-devotional](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9eoo4a59aichelbqd1998a01r10dr20hlr8l2go_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cjg6cpr2c1h2bs)
---

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1936, the first issue of the pictorial magazine _Life _was published, featuring a cover photo of the Fort Peck Dam's spillway by Margaret Bourke-White. You can see the complete [first issue here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOsyAURp8GdzVyr2JdsPBP28WftNtZGpSLMqXgANH07SdOMk8w2y8nJ1_Ox324K-usnx_qRTKbMHjak6OcKQ55Uf6ZZrtZP--k8kJxDzFaGqCC5sT5CXDQyrr3UBdaGiIgLEjyVuC5azrsikUaA1U3ClCtqcbxjPWkpk5w7DgZUWtRWHnYOAfkvGqwLUEJ3WjiQmPdnXXD6oq0zSGWn8H6vJBx77BRLKfwKpxccl4Tw57BjcFtDOGZyjmE2dEB_E4Mb1YzvDyq67Xv-_7-r__PQKzR-pxoYngxMfg8HWIGuDG8BE-rmomB-GIgzIEol6iIUq-7dc4m0bK6ml_Kup8v-U8BNwnfAQAA___ebIOG). From home upgrades to stocking stuffers, we've found the best so you don't have to. Join the early-release list to get the guide first and shop the season's top picks before anyone else. ## ****Trump to End Somali Deportation Protection
President Trump said Friday evening he will [end deportation protections for Somalis in Minnesota](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQhU9jOq_wHyyFizR0mzYlMniASYyN7NlFe_vIuUKa0SeN9Om99_WYHg4Dxu3THWBpTVOEqwQggjzR7uJP2fCFcbvA0Q75SjkjTLKVhgvBpZq8w_CedOPtCiBBNWBF36n7YAY1NLvtNcxaw9KJ1ehezu3cr8areb0vzoERDdpqE0IqIVqj-pt0nTceROeVHu7eMN2CR0r59p0w0g5reKcX5NuSjibYnegsTH0wOTI5xveZCtUXk2MVMzkKUbmeZ-G1H5Mj5edxcoJ8YHSEceMezpTJEabIz5wIloqFrynzkg4XsHCM_MAYoSRyTI5Ntv68MAQsXc90ux0Ow18s-teWLyt_AwAA___-e4pZ) "effective immediately." The move to end Temporary Protected Status comes after [City Journal reported](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO4yAUgOHT2B2WedgkFBTbuMu2W1ov8Gy_LIYISFBuP5q5wlzg_6Xv3229IQeO-188ydYtrZFaCVQr5bUeGP-Xnd8c90ZYD8ot5cy0wgizkFKAWj1y-KxT7-1GBKR6svKi1dXMRpn-sLNW7m7GbfQOjHGA0sHkRg1uUlrPumf7XZMSlJTjrC4DoPazJ6m9mszVz900kuea8vBIHOtBW_ikN-XBpbMP9qj1WTr1p4Olg6W1NjiuH_FIrxwxDCnvHSyYK7tAHSwnx0glVRSNwoaZxJbx5UVJJwZGgUGUA--I9z5b_2wcAhd96aZxP5HDz7T-Supt4SsAAP__xxh_BA) that millions of dollars in taxpayer money--stolen as part of a series of massive Minnesota welfare fraud schemes--may have been funneled to Somalia-based terror group Al-Shabab. In [a social media post](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAQRVcDmRH-0RA4mISsJ50QuXEZasYfZNfA690_0Vt4WUmndHXv-fNcnhYDpu23jWDI5yXBVQMQQVlot-lf3fDEtF1gaYdy5VIQFtELzThnQi7OYngvqnXGAwiQLRj-GOQ46UlO7W6EWMfVQq-U18OgFede9Ep7p-TrNVrXornTOBeS817LRyfs4LQDPjipptHpRvXgkHLp_mZMtIMP73xC6dYc22B2oqM28lcj5kbM13V1Pn_dK27eiPnIAQnX2oiZyv94MIISMVmCyhwcuZAlzIkdJROs91lZzdEGZOlDbKgsfCSwiClBzWQZeH8_n8AwRnBoCcK7LcYdF4aAdXg0qt-ixfCpST9yexrxHQAA__9GEJQ9), Trump wrote, _" Somali gangs are terrorizing the people of that great State, and BILLIONS of Dollars are missing. Send them back to where they came from. It's OVER!"_ Minnesota is home to [the country's largest Somali community](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnTAQhJ_GdD7CNuZSuEhD96dNiSx2wZv4guzNQeftI_IKfz2jGX3fr6_ty1OkfP70CR0fZct4t4jMWDcOPv9pJ70pnzd6DljvUivhpnttpVJSmw08xc82dOAORI2mQ6em0cyLXczSBYewL4Pa537eF4AJ-n2yx47jOMAy2wE6cs-aUtoo1VszvbQfwQKqEcywzGDF0CMQl_r6XShzwCN-yhvray-piy4wX02YH0KvQq8cMFCMTyb0GkrCB0jo1UOiTI2rZypZ6NWOarazllCyjyC5_k2XjHj6KK9aGPen12QryUfyMlHO2Ap7odeuOrhuipHaOImhP5On_5cdf8vh2-l_AQAA__-X2Yh3), with close to 80,000 across the state. Congress reported in August that 705 Somalis across the U.S. had legal protections.
## Holiday Travelers Face Weather Woes
A cross-country storm could lead to [travel havoc for millions of Thanksgiving travelers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQhp8Gb7bgMLYZGCpVbOna0cLhbNMQEwEN8ttXtB26dznd8On--_73y3wxzrtjezN3VHkN84ElecwZ45x3c9zS5p7u2AqavGMsIUaHM1AQLWMt8Nka58-5b6xaEQF5g4qNA5-kkFw2u1rMdRmQWxBoRynFMHLZcwpMLAgjo41T9RpjwBmjgo8dmMEKi2ywvJeTFaSnaF0OsfsI7sg7rv4MT4zdNdwbr_acH4nwFwKagC6ldJ_J5GDNWQECOuUQTwK6mlXix4SArrkENGN1r-OvcFsQb-0v3K4h4tWk3KYjlDYadxDQU1WZJFA61nCu8xJxJfx1fzRR2Udx3rs0jKSn2904__1w_lfLTwVfAQAA___8AI8T) next week, with showers and perhaps severe thunderstorms across the central, southern, and eastern U.S. [Thunderstorms could lead to delays](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAYhJ8GMywBYTQguMRsLr3QQvhVbhCm4B853_5qdjfYfLOurq6ur_vPfb4bH3zcfpsDNK5pjlBLAETIM-4mPsrmTx-3CgZ3yDXl7GHmHZeUMcrF7IwP19w3Tq8AHEQDmt2UGEY5irHZ9dqZ1QrpuDKikyNziwGrpHJm5GpYxsbrdxtjXDDWSXFruVFOOmDKiX4cnCR9B85jyu3f5CPusIYrnZBbm44m6B3xWYj4RfhE-FRrbY21ry_ed4bwCSLhE2ZzQniLb7vop0sPc9EFaAmpgqPLRW1OpVCbXhHzRQumfNAI_5BWgAfhExuEYmJosnbP6kPwRd1I322H8eGDDH9056n5_wAAAP__npmMKA) at the busy southeastern hubs of Atlanta and Charlotte for a time on Wednesday. There is the potential for rain and snow showers along a cold front that pivots from the Ohio Valley to the Appalachians from Wednesday to Thanksgiving Day. The weeks after Thanksgiving could be [colder and snowier than normal](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFupDAQBNCvMTeQ3Q0YH3xYacVt9rKKckQO7oFOjD0yFoS_jybKH-RcUpVevd6mm-PAcfnnNrLlnqZI5x6oFMpTWV382Bc-OC4nubJSPlPOTBNI6GqlasDJOw7X1Fbe3omAsCKrdI-D6QyaarXGoDaEg4RWDW5GMqZD6ZUDLaVuVcX22aYUoFKyQ92A633nSfUeWzP4TrSSPJeUm_fEsax0D1c6KDdz2qpg11Ieu8A_AkYBo3ubn4JmSc9YwPjyX8A4p-DrPabzqn8g9Zw2jkv9SMHl-ki50KeAcS8pXwJH9gL_KtBa9XqAKlv_ODkE3nstWrlsjsP3fPnVZ4eFrwAAAP__xj5_Fg) across portions of the United States. Long-range forecasts from NOAA's Climate Prediction Center favor below-average temperatures for the majority of America from late November into December.
## List: Cities with Increased Home Values
Knoxville, Tennessee, has seen the [biggest increase in home values](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuxCAUAE-DOyw-_lFQpHG3aVNaxDzsl2Czgrcme_toc4X0oxlpPm7LzWHEc3t3B1gKaTmhlghEkBfa3fldNrzw3Co42iHXlDPCooTquZRc6cU7jM-la7wNAAp0A1aOg55Mb7Rpdiu1DsaJUQo1uVFLo_3UmbB60ZtOhLVB-7JJqbSUotdjq9zgew9y8Lozk-9ZJ8Ajpdx-JTxphxCf6YLcruloot2J7oXpN6ZmpuZaaxvSz-ej4AmlvBim5gwucijkCJia93QAv1x8QOEluQyeS8FXJITSZOvvFWPEMoysE9vhMP6V6F97Lqt-AwAA___9V3pQ) since 2019, according to a recent real estate analysis. The average home in Knoxville has seen its value grow nearly 86%, or roughly $190,000. **Whatever happened to Radio Shack?** In its heyday in the 1980s and 90s, RadioShack seemed to be in every strip mall, wedged between a dry cleaner and a video store. If you needed a weird battery, a tangle of speaker wire, or a mystery adapter five minutes before dinner, you went to RadioShack.

It was the default tech stop long before anyone thought to “just order it online.” But it didn’t begin as a corporate giant. RadioShack started in 1921 as a tiny Boston shop selling radio gear to ship operators and hobbyists who liked to tinker. The real growth began in the 1960s, when Tandy bought the struggling chain. Tandy stocked the stores with soldering irons, CB radios, and, eventually, by the late 1970s, the TRS-80 home computer—the first “real” PC a lot of families ever saw. [Here’s a Radio Shack Christmas commercial from the 1980s.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1ugzAUxfGnMVsQ_sDA4KFSxdAqXdtOyMHX-LYOjswNbt6-oq_Q9RzpN_zfz9PZYsR1ebNXMOTTtELZIhBBnijY9XtbcMd1KWApQC4pZ4RJNKI9cX4ScnIW42NSlTMeQICswPBOy35oBzlUwXDoLl6DUGqwdtbSauWlc6LvXd95P1doDo1zITlvWtnVwmrXOuDaSTX0rmWqAYeUcv2VcKUAPj7SDrme07WKJhDdNiafmBiZGEsp9SPd6X6B4z8WS3NgctyZfMbP_ed1fPlI57nKxt0Kxoib7phqlqvF-EfSvzrsRvwGAAD__wyIcls) This successful period, though, led to a dead-end as the decades went by. Big-box stores like Best Buy and Walmart undercut RadioShack on price and selection. Then the World Wide Web arrived and made online ordering of obscure parts just a click away, removing the chain’s biggest advantage. Chasing growth, RadioShack leaned hard into selling cellphones and contracts, a business already dominated by carriers and bigger retailers. The stores, still small and aging, began to feel cramped and oddly random—half phone shop, half junk drawer. By the mid-2010s, after two bankruptcies and waves of closures, the [once-ubiquitous brand had faded into a handful of remaining retail outposts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAURp8GOxwB8aegSGO3aVM6KFe9WRYcuCuzb5_Z5BFSf9-cOXO-bvPNosewf9oHGNriHKBkD0SQZjpsuOcdLwx7AUsHpBJTQphlIzUXgks1O4v-NbeVMxuABFWBEX2nhlGPaqwOozfdCKuXZdGib1cFQ9M6uS0wqGXQa1-hedOEkEqIRqu-lrZz2oHonGrHwWnWNuCQYqq_IwY6YPOveEGq1_iovDmIzszUB5MTk1MppcZwQaZ4gkP7PjE52US4eshMTn8rhp3JqRmEEprJSfMENseQeTlePFmHMR92vfMCgXh8El-eGQPkXNt8Vsm4s6D3mLuetc3-sOh_dehfDS8jfwIAAP__IaGH9Q) and a nostalgic URL, a relic of a more hands-on analog version of tech. _Did you use to shop at Radio Shack? Enjoy huge savings plus up to $250 in bonus gifts like blue light glasses and health courses. | Whatever happened to Radio Shack? In its heyday in the 1980s and 90s, RadioShack seemed to be in every strip mall, wedged between a dry cleaner and a video store. If you needed a weird battery, a tangle of speaker wire, or a mystery adapter five minutes before dinner, you went to RadioShack. It was the default tech stop long before anyone thought to “just order it online.” But it didn’t begin as a corporate giant. RadioShack started in 1921 as a tiny Boston shop selling radio gear to ship operators and hobbyists who liked to tinker. The real growth began in the 1960s, when Tandy bought the struggling chain. Tandy stocked the stores with soldering irons, CB radios, and, eventually, by the late 1970s, the TRS-80 home computer—the first “real” PC a lot of families ever saw. This successful period, though, led to a dead-end as the decades went by. Big-box stores like Best Buy and Walmart undercut RadioShack on price and selection. Then the World Wide Web arrived and made online ordering of obscure parts just a click away, removing the chain’s biggest advantage. Chasing growth, RadioShack leaned hard into selling cellphones and contracts, a business already dominated by carriers and bigger retailers. The stores, still small and aging, began to feel cramped and oddly random—half phone shop, half junk drawer. By the mid-2010s, after two bankruptcies and waves of closures, the and a nostalgic URL, a relic of a more hands-on analog version of tech. Did you use to shop at Radio Shack? name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Honey Production Up, Schools Closed, and Hoop Gets Wheels
body:
Texas beekeepers produced more than 4 million pounds of honey this season, marking a strong rebound from lower outputs in recent years. At an average market price of $2.24 a pound, this season’s honey production is worth nearly $9 million.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GuzFcrspYUGwysZtttyQI15EExADOz9tv3FfY9svJOSffz13fjQ9-e3ybSKq-l6Q3epVAtVLWa9ros-fkDlt92o692DWlUKwWXPQXgItA7YwPH901Ts3cjdCQAjngdRyFhGZVOLpBGonkJO8dkutnM-Li-IB2tJ1tvDrLAASC4ADQcgn9Mi9zP85G2FmwjpPzNeW2rlTpbcoSPulJubUpNkGtte6F4RcTExNTIXtkauN5_QwwMe355NLBIA0HunKGk9nfBhnegAMyMRw16kjOH5HhjaLxocnK7S8fgi-DZB1_nPBvsf7P01OJ3wAAAP__UOF7zg) | |
# Sunday, November 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1929, evangelical Christian author and broadcaster [Hal Lindsey](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAYAJ8GOwx8oq4FxTV2_7VXGpCPhQTBwLfr-vaXvVe4fjKZzJ-f7cfEFPPztzlQ08eXLePVEhJh3ULJeJ-1uNdOseTX2fZQSmr7BgJGLiWHYXMmpntTndNWuEV2qOU8DY9lgVl2QS_KTkI8PMyzssJ4K0YF3iuU02PaBXZRf2VSwiBBSCl7McvRW2_HxRrYLTAl0EUqtaeAhB_TfLrLG2u_l6NLOhCdjQ2_GKwM1uu6-j3U2CiaHOmm4sz9JRmsIEAxWKVksLqIjidDyJ8VDfEzmYzE0VQKHLPjFA9sPJjEU8yu4c1g7ap25xVTim2amRLPw8T0L4P-b95bw98AAAD__3D-hP4) was born in Houston. He is best known for his 1970 bestseller _The Late Great Planet Earth_ , which sparked widespread interest in apocalyptic events. A pig gave folks at two Conroe ISD schools the runaround before it was finally captured.
