## Texas Honey Production Up
Texas beekeepers produced more than 4 million pounds of honey this season, marking a [strong rebound](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQBeCnwR0WM4AxBcU27u62W1r8OUZLjAXkOnn7VdLsA9x6pDnnO3--1i-bcjpuv-09mv7cynrEq-XYe6zrXo74OmsJD99TOR5n83spufkVGUoKQJGvwab8WsUQjGNBwxANqInPWqOCYTeT5Bu4zXvkapMTutlp5ZnyMiolQQzJvJ8BIAdkADAyBXJzm5PaWfQOiWAxpF7q2PfY49O2Lb_Kd6yjL_chm733sxH-i-BCcLmua_wbjybfV4KLrT35HAkubxjB5YOi_1W0PeotNmp9La3RTwDBRTJGufJcKCeoD2qmAmGiWs6aWsH8bFEzhmGoJpxXyjm1SRHBbneb8qdZ_9me3wb_BQAA__836Ig6) from lower outputs in recent years. At an average market price of $2.24 a pound, this season's honey production is worth nearly $9 million. Texas A&M AgriLife attributes this season's output to [extended wildflower blooms](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4yAURb8Gd7bg4EcoKKZxl2mntHgcYjTYWHCcxH9_lfzC7Xa1lvb6d1_uJqa4P_6aDTW9Q152fNWERFiWNe94HSX701HM-3lUt-acqluAw9AK0YJcvInpWvrGa8u9Eg1qMY3yphRMoln1xK2SfQjcWqeC9BAmPop-wEmikmPfRP2BCQFSABdCdHwSQ7DBDsoacBZYz9FHyqWjFQnfpoZ05SeWzuWtSXolOiqTfxjMDGbzKDHFgJS9uToy29mhPxnMHwuDWfDPvjGY6wuRWpc3tMb9b0Mu7Zfefm-3qylPrMRgbor2xyumFOs4sZ4_NhPTV06_S_bU8BMAAP__0FWAfw) after above-average rains in spring and early summer. The average colony produced 46 pounds of honey. Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller also credited pesticide regulators for working with farmers to foster conditions where bees can thrive. "_There 's nothing sweeter than a Texas comeback, and this year's honey harvest proves it_," [said Miller](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OozAUBeCnMZ2R7zW_hYsoWrRNoi1WmhIZcwFrDEa2Icnbj5JXmP7onKPv69bftHV2m-96JZWek-83ekRHKVHoF7_Raw9-PEyyfjv2aBbvXTQ9Ciw5AEfZj9q6V19koxrE2EJGCupKNm2LNWSLQtlUooCqKEaQ0EJRDbKp6haxKYUAzKx6lwGgBBQAkIsaymmYhrIdNJoBWSFotMmHPC2U6Knj5F7-pJAbv2ZOLSntkckLw45h9wnoOVhzuHQEymd_Muzu9Ij8z0lbigy7S0jWOGLYgahkzbC7-nW1MVq_UeA36xwF_i9oGynytBC_-pUGbb65n_j_9wT_-8bJghr3h3XOxqpmhZhXbd3nV_qd5qnwJwAA___cE4n6). While output is up, beekeepers still lost about 50% of hives this season, largely due to infestations of the parasitic Varroa mite, which has developed resistance to the chemical used to kill it.
## Search Warrant Interrupts Funeral
A service at a Houston funeral home was [interrupted Friday](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3u3CAQBPCnwR0nFn8XLtK4-6dNaS2wPpAwWLB3vnv7yHmF1KPfaDR_frYfDDGk5288aOHPnrdEV43ETGXzOdH3LNm9LIecXme1PudY7aaV7iWA1O3mMMTv1jVuMcrN0NAC49BO86xHaPzi2sGa0WI_G7XPpu0mBzDrwXWAanKqCctdBqBb0AoAHmqEfje76WeD2hotOkUucC4P9sT0wbrHb35Tedh8NHHxzGcV7S-hV6FXNBbaOxF6PXNlodeIl6S052LpoMSyUnmH9JSVsFgvLywFE8tXisFSquTk_kpUMEqfD5KXJ4pUZOVCxJJ9KO5GTmIhlGe-maz4FXqFCaahH0DotSmLO68QY6jDKDr1PDDEf5P5_45-L_pvAAAA__-gvJWA) when police showed up with a search warrant to investigate allegations of identity theft. Clients of A Community Funeral Home say their deceased loved one's credit cards and financial accounts were accessed. During the investigation, police discovered the funeral home's license [had been revoked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ9GO4zgD1JQbGM3225pQK4DCXINXMeZt9_MZN9g25OTk_N9P7flZkIM6f5tdtD03HBJcJUIRJAXjwleR0Z3rhQwnUdZPWIs6yJaMTDOmegWZ0J8LX3ttG2d4jVoLsduUkpIXnstO8W5XSWHoVtV24-yl1ZN0wBy6ydl6qDfY5yLjouWc960kg-b3eygrBGrFVXfgguEuSEPBE9TtvjCB-Rmxb2O2hMdpeq-KjFXYr6uq9nwKUaPZyFM71Il5jdVJea_kG1ngmwi87gDCw4SBQpQWCGMkBj5kB27THbsQ5rwAbuFXGftjivEGMooq7697ybEzw36n7yHFr8BAAD___gRhmA) in 2022. Unique Mica Green, the 45-year-old president of the funeral home, was arrested on a [forgery charge](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-O5CAMh5-GdIzA-V-kuCbdXntlRMBs0DE4Amez8_YnRvcG21iW9dnW7_vzsX2YEEP6_G2euPC3py3hXSIyY94OSvg6M7nLcqB0ncUeRLHYDRT0UmsJ7eZMiK-ta9yyKzfrBhc9Du00zzDq5liGaZqMsq2f-0FNY2cnPyvAyXftOPRomrDUY1pDq0FprR9q1L3f_d7PuwG7g-gUusCUH3wg47cpPr7oC_PD0rOJy8F8FtH-ErAKWO_7ftgY7F846CpMqVIC1hpLwBrJmihgrT8FrFrXvha6E-Yi_y9JfyXMJsqDniiNtVdBJ8nLwmiqLxkcJg4csNSxQ4vmjZyYDVfgDnzQxTIGi6mggLXJizvvEGMowyg69fk0Ib5D8M_Ufy3wLwAA___QvJtS) earlier this month. Police confiscated several boxes of financial records and a dozen cremated remains on Friday. Taysha Rhodes, a former client of the funeral home, told a local news outlet she has been trying to retrieve her uncle's cremated remains for two years. "_My uncle deserves more. He deserves to be at his final resting place with his family_ ," she said.
## Trump Burger Restaurants Renamed
The Texas chain of restaurants [formerly known as Trump Burger](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQBeCnMZ0RHgiEwkUabpWr3WpL5J8xtmRsZJsQ3n5FXmHbGenTOefnOT-F8y4s_8WKvLxNnAMe2WMpmGYbA55binpXxcWwb1nZGH1WMzRwo4xRaGctnD_nrtJcNnpkFXI29O19HGFgleXNgMyooVfQG30HHERvcLyPbERopewqxy-MMWgZNIyxuhnYzUgjb6MUoCSQrkHtSkx1sVjwLbLxZ3xhqlVcK89tKVsm7YPARGA6jqNec7h-BCYMdM8EpqsUgSkWi4nAVNK-blTuacFErdDUxD3Rj00T5iL2JELJtFg8X0iF91RZERbU18klGsSKFygSfTzY99fk_1WJ6-1w3rvcD6RrllU4_4lY_jbsi8NvAAAA__-mjpBM) has undergone significant changes, with multiple ownership transitions and each of its four locations adopting a new name. The first location in Bellville, which owners Suad Hamedah and Iyad Abuelhawa [rebranded](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OnDAURJ_GdCDfa4OhcJGGbtOmRP65LJYMRrZZdt8-2uQRvm6K0czR-fNYHibEcDx_m510fa9pOegukWqlvGzpoM-Zk79cDem4zuK2lGJxC3LsW4AWxeJNiJ9FNl5b7idoSIMaxDhNqKDZtHUSe7M64UGCpWEUCrnqlUDbW7lSE_R3DAAFIAeAjivoV7vafrIGnUUmOflQU-7qRpXepqzxk16UO5f2Juqt1rMw8YvhzHC-77s7M5WSyfj_HYbzVQzD2VylhqM1O-XgzNGWaiqV3RwM5y8EH0F94whyGuSAQsmR903W_rxDjKEMikn-3E2I_77rz4y9NP4NAAD__xFLfoE) to Trump Cafe in 2016, was sold last year and is now called President Burger. The Flatonia location, now called MAGA Burger, is tied up in an ownership dispute between Roland Beainy, a Lebanese immigrant detained by ICE for overstaying his visa, and Abuelhawa. It is unclear who owns the [Houston location](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOrDAQRL8GMpC7eRgCBzchm5tuiPxoBmuNjUwzzPz9iv2FTaukUp3z9Zgf2gcfn__1RorfS5ojXUcgZsrzmiJ99pzcadmneO6HXVMKh51RYFcBVNjMTvvwmdvSKSPcCCUpkH0zjCNKKFdFi3GopWnaXssOaIHBOSEbtOPSkZWlV_cYADaAAgBqIaFbzGK60Wi0BotWkPOccs0rMb31sYRPelGubdrKoFbm_SiafwVOBU7XddU-OtopOopc21Sf3wVON9ZdpxxcgZPeKHur74jzue2VOfOTcpXpYH1mHbnylqqsvasMDt3Qj6JeeQtlVm6_fAj-6GXRiuemffh9wn_z91L4EwAA__9Nh4dY), which is preparing to reopen as Empire Pizza after closing last month. Earlier this year, the Trump Organization reportedly sent cease-and-desist letters to the chain, claiming its former name was [trademark infringement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DvOpDAQBODTmAzkbvMMHGxCNptuiPxoD5YMRrYZhtuv-K_w56UqffXvtbyUD35__1UbyfJ1cdnpyoFKobSscaf7SNGepvi4n0c2a4whmwU5djVAjWKxyod7aSsrNbcTVCRh6MU4TThAtUouejf2ahJCWaCRRtBaGUdjh3xoram8fMoAUAByAGj4AJ3TTneTVmg0spaT9SWmpqxU6KuyC3f8UGpM3Kog11KOzMQfhjPD-bquxqn7AZh47uVOZGKyT5bh_OAYziWd21HrM70p1WZVfq9p0yn6QLYO6sqnL7lK0h6XD8HnfmAtf2_Kh5_N8runPhL_BwAA___LCYGR).
| _Flying together with our sponsor_ [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GuzFcrspYUGwysZtttyQI15EExADOz9tv3FfY9svJOSffz13fjQ9-e3ybSKq-l6Q3epVAtVLWa9ros-fkDlt92o692DWlUKwWXPQXgItA7YwPH901Ts3cjdCQAjngdRyFhGZVOLpBGonkJO8dkutnM-Li-IB2tJ1tvDrLAASC4ADQcgn9Mi9zP85G2FmwjpPzNeW2rlTpbcoSPulJubUpNkGtte6F4RcTExNTIXtkauN5_QwwMe355NLBIA0HunKGk9nfBhnegAMyMRw16kjOH5HhjaLxocnK7S8fgi-DZB1_nPBvsf7P01OJ3wAAAP__UOF7zg) **Long-term care isn’t always fully covered by Medicare.** Nearly half of Americans over 65 will eventually need some form of long-term care—from help with dressing and meal prep to full-time nursing support. But here’s the catch: Medicare and Medigap usually don’t cover these costs unless tied to medical treatment. [That means many people end up paying for in-home assistance or nursing care out of pocket](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GuzFcrspYUGwysZtttyQI15EExADOz9tv3FfY9svJOSffz13fjQ9-e3ybSKq-l6Q3epVAtVLWa9ros-fkDlt92o692DWlUKwWXPQXgItA7YwPH901Ts3cjdCQAjngdRyFhGZVOLpBGonkJO8dkutnM-Li-IB2tJ1tvDrLAASC4ADQcgn9Mi9zP85G2FmwjpPzNeW2rlTpbcoSPulJubUpNkGtte6F4RcTExNTIXtkauN5_QwwMe355NLBIA0HunKGk9nfBhnegAMyMRw16kjOH5HhjaLxocnK7S8fgi-DZB1_nPBvsf7P01OJ3wAAAP__UOF7zg), and those bills can add up fast. Here’s what you can do:
* Look into long-term care insurance: It can help cover daily assistance costs that Medicare won’t.
* Plan early: The younger and healthier you are when you apply, the lower your premiums tend to be.
* [Review hybrid life insurance options](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GuzFcrspYUGwysZtttyQI15EExADOz9tv3FfY9svJOSffz13fjQ9-e3ybSKq-l6Q3epVAtVLWa9ros-fkDlt92o692DWlUKwWXPQXgItA7YwPH901Ts3cjdCQAjngdRyFhGZVOLpBGonkJO8dkutnM-Li-IB2tJ1tvDrLAASC4ADQcgn9Mi9zP85G2FmwjpPzNeW2rlTpbcoSPulJubUpNkGtte6F4RcTExNTIXtkauN5_QwwMe355NLBIA0HunKGk9nfBhnegAMyMRw16kjOH5HhjaLxocnK7S8fgi-DZB1_nPBvsf7P01OJ3wAAAP__UOF7zg): Some policies now include long-term care benefits.

Medicare’s annual enrollment period for 2026 [closes on Dec. 7](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GuzFcrspYUGwysZtttyQI15EExADOz9tv3FfY9svJOSffz13fjQ9-e3ybSKq-l6Q3epVAtVLWa9ros-fkDlt92o692DWlUKwWXPQXgItA7YwPH901Ts3cjdCQAjngdRyFhGZVOLpBGonkJO8dkutnM-Li-IB2tJ1tvDrLAASC4ADQcgn9Mi9zP85G2FmwjpPzNeW2rlTpbcoSPulJubUpNkGtte6F4RcTExNTIXtkauN5_QwwMe355NLBIA0HunKGk9nfBhnegAMyMRw16kjOH5HhjaLxocnK7S8fgi-DZB1_nPBvsf7P01OJ3wAAAP__UOF7zg), so make sure you explore the options you need to protect your health and finances for the years ahead. That means you could face out-of-pocket expenses for in-home care or nursing facilities, which can quickly add up. As Medicare’s annual enrollment period for 2026 approaches (ending Dec. 7), [it’s a good time to review your coverage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GuzFcrspYUGwysZtttyQI15EExADOz9tv3FfY9svJOSffz13fjQ9-e3ybSKq-l6Q3epVAtVLWa9ros-fkDlt92o692DWlUKwWXPQXgItA7YwPH901Ts3cjdCQAjngdRyFhGZVOLpBGonkJO8dkutnM-Li-IB2tJ1tvDrLAASC4ADQcgn9Mi9zP85G2FmwjpPzNeW2rlTpbcoSPulJubUpNkGtte6F4RcTExNTIXtkauN5_QwwMe355NLBIA0HunKGk9nfBhnegAMyMRw16kjOH5HhjaLxocnK7S8fgi-DZB1_nPBvsf7P01OJ3wAAAP__UOF7zg) and explore long-term care insurance options that can help safeguard your health and your finances. Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas Honey Production Up Texas beekeepers produced more than 4 million pounds of honey this season, marking a from lower outputs in recent years. At an average market price of $2.24 a pound, this season's honey production is worth nearly $9 million. Texas A&M AgriLife attributes this season's output to after above-average rains in spring and early summer. The average colony produced 46 pounds of honey. Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller also credited pesticide regulators for working with farmers to foster conditions where bees can thrive. "There 's nothing sweeter than a Texas comeback, and this year's honey harvest proves it," . While output is up, beekeepers still lost about 50% of hives this season, largely due to infestations of the parasitic Varroa mite, which has developed resistance to the chemical used to kill it. Search Warrant Interrupts Funeral A service at a Houston funeral home was when police showed up with a search warrant to investigate allegations of identity theft. Clients of A Community Funeral Home say their deceased loved one's credit cards and financial accounts were accessed. During the investigation, police discovered the funeral home's license in 2022. Unique Mica Green, the 45-year-old president of the funeral home, was arrested on a earlier this month. Police confiscated several boxes of financial records and a dozen cremated remains on Friday. Taysha Rhodes, a former client of the funeral home, told a local news outlet she has been trying to retrieve her uncle's cremated remains for two years. "My uncle deserves more. He deserves to be at his final resting place with his family ," she said. Trump Burger Restaurants Renamed The Texas chain of restaurants has undergone significant changes, with multiple ownership transitions and each of its four locations adopting a new name. The first location in Bellville, which owners Suad Hamedah and Iyad Abuelhawa to Trump Cafe in 2016, was sold last year and is now called President Burger. The Flatonia location, now called MAGA Burger, is tied up in an ownership dispute between Roland Beainy, a Lebanese immigrant detained by ICE for overstaying his visa, and Abuelhawa. It is unclear who owns the , which is preparing to reopen as Empire Pizza after closing last month. Earlier this year, the Trump Organization reportedly sent cease-and-desist letters to the chain, claiming its former name was . | Flying together with our sponsor Long-term care isn’t always fully covered by Medicare. Nearly half of Americans over 65 will eventually need some form of long-term care—from help with dressing and meal prep to full-time nursing support. But here’s the catch: Medicare and Medigap usually don’t cover these costs unless tied to medical treatment. , and those bills can add up fast. Here’s what you can do: Look into long-term care insurance: It can help cover daily assistance costs that Medicare won’t. Plan early: The younger and healthier you are when you apply, the lower your premiums tend to be. : Some policies now include long-term care benefits. Medicare’s annual enrollment period for 2026 , so make sure you explore the options you need to protect your health and finances for the years ahead. | ➤ Starbase: A rocket booster exploded during testing at SpaceX's launch site Friday, with the company acknowledging an anomaly and confirming no injuries. () ➤ Dallas: An appeals court overturned a conviction for fentanyl distribution after it confirmed only 11 jurors were seated in the April 2024 trial of 33-year-old Richard Leal. () ➤ Travis County: Authorization for Texas' $3 billion Dementia Prevention and Research Institute was suspended after three voters sued, alleging some machines used in the Nov. 4 election lacked required federal certification. () ➤ Houston: Emmanuel Gonzalez-Garcia, an autistic 15-year-old without legal residency, was released from the Office of Refugee Resettlement on Friday after a federal judge determined he was not an unaccompanied minor. He was detained for 48 days. () ➤ Austin ISD: The board of trustees approved closing 10 schools to address a $100 million shortfall, including Bedichek Middle School, which appeared in Matthew McConaughey's 1993 film Dazed and Confused. () ➤ Dallas: The owners of a bar called The Libertine are mourning the death of a two-year-old cat named "Tilt" who lived at the business and was beloved by staff and patrons. "Not having him really is a huge change for us ," bartender Kayla Hutnik said. () ➤ A University of Houston student sued the school for $10 million, alleging he was hospitalized for four days after abusive hazing by members of the now-disbanded Pi Kappa Phi chapter. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: 2026 Campaign Update
body:
We are closing the gap to FLIP NEW YORK!

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, it’s time to Save New York!
Since I launched my campaign earlier this month I have been crisscrossing the Empire State from Buffalo to Long Island and from NYC to the beautiful North Country I call home. In every coroner of this great state New Yorkers have made one thing clear; **they are ready for new leadership!**
For almost two decades New York has suffered the consequences of nearly unchecked single party Democrat control and the results have been disastrous. Thanks to failed Democrat policies **New York has become one of the most**** _unaffordable_****and**** _unsafe_****states in the nation.**
We need a leader now to fight to restore New York more than ever but unfortunately we are currently led by accidental Governor Kathy Hochul, the WORST governor in America.
Despite an affordability crisis in NY, Governor Hochul is **RAISING TAXES** on hard-working families and supporting policies that are surging the cost of rent, utilities, and groceries just as the state is recovering from the pandemic lockdowns.
In the face of a crime wave from violent illegals along with a mental health crisis **she cemented New York as a sanctuary state and embraced failed bail reform.**
And when New Yorkers looked to her for leadership to be a check on the Radical Leftists taking over her party **she bent the knee to Zohran Mamdani and helped him be elected mayor of our nation’s largest city!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Governor Hochul at a rally in Queens for Zohran Mamdani’s mayoral campaign where she responded to chants of “TAX THE RICH!” with “I hear you!”_

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Zohran Mamdani is a communist who wants to defund the police and raise taxes on “whiter” neighborhoods to pay for his socialist projects. That is who Kathy Hochul just helped get elected Mayor of NYC.
Enough is enough!
I will not stand by as Kathy Hochul and Zohran Mamdani team up to send the Empire State into freefall.
**_[I am running for governor to SAVE NEW YORK from Hochul and Mamdani](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****!**
As the strongest voice for America First values in the state, I have fought hard to deliver the largest middle-class tax cut in New York’s history and pass legislation that lays the groundwork to undo cashless bail for violent criminals and make our nation safer.
And with your help I plan to FIRE KATHY HOCHUL next year!

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I know that we can win this race by assembling a broad coalition of common sense patriots.

In 2022, Lee Zeldin came within six points of becoming the governor of New York.

In 2024, New York swung more towards President Trump and the Republican Party than any other state in the Union.

And now just a few weeks into our race I am already neck and neck with Kathy Hochul with the most recent polling showing that independents are leaning towards voting Republican and revealing that **New York is now a TOSS-UP!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_J.L Partners poll conducted in November showing that the NY gubernatorial race is currently within the margin of error._

[HELP ELISE CLOSE THE GAP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, it is crucial now that we continue to fight and keep up our current momentum.
As the gap continues to close Democrats across the country are increasingly being called upon to save Hochul in order to keep the state blue.

I need all the support I can get to make sure that we have the resources needed to turn out our voters and hold the line across the state.**__**
**__**
**_[So please, if you can, make a contribution today to help me make New York affordable and safe again](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.******
****I am humbled by the number of personal endorsements that I have already received and the outpouring of support so far from Americans across the county like you who remain committed to restoring our nation.
Thank you in advance for your time and continued support.

**Let’s SAVE NEW YORK!**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrD/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDExOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| Hey Peter, Early in my career, Bernie Sanders gave me a piece of advice I’ve never forgotten. He said, “In politics, people succeed either by being really good at lying or really good at telling the truth. You strike me as someone who’s not good at lying — so your job is to get really good at telling the truth.” So today, I’m going to tell you some truths about our campaign. We’re just two points behind the AIPAC-backed candidate. We have the momentum to win. This is, no exaggeration, a make-or-break moment for our campaign. We need to raise as much as we can to prove that our campaign — one that rejects AIPAC and corporate PAC money — has enough resources to take on the establishment and win. Finally, one more piece of truth: I don’t love asking people for money. But because this is a 100% people-powered campaign, I’m relying on folks like you who care about the future of our party and our country to pitch in. [If you can contribute to support our campaign and Blue Amp Action, it would mean the world:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T532fce57-c0fc-44af-967a-b5c21c740526/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdef00821-a527-4d00-a4d5-e6236c089351/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m looking for Peter!
body:
Keep this between us...

| | | | Hey Peter, it's Marsha Blackburn.
I’m sharing this with you because I know you are a solid America First patriot.
My team was just reviewing the list of dedicated patriots who have completed the Official Trump Voter Profile, and your name was NOWHERE to be found.
Now, I know you're a loyal champion of our America First agenda, so I'm willing to give you the benefit of the doubt.
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[I’ve decided to reopen this secure link to give you an opportunity to complete your profile before 11:59 PM TONIGHT!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
Not everyone is getting this second chance, so make sure not to waste it. I really look forward to seeing your name on that list when we check tomorrow morning!OFFICIAL TRUMP VOTER PROFILEPeter’s Status: INCOMPLETEDue: 11:59 PM TONIGHT[ACCESS AND COMPLETE YOUR PROFILE NOW >>>

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

A Humanoid Robot You Have to See to Believe

At CES, Nvidia’s CEO dropped a bombshell:
“This is the ChatGPT moment for robotics.”
| [ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=88877c24ba394622b05983c72fedae48&_e=hKiX_HHcrv4GeABle1Jq8BHM0pokonxhPnRyKFOKAr4-03pv2Q-OEoJeQzB_xn8iguz4MQlQIIeVqEwaRlS1GkT8O94jWi4kaVWB902ULxoUgnuj_3nMkPxUGZzBUbJxOfKtJDdbcu0U1pR1USEjQIdjp0bQe9OjW-TxITfyt49xqkHMs2NkU_v5Oe1LYU4louP--BFHORKN9yAkUzuSfzbhnlRiB1pKdYi_J2F6mrgf5JHnJOOyRHYiWIVCjev806aYrSY1-BgO2_smEyKDEEcm4oKX_BLDYlU-xseSYvrAZhfnJz6nDwlaXxiN27Gm5_x-WGiVgco5VgUSUm4Dn1kskkmvldq6Gi4gD0MA6Fi4gjjudgNSG9OrVuDogtVaK8d2FRXxrNz_CyUVGxRItyMkTcoyoxTgjkx2vCiWG874okpkUppTOQSY104Cn3AQryIG7ZrhvoYH06f5v1kumkynpiJeVDVaFLwVdsfybz5VOEaHpmsX6glTe1Uh6tAqx-P72n-IWBIb3JSa_leRg9jtZAt_h6zQRHIdSHN5-VIvXC0znTCfAS4aru4daHTdU6K8ZDWysGIqQUTdqq3cEg%3D%3D)
---
What followed stunned even seasoned analysts.A humanoid robot—powered by advanced AI—demonstrated real-world tasks with shocking precision.

The footage? Real. Eye-opening. Rapidly evolving.

**Behind this leap:** a little-known $7 company helping build the systems powering this movement.

And here is a recently released a special briefing on a company they believe deserves a closer look in this fast-moving sector.

This isn’t sci-fi. It’s a milestone in the evolution of robotics.
| [ Watch the demo + access the analyst report ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=88877c24ba394622b05983c72fedae48&_e=hKiX_HHcrv4GeABle1Jq8BHM0pokonxhPnRyKFOKAr4-03pv2Q-OEoJeQzB_xn8iguz4MQlQIIeVqEwaRlS1GkT8O94jWi4kaVWB902ULxoUgnuj_3nMkPxUGZzBUbJxOfKtJDdbcu0U1pR1USEjQIdjp0bQe9OjW-TxITfyt49xqkHMs2NkU_v5Oe1LYU4lj1z4fH2zhEymTUMLnfGZHLMaTaD9ObOIMtO2THJc-0iXrL25bCZ-73UJGRLG-jcAA0J5VdFmfqq3tVLoB_UjRqjGi9eZuVQm0kw5dQnjryWTGiSv61_iMFUGm3BdBTURU2Wy5FXRHLtbOEHmsJ4EYcfhWx0IanDLSAnsFiA_5e1f747v-h6X3uJwyYptVeJgT7O_53BtN46_3tEDjhvbLEb95fQz4jwNSGDb5s96Z3TJAqqbW2JZH8PIjVaLCVvNXh-Sfo_9WPHIQueWcpEw1YiNoLgyt_nDCmKNe3GWVGmjhpo7_oJxnJgCPNSAixXcop9vYe-Goy6r6oiMXJn-KLJxRTJwNbOk0RXm-ka_vpTrEeIAtwDUS2YnelLierVteG1wJ3dcJGLWbu7zuF9Wgg%3D%3D)
---
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

When I stare down radical leftists, my message is clear

Dear Peter,
**_I'll never apologize for loving America._**

When I stare down radical leftists, my message is clear: this is the greatest nation on Earth, and I'll defend it with every breath.

When I signed up to serve in the Air Force, it was because I knew this was the **GREATEST** country on Earth and I would lay down my life for it.

But Democrats? They can't stop spewing their lies about how “terrible” our country is.
_**I've had it.**_

I **FLIPPED** my district in 2022 and Democrats will stop at nothing to get it back.

Radical Democrats are pouring **MILLIONS** into defeating me — but with your help, we’ll stop them cold and crush their plan.
Your hard work has paid off tremendously, but truth be told we aren’t out of the woods yet.

With midterms approaching, the Left has upped their attacks against the **MAGA** movement to a truly ungodly level!

I’m not the type of person to back down from a fight, but this is a battle I can’t win on my own.

body:
Trump’s cuts could disenfranchise voters as soon as NEXT YEAR.
| **__BREAKING:__**
**Trump’s Proposed USPS Cuts and Office Closures Could Disenfranchise Mail-In Voters as Soon as 2026** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA) | [**Do you APPROVE of your local Post Office?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA) | [I APPROVE OF MY LOCAL POST OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA)

**__HERE’S THE TERRIFYING NEWS:__**
Trump wants to GUT the Postal Service, a critical institution that millions rely on for absentee ballots, bills, medication, Social Security checks, and more!

**__BUT HERE’S THE GOOD NEWS:__**
If Americans step up in DROVES in defense of the Postal Service, we won’t let Trump get away with his vile plot.

**_Don’t let Trump go after your local Post Office next!!_**
[**30 MORE RESPONSES NEEDED FROM YOUR CITY:
Do you APPROVE of your local Post Office?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=11&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=12&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA) | [I APPROVE OF MY LOCAL POST OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PostOfficePoll/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&t=13&akid=21976%2E878179%2EJ4jYfA)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8) WOW, TEAM: [ Robert Reich is laying down the hammer on the Electoral College!!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=3&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=4&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8) **Robert Reich is spot on:** Donald Trump would NEVER have won in 2016 if it weren’t for the Electoral College. [**So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to FORCE Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=5&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8) | [ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=6&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8)
---
Team, Republicans have only won the popular vote TWICE since 1988.

Yet, they’ve captured the presidency FOUR times, all thanks to the outdated Electoral College. [_**It’s completely undemocratic and fundamentally unfair!**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=7&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8)

THANKFULLY, Democrats have introduced a Constitutional Amendment to finally ABOLISH the Electoral College.

But here’s the truth: it can’t pass without a massive wave of grassroots support. [If we don’t reach our signature goal by midnight, this amendment could fail!!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=8&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8)
[ **So please: We still need 13,284 signatures from your state to hit our goal by midnight. Team, can you sign on IMMEDIATELY?? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=9&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8)
[ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70231?t=10&akid=23653%2E4449941%2EaexWp8)
---
We knew we could count on you.

name: Team Walz
subject: She’s already seeking Trump’s endorsement...
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
We have to be ready to act fast and keep Tim’s campaign strong.
#
Peter, in case you missed it, MAGA extremist and Minnesota House Speaker Lisa Demuth announced her campaign for governor this month.
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/134?t=1&akid=148%2E34582%2EkP-_3z)
**[Will you rush a donation now to make sure we have the resources to stop her?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251123_1.dkYagy&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-148&t=2&akid=148%2E34582%2EkP-_3z)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251123_1.dkYagy&amount=5&refcode=20251123-148&t=3&akid=148%2E34582%2EkP-_3z)**
If Demuth becomes the Republican nominee and wins this race, it would devastate so much of the progress we’ve made under Tim’s leadership.
**Her far-right agenda would raise costs, underfund our schools, and ban abortion — and she already said she’ll seek the endorsement of Donald Trump.**
This isn’t some random candidate out of left field, Peter: she’s the highest-ranking Republican in our state legislature. Republicans could consolidate support around her and spend big money to help her unseat Tim.
If we’re going to keep the MAGA agenda out of the governor’s office and keep putting Minnesota values first, we have to be ready to act fast and keep our campaign strong over the course of this next year, no matter what comes our way.
**[We’re counting on grassroots support to be the difference maker in this race. If you have Tim’s back, chip in $5 today to help us reach the voters we’ll need to win next November.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251123_1.dkYagy&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-148&t=4&akid=148%2E34582%2EkP-_3z)**

Team Walz

name: Roy Cooper
subject: An investment now can go even further.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Is there any amount you can give?
Peter, I know better than anyone how difficult it is to win as a Democrat in North Carolina, and how hard we’ll have to work to succeed in this toss-up U.S. Senate race.
I also know that _early investment goes further._ That’s one rule of campaigning that never seems to change.
**With my opponent gaining in the polls, it’s more important than ever that we can stay competitive.** The earlier funds come in, the earlier we can plan our campaign expenses for the months ahead. That makes our efforts all the more effective, so I’m asking for your help today, so please don’t put it off.
**[Any contribution you could split between our campaign and Heartland Patriots would go a long way to meeting our fundraising goal. Just click here to give.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97854?refcode=em20251123-9744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9744%2E614464%2EE0P8Pr)**

---
It’s no secret that national Republicans see me as the greatest threat to their control in Washington, plus that GOP lawmakers in Raleigh have taken steps to make it harder for Democrats to win here.
We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive.
Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a _billion_ dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use.
**[Winning this toss-up race won’t be easy, but I know that we can do it — especially if we’re able to make the most of these early days. subject: Elissa Slotkin responds to President Trump’s death threats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
President Trump's threats have real world consequences

Derek, We're writing to share a short clip from Elissa Slotkin on Chris Hayes show last night, discussing President Trump's threats on Thursday to arrest, prosecute, and hang her. [_**But before we do we're asking all supporters if they are able to make a small but meaningful donation to stand with Elissa and Chris Deluzio today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119831182/584373228/260332239?refcode=email_112325_slotkin-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzY0MTgxYi03ZGM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPrqii8t9cXjN6e89UupPsrSSyHLn2mLpudjEscnOgg=#) President Trump's threats have real world consequences. Immediately after his tweetstorm, Elissa received a tidal wave of death threats, and she is now under 24 hour security protection. But, to Elissa, this story isn't about her -- it's about all of us. It's about America. President Trump wants to use fear as a weapon to silence those who disagree with him. But we know that's contrary to what's made America an exceptional nation. And nothing will stop Elissa from standing up and speaking out to protect the country we all love. | After a landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election earlier this month, Defend Our Courts is already getting back to work.
Why?
Because in 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states--Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BA_SjqevurNTqoe_dbhbFoD1zgfZWdPa9GBRuvosKHTYZsPUymBcuWe9Oz5cZnL1lFmqvQzVH0sfdgQ-YASB_S8xUQQZJXyft4EoylH_pw_9CDTev-_uLxD4ugoBoLKgxCbaP114IlXt0tO2XCkp6z8Eij2i6cXC4ABkja0RU6f9w8htx7gy_jhsBAWIevuEs_5UT_7Atb9nsPHITlPKTacOROX_hJa0&c=Qu98EHWllQH-p2ZoTm7pUDTH0MdmRyaTlGTRSDDZrd2CKnknk3qjvg==&ch=7IbTkNrdHwD4EnVf7fSD1fjzVqNHXKj0ihNhmbFWy99fNGSBO8owYQ==)
---
The stakes will be the same as PA for these elections--MAGA seizing control of these courts will give them control over election laws in each respective state, allowing them to issue decisions that could suppress Dem votes, and tilt the odds in MAGA's favor in future elections. This would all but make the Democrats path back to the White House impossible in 2028.
So our team is already looking ahead, crunching the numbers and identifying the Democrats that we need to turn out in each of these states to prevent a MAGA takeover.
But we haven't fully turned the page on PA despite our best efforts--we spent every last penny we had to fuel Tuesday's massive blowout victory. We have bills and staff to be paid first before we can go full steam ahead in AZ, GA, and MI.
We know we've asked a lot of you recently, and we wouldn't have had the success we did without your support. But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26.
[So we're asking you today: Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team, close the books on PA, and move on to leading the defense of courts in GA, AZ, and MI?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BA_SjqevurNTqoe_dbhbFoD1zgfZWdPa9GBRuvosKHTYZsPUymBcuWe9Oz5cZnL1lFmqvQzVH0sfdgQ-YASB_S8xUQQZJXyft4EoylH_pw_9CDTev-_uLxD4ugoBoLKgxCbaP114IlXt0tO2XCkp6z8Eij2i6cXC4ABkja0RU6f9w8htx7gy_jhsBAWIevuEs_5UT_7Atb8BAGX3YEzv-qoq4j_lUcIW&c=Qu98EHWllQH-p2ZoTm7pUDTH0MdmRyaTlGTRSDDZrd2CKnknk3qjvg==&ch=7IbTkNrdHwD4EnVf7fSD1fjzVqNHXKj0ihNhmbFWy99fNGSBO8owYQ==)

# IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |
From broken glass at party headquarters to a suspected terrorist slipping through Pennsylvania’s licensing system, this week’s Sunday Bulletin uncovers the crime, politics, and drama reshaping our region:
**INVESTIGATIVE** : How did an Uzbek national with alleged terrorist ties secure a Pennsylvania commercial driver’s license and Real ID? Our deep dive exposes the federal lapses, state oversights, and political firestorm erupting in the wake of his arrest.
**REGIONAL NEWS** : A school-threat suspect walks back her plea and demands a trial; a rifle round tears through two Horsham apartments; Abington police seize drugs, cash, and a firearm after a car goes airborne; North Wildwood takes NJDEP to court over beach replenishment; and investigators probe shattered glass at Delco GOP headquarters.
**SPORTS** : The Flyers crank up the intensity with small-ice battle drills as Rick Tocchet looks to reset the roster’s edge — while across town, the Union place sporting director Ernst Tanner on leave after explosive allegations trigger an MLS reinvestigation.
**POLITICS** : Governor Shapiro’s office is fighting in court to keep documents sealed in the sexual-harassment scandal involving his top aide — as judges, watchdogs, and open-records advocates sharpen their scrutiny over what the administration knew and when.
**EDITORIAL** : From Philly’s ongoing fight over whether City Council members should quit to run for higher office, to the collapse of once-celebrated school district rankings in Wissahickon, our editors cut through spin to illuminate the policies failing citizens.
---
| [Read These Articles HERE](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=86cfd7ff8b&e=b7b3eddce2)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: a broken leg and 3 options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
A few years ago, while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a bit of a tumble.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)
A few years ago, while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took _a bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter,
* take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down,
* or hike down myself.

**I chose to walk back down the mountain** , because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. **Donald Trump has made it clear he intends to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. **[If you’re with me, will you donate $5 to support our campaign?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251123_1_brokenleg.flj-of&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-5828&t=2&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251123_1_brokenleg.flj-of&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-5828&t=21&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)**
As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation.**
[**New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights that lie ahead. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please chip in $5 if you can afford it today.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251123_1_brokenleg.flj-of&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-5828&t=22&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251123-1&t=23&refcode2=5828_400544_UvU2mZ&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=24&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=25&akid=5828%2E400544%2EUvU2mZ)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options: Get airlifted down in a helicopter, take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down, or hike down myself. I chose to walk back down the mountain , because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time. The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. Donald Trump has made it clear he intends to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil. As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them. But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation. Be fierce, Deb

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1347%2E251025%2EyOxCDA ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1347%2E251025%2EyOxCDA ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

I sat down with journalist Mehdi Hasan recently for a conversation about
foreign policy and what it means to stand on principle, even when groups
like AIPAC will target you for saying it.

[ Abdul ]Abdul and Mehdi talking

During our discussion, he asked me:

“Do you recognize Israel’s right to exist as a Jewish state?”

Mehdi wasn’t asking this to corner me — he was asking the question because
we both know exactly how it’s used to trap candidates into endorsing an
unequal standard.

I highlighted the hypocrisy of that question.

Why is it that no one ever asks whether Palestine has a right to exist?

Instead, why don’t we ask our elected officials why our government
continues to aid and arm foreign militaries committing genocide and other
vicious acts overseas?

Peter, I grew
up spending summers in Egypt, a country that receives billions in U.S.
military aid every year.

I’ve seen firsthand what that money does. It doesn’t make people freer or
safer. It cements the power of dictatorships and deepens inequality.

That’s why my position is simple: Under no condition should we be sending
taxpayer dollars that should be invested in our kids' schools, healthcare,
or clean water to a foreign military to buy tanks.

It’s not about left or right. It’s about speaking with moral clarity.

Every dollar we send to fund war abroad is a dollar not spent to improve
life here at home.

I know that’s wrong. You know that’s wrong. People of all political
backgrounds can agree that sending taxpayer money overseas to fund wars is
wrong.

Yet it continues because the old guard in Washington accepts money from
AIPAC and defense PACs in exchange for votes to keep the money flowing
overseas.

It’s a broken system, and I’m fighting to change it. But I can’t take them
on alone.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251123-1-ak.Y3zn-C&amount=10&refcode=em20251123-1335&t=1004&akid=1347%2E251025%2EyOxCDA ]If you agree that we need leaders willing to tell the truth and fight
for a foreign policy rooted in peace and justice, I’m asking for your
support today:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251123-1-ak.Y3zn-C&amount=10&refcode=em20251123-1335&t=1023&akid=1347%2E251025%2EyOxCDA ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1347%2E251025%2EyOxCDA
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1347%2E251025%2EyOxCDA

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Would this be worth $5?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If we told you that $5 could win back the House and Senate, wouldn’t you chip in right away?
#
Peter,
If we told you that $5 could help elect Veterans around the country, would you donate?
How about this: If we told you that $5 could win back the House and Senate, wouldn’t you chip in right away?
What if that $5 could put a real check on Trump and stop him from destroying our democracy? Wouldn’t that be the best $5 you ever spent?
You might not think one $5 donation could do those things, and you’d be right. But it isn’t just your $5 — it could be hundreds, thousands, tens of thousands of people donating right alongside you. That has to start with someone, though.
And we’re hoping that someone is you.
[**So, please. Make that $5 donation to VoteVets. It adds up fast when everyone does their part.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.pScLIv&refcode=em251123-1-120&t=1&akid=34780%2E3013755%2EGvGLaE)

subject: Friend, Good morning!

It's Trump... I'm thankful for you! That's why I got a Thanksgiving Gift for you.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

# **FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP:**
#

Good morning,

It’s the Sunday before Thanksgiving — wow, there’s so much to be thankful for this year.

Please listen up, if you read my special memo all the way to the end, I’ve got a special Thanksgiving gift for you!

**#1** I’m thankful for your support everyday! Seriously, you helped me get elected and your responses to my polls are truly making America greater than ever before!

**#2** I’m thankful that you stood by my side when they took my mugshot, threw me in court, and when they tried to assassinate me.

**#3** I’m thankful that we’re making America mighty, strong, and powerful again by PEACE through STRENGTH!

But there’s one thing I know I’m not thankful for...that radical communist that was elected as NYC mayor! We must stop the terrible disease of communism from spreading — that’s why I need you on my **_[ANTI-COMMUNIST ROSTER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_** now!

**_[If you join within the next 4 hours, I’ll be so enthusiastic that I’ll even give you a special THANKSGIVING GIFT from the Trump archives: the one and only Never Surrender Pin!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[JOIN ANTI-COMMUNIST ROSTER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: GIFFORDS
subject: From the Washington Post
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We never could have imagined this...
#

Dear Friends,
When GIFFORDS was founded nearly 13 years ago, we never could have imagined seeing a headline like this:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251123-1-b&t=1&akid=11055%2E3935704%2ExZQwtG)
This story from the Washington Post is a direct result of the work we’ve done to challenge the gun lobby. It shows that our vision of a future free from gun violence is resonating with folks across the nation over the NRA’s fear tactics — so much so that the NRA is scrambling to adjust its strategy.
This is all thanks to people like you. The people who dare to hope for a better future in our country — a future where our communities are safe from the threat of gun violence.
Although NRA membership is at record lows, it doesn’t mean we can slow down on our work to end gun violence. In fact, it’s a sign that we must pick up the pace — especially before the 2026 elections.
The NRA’s hold on our political system won’t disappear overnight. Too many politicians still care more about NRA campaign contributions than public safety. We must keep fighting.
[**Will you chip in to power our work at GIFFORDS PAC? 100% of your contributions will help us stand up to the gun lobby’s grip in our politics and save more lives from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251123-1-b&t=2&akid=11055%2E3935704%2ExZQwtG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
Thank you. Let’s finish the fight together.
— The GIFFORDS Team

**Folks, please take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.

Fellow patriot,

I want you to see exactly what the Left is saying right now.

They’re _celebrating_.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3803402ec7514036addde00140ddf574&_e=LBEZ07Ja6RtmY8-yxGc31JFumkr6pOoIUjkgfYT2dvY1ntIoVB5VjMupb_JDOSaBHOkAhiqInS5BwOUao9ScjssQsW9REssAguQDQZ9xzE3LulY1POvfEKoSURB7b3zr0zsGlBBfZMUlzr94qbqRtQi-iH_NxbjPz-Stmxiyz-IUB6Hml-5J6RliDhzhg6_DIUAGTtrQ-CnNYa9mjzYaz0xjExD_GCw--3zbUqEbfvqrqemSrWycvPdGlPauhxIcx13eMbdR8aU0ovK5lzXDSRwyV1rbVLx-8TIVbQnaxZtrpAnfPWLVdVIQVmoqU4PFOONrcE_T63IC7KhNx_iqD3QNZWqnWXarguaXktJPEPYudea3YSYNdvk642ifdmJnoq8Bk0Ls4gRZJQzHk0sxgKG6x577cvrRLMUqq-M3vM8PxdP0HAwGm95e64Tw7uiC-taSH2uqD8w0VoYX4D82hhlOeYPwpjxXl3qqq4HfPplg5Fe9qIau4A_sEBQA5qAwq63MF_RKfNVKAVsZoRTUBrJT0mcKa8EeULqAlAJ6-1lj4rrtQ7Fcyvs4YyuTwI1SDUV9PqKmFVs2ZEWldpnpmMU_sRME8WJIeFr8rnCjhV5bMQyLNiFQ6TJO9MBu6H1odVUP7yiF2SJlY-gjCfhCA535gB603-r-8eJXzmNDMmgl2NFEbtGwwGen9wI6pBnua4ajLCLJMbGg1uOA-ZkHR6Rrb9plupTY470yqdP-8Zb-_i68Sa0TLISTJk-mq_gkPqOVWQRlhJqLJkECVNaPl8F_sO6svgOMz07tsG7t7TU%3D)

Smug Democrats from California to D.C. — including Gavin “I-Can’t-Run-My-Own-State” Newsom — are piling on X, bragging that “democracy won” because federal judges just blocked Texas’s new congressional map.

They’re popping champagne because Texas voters just got kneecapped.

They think keeping Republicans out of Congress is a **“win.”**

They think silencing Texans is **“democracy.”**

They think Greg Abbott, Donald Trump, and every Republican in this state just “got burned.”

Here’s the truth: this ruling wasn’t about fairness. **It was about weakening Texas conservatives before 2026 — and national Democrats are thrilled because they think this puts the House majority back in their grasp.**

They’re wrong.

Texas doesn’t fold. Texas fights.

clean_body: They’re popping champagne because Texas voters just got kneecapped. | Fellow patriot, I want you to see exactly what the Left is saying right now. They’re celebrating. Smug Democrats from California to D.C. — including Gavin “I-Can’t-Run-My-Own-State” Newsom — are piling on X, bragging that “democracy won” because federal judges just blocked Texas’s new congressional map. They’re popping champagne because Texas voters just got kneecapped. They think keeping Republicans out of Congress is a “win.” They think silencing Texans is “democracy.” They think Greg Abbott, Donald Trump, and every Republican in this state just “got burned.” Here’s the truth: this ruling wasn’t about fairness. It was about weakening Texas conservatives before 2026 — and national Democrats are thrilled because they think this puts the House majority back in their grasp. They’re wrong. Texas doesn’t fold. Texas fights. And if the Left wants to drag our state through the mud and cheer while judges block our map, then I’m going to respond the only way they understand: Let’s show Newsom and the D.C. Left what happens when they bet against Texas. Beth Van Duyne | | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Stand With Bernie: Tell Democrats, Go Big on Health Care NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders just issued a bold challenge to Congressional Democrats: go
big, or go home on health care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34702?source=email-20251123m&t=1011&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Headline: Exclusive: Sanders pushes Senate Dems to go big on health
care deal

Next month, Congress will vote on a health care bill as part of Democrats'
"deal" to end the government shutdown. As negotiations kick into high
gear, Bernie is laying out a clear path forward: reject half-measures that
leave millions behind and EXPAND health care to help the millions of
working families struggling to afford coverage.

Right now, the party has a choice: retreat, or fight – and if all of us
stand with Bernie, we can force their hand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34702?source=email-20251123m&t=1012&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Add your name now and tell Democratic leaders to meet this moment and
pass real, transformative health care reforms. Will you add your name and
stand with Bernie now?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34702?source=email-20251123m&t=1013&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]ADD YOUR NAME

Here’s what’s at stake: if Congress fails to renew the expanded ACA
marketplace subsidies by the end of the year, premiums for millions of
families will **more than double**.

But Bernie isn’t pulling punches. In a letter to colleagues, he pushed
Democrats to go further than extending ACA tax credits – calling on them
to repeal over $1 TRILLION in GOP health care cuts, expand Medicare, and
lower prescription drug prices. We’re talking about real victories for
working people – not crumbs, not watered-down deals, but the fundamental
change Americans deserve.

Democrats have a choice: Stand tall for working people or buckle to
Republican pressure and corporate greed. NOW is the time for Democrats to
push the big demands we need – but they need to hear from all of us.

Our power is in our numbers. If thousands of us stand behind Bernie’s
call, the Democratic establishment will take notice. And that’s the
grassroots power Bernie needs right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34702?source=email-20251123m&t=1014&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Add your name to tell Democrats: No more small asks – stand with Bernie
and deliver big, bold health care wins for all.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34702?source=email-20251123m&t=1015&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]ADD YOUR NAME

We hear it every day: Family members cutting pills to make prescriptions
last, friends skipping checkups because insurance is too expensive, or
parents who lost coverage after a layoff. That’s the reality for millions
– and it’s preventable, but only if Democrats unite and fight.

No one should have to choose between bankruptcy and survival. Let’s seize
this moment and fight for real change now.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Website |

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251123m.O9XcBx&t=1007&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251123m.lPxhK4&t=1008&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251123m.unFG0s&t=1009&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251123m.ucDsWf&t=1010&akid=9887%2E5885482%2Ehmd8PX ]GIVE ONCE

Peter, We're less than 1 year out from the most important Senate race of the 2026 elections, and the stakes could not be clearer: **_We must defend Georgia’s blue Senate seat._** National Republicans see an opening here in the Peach State to maintain their iron grip on power. That’s why they’re gearing up to spend millions of dark-money dollars to confuse Georgians and suppress our votes. We can’t afford two more years of Republicans controlling both chambers of Congress and acting as a rubber-stamp for Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. We’re working around the clock to build the infrastructure to fight back: recruiting volunteers, engaging people at the doors, and mobilizing Georgia Democrats to the polls. But Peter, this race will be close and expensive. We need all the help we can get, and we need it now. | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change.

Peter,

The SEAL creed begins: _**“I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.”**_

I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS.

Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman.

**Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries.**

Places that don’t make the evening news.

I never needed a megaphone.

I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake.

Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,_**in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation.

clean_body: While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020. | Peter, The SEAL creed begins: “I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.” I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS. Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman. Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries. Places that don’t make the evening news. I never needed a megaphone. I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake. Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation. While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020. Rural hospitals in Greater Minnesota are closing. Illegal immigrants with rap sheets walk free because Walz-Flanagan and Ilhan Omar sued to gut ICE detention. My opponent’s loudest moment? Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are. Just this past week, Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, Minnesotan. I don’t advertise. I deliver. The left’s own poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat Republican. That’s the closest any race for this seat has been in over 17 years. The national GOP is watching. My socialist opponent’s record? Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are. Just this past week,Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work. That’s where you come in. Unlike the progressive darling I’m running against, I don’t have any famous backers supporting my campaign, just a hope and a wish that conservative patriots like yourself will see this note and find that I’m worth investing in. Every dollar proves Minnesota is ready for results, not noise. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/822aede9-e966-4b5d-a95d-ebda1940c711?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Turqh0OsWAs2W0zeNrX44raM2Wz6Af0I7eDLaRzIBbg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179730252)
Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson can't be relied on for many things, mainly on the issues of public safety and sensible tax policy. What he can be relied on is always playing the race card and blaming the poor outcome of Democrat policies on President Donald Trump.
This past week was no different in his response to disturbing crimes in Chicago that have made national headlines for all the wrong reasons.
The first is the case of Lawrence Reed, a 50-year-old man who is being hit with terrorism charges at the federal level after he allegedly set a random woman on fire on the city's CTA Blue Line. To say Reed is no stranger to local law enforcement is a gross understatement.
**[According to CWBChicago](https://substack.com/redirect/85f5cd2f-aee1-429e-b26a-524cee4f4ee9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , at the time of the attack, Reed was on pretrial release for allegedly knocking a psychiatric ward social worker unconscious in August. The judge in that case ruled he was too dangerous to be sent back to the psychiatric ward, so she instead released him back into the public with an ankle monitor.
Reed went on to allegedly set a 26-year-old passenger on fire, sending her to the hospital in serious condition. **[Reed is reported as saying,](https://substack.com/redirect/92cd715c-0cc0-4b98-9a29-f95c85644971?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Burn b****!" and "Burn alive b****!"
Not only that, but Reed has 53 criminal cases filed against him in Cook County since 1993, including nine felonies. Out of those many cases, he only went to jail twice.
_**A message from our valued sponsor (Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Home Title Lock](https://substack.com/redirect/67f36c8a-b4d4-408d-a67a-d966458c24c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [Protect Your Home from Title Theft and Fraud](https://substack.com/redirect/67f36c8a-b4d4-408d-a67a-d966458c24c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67f36c8a-b4d4-408d-a67a-d966458c24c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The FBI warns of **a rise in title fraud,** a crime where scammers use forged documents to steal a homeowner's ownership on records, often leaving victims unaware until it is too late.
**Criminals file fraudulent deeds, manipulate public records, and may even impersonate owners to gain control of a home.** If the stolen property is mortgaged or sold, it can create serious financial and legal consequences, including displacement, loss of property, emotional distress, and lengthy battles to reclaim it.
**Title fraud can affect anyone,** regardless of location, property type, or ownership duration. To protect your home and preventing irreversible damage, Homeowners are urged to monitor their records, check local filings, and watch for unexpected correspondence.
**[Beyond monitoring, Home Title Lock provides a comprehensive solution.](https://substack.com/redirect/c61050c9-2207-4846-bf25-c02d5975d4c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Subscribers receive 24/7 monitoring of their title records, urgent alerts of any activity, access to a dedicated team of legal experts who act on their behalf, and full restoration services for properties that fall victim to fraud.
Backed by up to $1 million in restoration protection, Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness--they gain active protection, legal support, and the resources needed to reclaim and secure their property if title fraud occurs.
[Protect your home today](https://substack.com/redirect/c61050c9-2207-4846-bf25-c02d5975d4c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues ...)**_
This suspect is the posterboy for how progressive criminal "justice" policies are anything but and lead to innocent people getting harmed in the process.
**[What did Mayor Johnson have to say about this?](https://substack.com/redirect/38d84855-8981-4a5c-9adf-926712f8fc15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"What I can say is that as awful and as horrific as this tragedy is, this is an isolated incident as we continue to invest more in our public transportation system. We want people to feel safe..."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8bd44191-df41-4ba9-a70b-ef237c62e4c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Remember, if a gang member commits a mass shooting with a gun he is not legally allowed to have, law-abiding citizens have to curtail their Second Amendment rights in order to "save one life." But if the very definition of a career criminal sets a woman on fire on public transportation, whatever, it's not like it happens all the time! (Looking at you, New York City.)
The most recent mass shooting that took place in Chicago occurred on Friday night, where yet another "teen" takeover resulted in mass chaos with two shootings. Seven teenagers ranging in age from 13 to 17 were shot in the first incident and one teenager was killed in the second shooting.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Turqh0OsWAs2W0zeNrX44raM2Wz6Af0I7eDLaRzIBbg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179730252)
"It is quite frankly frustrating, and quite upsetting when this type of violence takes place because it does engender and evoke fear," Johnson in the aftermath. "So we will have a strong police presence. We'll have stronger control over how traffic flows."
**[While this response is better than the CTA arson attack,](https://substack.com/redirect/b2d73acc-295f-4ce3-97af-bef64969c9d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** it is one that Johnson has said before. Temporary changes are made, with shows of force from the police, nothing happens, and then things go back to "normal." No calls for actual measures that would deter young people from using their illegally owned firearms or going wild in planned gatherings.
Remember that Johnson went all out to stop President Donald Trump from deploying the National Guard to help local police crackdown on crime. There was no problem, he and the Democratic governor said.
* * *
