Your support means more than you know. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Can’t be bought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ve won tough fights before, and I’m ready to do it again.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)
**New Hampshire’s not for sale.**
I was born and raised here; it’s where my family’s small business has served the Manchester community for generations. I’ve fought and won in one of the toughest districts in the country — _and I’m ready to take that fight to this Senate race._
**[If you’re with me and ready to prove New Hampshire’s Senate seat can’t be bought by national Republicans, will you make a contribution to my campaign today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251123_1_bought.g9ZlBe&refcode=em20251123-1&t=2&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)**
I’m running for Senate to fight for working people, not the ultrawealthy elite.
My opponent, John Sununu, has spent his career siding with corporate special interests over Granite Staters. He’s voted against lowering drug prices, pushed to privatize Social Security, and tried to restrict abortion access.
**That’s not leadership.** That’s selling out. He’s spent his entire career selling out to right-wing special interests — the same ones that will line up to buy this seat.
But here’s the thing: If we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re handing Republicans control for years to come.
**[So if you’re able, rush a contribution to my campaign today. $10, $25, or whatever you can spare to keep this seat in the hands of the people.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251123_1_bought.g9ZlBe&refcode=em20251123-1&t=3&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251123_1_bought.g9ZlBe&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-1&t=22&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)**
Thanks for helping show New Hampshire can’t and won’t be bought.
— Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251123-1&t=23&refcode2=3652_582294_H9IxAx&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3652%2E582294%2EH9IxAx)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105

* * *
My friend Colin contends that men at 40 either begin to smoke meat or study World War II. I do a little of both, but a 24-hour brisket analogy does not work here, so I'll go with U-Boats.
[Gen. Eisenhower called](https://substack.com/redirect/55eb7dee-2812-403b-acf2-1fafba06c755?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) destroying the German U-Boat campaign "a basic requirement to the winning of the war." The Nazi's knew this, and their U-Boat factories were fortified with 15 to 23 feet thick reinforced concrete and were heavily protected with anti-aircraft defenses. They knew manufacturing U-Boats faster than the allies could find and sink them would continue Nazi domination of the sea.
Combined British and American forces flew thousands of bombing sorties and suffered tremendous casualties trying to destroy these facilities. By 1943 the allies gained the upper hand when U-Boat production fell short of losses. By the time of the D-Day crossings in 1944, the U-Boat threat was neutralized.
This is my strategy for liberalism factories.
* * *
* * *
**[Together with AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/e77d2b98-2ab0-41a9-a3f9-6f03f571a9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Your Complimentary 90-Day AMAC Membership**
America is at a crossroads -- and your voice matters. That's why we're inviting you to try **[AMAC-- The Association of Mature American Citizens -- free for 90 days.](https://substack.com/redirect/e77d2b98-2ab0-41a9-a3f9-6f03f571a9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e77d2b98-2ab0-41a9-a3f9-6f03f571a9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you activate your complimentary membership, you'll receive immediate access to:
* **Exclusive Savings** on travel, insurance, healthcare, and more
* **Trusted Resources** on Medicare, retirement, and Social Security
* **A Voice in Washington** through AMAC Action, our powerful grassroots advocacy arm
* **Community & Fun** with the AMAC Magazine, book club, sweepstakes, and more

No cost. No credit card needed. No obligation. Just 90 days of everything AMAC has to offer -- so you can experience the difference for yourself.
**[[Activate Your Free 90-Day Membership]](https://substack.com/redirect/e77d2b98-2ab0-41a9-a3f9-6f03f571a9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Join today and stand with millions of like-minded Americans fighting to protect faith, family, and freedom.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/e77d2b98-2ab0-41a9-a3f9-6f03f571a9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**P.S.** You'll also start receiving **AMAC Magazine** , the trusted publication conservatives rely on for news and insight you won't find anywhere else.
* * *
* * *
I concluded my previous piece by pointing to "the government. Academia. Liberal philanthropy" as institutions which produce _**The Karen**_ : the liberal, white, outraged, politically over-stimulated and hyper-engaged woman prototype who is destroying the nation. **[(Read that piece first, if you haven't already.)](https://substack.com/redirect/16029c96-ed39-4c1d-abb8-222a245096a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/16029c96-ed39-4c1d-abb8-222a245096a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## [The suicidal empathy of the Liberal "Karen"](https://substack.com/redirect/16029c96-ed39-4c1d-abb8-222a245096a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [The Capitalist](https://substack.com/profile/333697867-the-capitalist)| | *
---|---|---
| Nov 9
[](https://substack.com/redirect/16029c96-ed39-4c1d-abb8-222a245096a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/16029c96-ed39-4c1d-abb8-222a245096a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/16029c96-ed39-4c1d-abb8-222a245096a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
These institutions pump out more than Karens. They produce liberals in general, and faster than Lucille Ball can stuff them down her blouse. We must dismantle and destroy these liberalism factories if we are to survive as a free people.
"Wait... are you comparing higher education and liberal non-profits to Nazis?" Of course not. They are worse.
The Nazis wore different uniforms and made it clear they were our enemy and wanted to kill us. Today's liberal has the same goal but hides amongst us... though increasingly their unofficial uniform of septum ring and blue-dyed hair is a give-away.
We are most clearly at war with the left. Yesterday's skirmishes of privatizing social security or even Roe v. Wade, battle lines of "wear a mask" and "ban gas stoves" have yielded to women like Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez and Rep. Ilhan Omar excusing the murder of Charlie Kirk or Virginia's Attorney General elect Jay Jones wishing a republican wife could watch her children die in her arms... for policy reasons.
Just this week liberal members of Congress made another one of their gay videos- camera facing, overly scripted, quick edited, where they ask the military to defy orders from the Commander-in-Chief.
Trump **[reminded](https://substack.com/redirect/6b205058-3e50-4d3a-8c90-8cbed65c52da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** them sedition is punishable by death. If that alarms them, they do not know their history. General Washington dealt with sedition and mutiny by having the offending soldiers execute their own mutinous officers at point blank range with the entire camp watching.
Yes, we are at an undeclared civil war, and the right has primarily been involved in tactics. What we need is grand strategy. Winning a gubernatorial race or taking control of the House are great little wins... that just prolong the war. I want the war to end, our enemies mercilessly defeated, peace to reign in a new Pax Americana, and to achieve these ends, we need to destroy their factories. I see it as Ike said "a basic requirement to the winning of the war".
So let us do just that.
**1\. The Government**
To be clear, I am not calling for anarchy or revolution. In the context of pumping out Karens or liberalism in general, when I say "the government" I mean the vast, unelected, extremely powerful bureaucracy and regulatory apparatus which does two things: rule over us and foster a class of people who believe they have some supreme authority to rule over us.
Sen. Chuck Schumer, government creature par excellence, **[famously said](https://substack.com/redirect/15ebb864-b0df-40a1-a285-c11d63939a71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I was born to legislate". Woof.
That is a dangerous and deeply unAmerican belief. Yet Chuck, who was first elected to office in 1974, is still doing it, and none of us is better for it.
Gina McCarthy, a bitter green radical whose ideology is as ugly as her accent, was Joe Biden's domestic climate czar. In this role **[she instituted](https://substack.com/redirect/260f9366-9481-49ff-a8b1-ba173fdc23a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "100 rules just on appliances" and told airlines to get onboard or they'd be "out of here". No one voted for Gina. Congress never approved of rules on appliances. You had no say in your freedom of light bulb choice or generators or leaf blowers... Gina would tell you what she believes you should be allowed to buy. Government gave Gina power, and she used that power to rule you.
That must end. Not just positions like Gina's, but the thousands of people she empowered who believe their job is to regulate your life.
Consider this: for weeks during the recent government shutdown, some 400,000 "non-essential personnel" were furloughed and did nothing. Nothing. They did nothing.
Not air traffic controllers or military, who did their jobs unpaid. No, I mean "Program Officers" at the Department of Commerce or "Senior Coordinators" at the Department of Labor or "Outreach Specialists" at the Department of Agriculture of "Assistant Directors" at the Department of Interior... 400,000 of them did nothing. Nothing. Not a thing for weeks and it mattered not.
These are the breeding grounds for busy body liberals who are now back to work looking for ways to rule over you.
A tyranny of the non-essential personnel.
And this is just the federal government... one could argue the tyranny is worse at the state and local government. Good luck building that shed in your yard. Did you have a permit to remodel your bathroom? Wet food scraps must be placed in the red bin, which is picked up every other Thursday, and improper recycling incurs a $50 fine per offense. No parking on this street every other Tuesday 9am to 9pm. Take a number. For English press 1.
Liberals in the government see a busy road and think "let us eliminate lanes of traffic and put in a bike lane". Then, when the traffic is worse, they propose a congestion tax.
For democracy. Or something.
"Where in the world do you find these angels who are going to organize society for us? I don't even trust you to do that," Milton Friedman [told](https://substack.com/redirect/0e557255-c417-44f7-8717-f3c362fa47f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Phil Donahue in 1979. Few enter government to make life better for us. Most enter because they need a job and want a pension, or, much worse, like Chuck Schumer, because they believe their raison detre is to rule over us.
This part of government- this liberalism factory- must be eliminated if we are to be free.
The other two factories I mention, academia and liberal philanthropy, must come at another time. Too long an article and one surrenders midway through, even with writing as punchy as mine. So, let me end now while I still have you. More to come. Much to do.
Honor and courage.
* * *
_**Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. He also runs a sheep and cattle farm in rural Virginia. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF**_

name: Mark Kelly
subject: “SEDITION AT THE HIGHEST LEVEL”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is about political intimidation, the suppression of free speech, and Trump’s ultimate goal of eliminating his political opposition.
#

He’s doubling down, folks. Trump posted this late last night:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)
He wants us jailed and hung for “SEDITION AT THE HIGHEST LEVEL.”
But read that post one more time, because there is something he doesn’t mention. My colleagues and I didn’t tell the military to disobey Trump's orders. We reminded them what they were told in training: You have an obligation to refuse to follow illegal orders.
The thing is, we know this isn’t about the video. It’s not about what we said. This is about intimidation, the suppression of speech, and Trump’s ultimate goal of eliminating his political opposition.
Donald Trump wants complete, unchecked power. He wants to fire or jail anyone who disagrees with him, but he can’t fire me. I work for the people of Arizona, and under their orders, I will continue to defend the Constitution and our democracy. It really is that simple.
Look — I don’t want you to worry about me. You’ve got enough on your plate as it is. I’m not intimidated by Trump, and I’m not going to stop speaking out against him. You can be sure of that.
But if you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a donation, this is it. I’ve got no idea what comes next, and we’re preparing for any possible outcome right now.
[**Can I count on you to chip in? A contribution of $3 — or anything you can afford, honestly — would give that much more confidence in our plan as we continue pushing back.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=2&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-nov25/.HrSi9M&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=21&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-nov25/.LFB52X&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=22&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-nov25/.AgEJlg&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=23&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-nov25/.0-nYLG&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=24&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-nov25/.s5KEA2&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=25&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-nov25/.-0DWa_&refcode=em251123-1-1mil&t=26&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D)**
---
****
At times like these, I am truly grateful to have a team as strong as this one behind Gabby and me. It means more than you might realize.
Thank you.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=6253%2E6688874%2EsDKA1D).

clean_body: You showed up this year, time and time again. | | | Peter, Our communities have been attacked over and over again this year. Federal agents have snatched and disappeared neighbors and loved ones, DACA recipients have been targets of detentions without due process despite having federal protections, and budget cuts have stripped healthcare from thousands. In the face of these attacks, you showed up, time and time again. Our movement is everywhere and growing. Over 6,000 people just like you have supported United We Dream’s work so far this year — with an average contribution of $38.****** | | | You helped fund summits where youth organizers learned their rights and practiced rapid-response plans. You helped fund gatherings that turned local leaders into campaigners fighting tuition bans and budget cuts that took healthcare away from our families. Those real moments changed outcomes because people like you showed up. When we organize, we win. Your End-Of-Year gift helps us train the next generation of organizers, advocates, and leaders. Together, we will continue building a national movement led by young people — especially college students, first-generation and mixed-status families, undocumented youth, folks with disabilities, and allies like you. ** | | Thank you for your support, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

subject: 🚨 National Emergency 🚨

**➤➤ Trump’s ‘election integrity’ chief claimed president has future powers to declare voting “emergency”** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119846602/584420532/-248329304?refcode=em-11.23.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThhNzViNi05YmM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhSC6v_Ym8o2trrt_KpE3TVKpKfdIP2j0BuIdNbvRRs=)**
* * *
Friend, THIS IS NOT A DRILL. Reporting just revealed that Trump’s election security team is being run by **Heather Honey, a far-right activist who pushed bogus fraud claims in 2020** and helped draft the blueprint for how to challenge and reverse legitimate results. Now she’s inside the Department of Homeland Security. According to internal communications, Honey told a group of right-wing activists that the president could declare a “national emergency” to effectively take control of local election administration. **Let’s be clear: Trump and his MAGA allies want to take control of our elections on a bogus emergency declaration so Republicans can hold on to power.** That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are so critical. They are our last line of defense of our democracy at the state level. Elected, independent officials who can certify legitimate results, protect access to the ballot, and reject coordinated disinformation. But they cannot do it alone. We need every legal resource, every public advocate, and every grassroots dollar behind them now, **because if we wait until the emergency is declared, it will be too late.** **[If you chip in $3, you can help us fight back against this authoritarian election plot, and defend democracy from this dangerous push to gut our elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119846603/584420533/-248329304?refcode=em-11.23.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThhNzViNi05YmM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhSC6v_Ym8o2trrt_KpE3TVKpKfdIP2j0BuIdNbvRRs=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119846604/584420534/-248329304?refcode=em-11.23.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMThhNzViNi05YmM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhSC6v_Ym8o2trrt_KpE3TVKpKfdIP2j0BuIdNbvRRs=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ Trump’s ‘election integrity’ chief claimed president has future powers to declare voting “emergency” = Friend, THIS IS NOT A DRILL. Reporting just revealed that Trump’s election security team is being run by Heather Honey, a far-right activist who pushed bogus fraud claims in 2020 and helped draft the blueprint for how to challenge and reverse legitimate results. Now she’s inside the Department of Homeland Security. According to internal communications, Honey told a group of right-wing activists that the president could declare a “national emergency” to effectively take control of local election administration. Let’s be clear: Trump and his MAGA allies want to take control of our elections on a bogus emergency declaration so Republicans can hold on to power. That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are so critical. They are our last line of defense of our democracy at the state level. Elected, independent officials who can certify legitimate results, protect access to the ballot, and reject coordinated disinformation. But they cannot do it alone. We need every legal resource, every public advocate, and every grassroots dollar behind them now, because if we wait until the emergency is declared, it will be too late. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for staying vigilant, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I’d like to tell you a quick story.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=79657648e6874c469bfc735385860278&_e=OSn7Lf9H_loeEs-fG2GCoQgavQttm-0KrBwHYoDIziVJ0WGnWBmgeNJR2I7G6cOjCyYSiPWJ0C47_sAIzetD_spYHQuLXyRqRf3doNi36WSWv2fi6kkFnevV_SyLdclj2vAFIYSrNhGdDO_NKXHMUzj-EMSM23rr1130jTjum4yIpNFixYfaaS7Dr3FBsa4t36ToIBW2h1Sf9CqtN42rdYDIhJ3pW7UHQpZqbyXZitxtAUY5XYid05nsXwTddNfpdj89krxhoQx-uzGFH3xSXPqmgXeW4qswZgs1HwNMsvLnmVByfYTuliTOEyg87Gy2rl-EsWcFjSOTGD7EUBgOTCvoVm3CRUmHYn5loO9rsKYk24inhlpbp_7zTWUSFmZUpucdchaN_4ent2-UfPsuGrkvLJofy45IQ4CEeDzvy7MlfdGjJ4Q3TsMFDZWt60BNSI8mKXIjiYoY49kOlhTuMOzSJBIZMFEoFzk1OSOFWpgmQAdasDS4IrVdyWUUMhn1Yg_RjJnOF0TJbxzxB7jHNALs2vO3jyn5W1xcxFGYAtuHQ9S4BRvgiVk2ssWoOFLYjLcFJxl01kCMTmq-3SBZNXHC7qQrnO0mOk7I_Og-XtoXMmIuepwK4ZY7mEaLWj6UIsH0323w4fGFbQw0bx7gVbCLPa8G5pJOmiaE2wf2BkjJC-j1IIImP_Ajs_dNImo_LVgT_TM9b89OpAaF9SWbJqZFzkf74zt5RYqqoiF3XdFiF3oPUdztvBCv_Yr5-iFGCk08YO5doreGVJ_UQ6x96l2v698C9Njm3NMvJoSsCUHlxuR7Kvh3XvyugHuo8nBJqY4PpRgZvjdVSSTW5WhjXjf7LnulGuQWJ-drYEd-H4N6pmftw-ailkiJR_uKkweVbEosDDEqXQG5veDoqsFiwlKB4Uaq6pICyJgBH91wnoUQVNqztcjeVpJHSvHJHFmT)
I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice.[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=79657648e6874c469bfc735385860278&_e=OSn7Lf9H_loeEs-fG2GCoQgavQttm-0KrBwHYoDIziVJ0WGnWBmgeNJR2I7G6cOjCyYSiPWJ0C47_sAIzetD_spYHQuLXyRqRf3doNi36WSWv2fi6kkFnevV_SyLdclj2vAFIYSrNhGdDO_NKXHMUzj-EMSM23rr1130jTjum4yIpNFixYfaaS7Dr3FBsa4t36ToIBW2h1Sf9CqtN42rdYDIhJ3pW7UHQpZqbyXZitxtAUY5XYid05nsXwTddNfpdj89krxhoQx-uzGFH3xSXPqmgXeW4qswZgs1HwNMsvLnmVByfYTuliTOEyg87Gy2rl-EsWcFjSOTGD7EUBgOTCvoVm3CRUmHYn5loO9rsKa2uFH2J4O1oVYdzcFxMQaEsZR5gHsE8j49D71UB2TY_PHcsQhyGJqZTbLYy2r8hzrv7O2uqPdjM8CXiTuFQabPrKeNEuxa_SoEkXC40V-Wzzi67AJNsyQKMlIT_XHI4OngyvkYMDkMJjJEi1bv7GFWzMoiqmMfeHNdWs6ELfzT-DMgl_kW3len_e-qJj2BAOSuHawb3uCbedY1Ty86R_gRGilpcV0bUlCMifA_NEdJ-qFYR8712ACM5nQ2aeCamiyuVbmOGrLNjg447U1iHOiP3rGcPMUGpxOXffkLIGlVxJhlWQemyHs9MT6Q0DFjYOPr08oB2WSBX4gKeNdOVo-pnw-2iiviYI-sLhWOUIOa5YU2fNBSGlEADNrJfJgNd6BQ15qKD_dOg4qwpcqqPLyITRdUC85zzy9o2FzWklvQHk6mMBSG8Cl3Nz27GivvcGuXT-PjJNBLrECEqoUbkKDbSG3XqME1Bhgu-YW0W3EJc4MPYS_jYcT4FRVQUvAy7EV_wDOTNTLYXvdK4OjOsaimf8BsqSPpXZBDL3sZmiey5IKmMEEwjMm9kFaybVunDLOzhU_dItMxP91HiGD2qQuu)That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." **
**It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. **
**So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: **
**[THANK YOU, Peter!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=79657648e6874c469bfc735385860278&_e=OSn7Lf9H_loeEs-fG2GCoQgavQttm-0KrBwHYoDIziVJ0WGnWBmgeNJR2I7G6cOjCyYSiPWJ0C47_sAIzetD_spYHQuLXyRqRf3doNi36WSWv2fi6kkFnevV_SyLdclj2vAFIYSrNhGdDO_NKXHMUzj-EMSM23rr1130jTjum4yIpNFixYfaaS7Dr3FBsa4t36ToIBW2h1Sf9CqtN42rdYDIhJ3pW7UHQpZqbyXZitxtAUY5XYid05nsXwTddNfpdj89krxhoQx-uzGFH3xSXPqmgXeW4qswZgs1HwNMsvLnmVByfYTuliTOEyg87Gy2rl-EsWcFjSOTGD7EUBgOTCvoVm3CRUmHYn5loO9rsKbYoqN-0uXgIb79XukdpDm1mvPO2fLqxDpw3EAbNUviVgqII4o5GA-FM5n83dI3b6uLycTYvnKHAt1x5NDiQcoW2Gw9sV1BHDqERzpQX7y377CvblZXHIlVUwgMq377I5iuj1lcND-PTMu0SS5ggn-tbhvq1z2iBZ8UOi1G4pgwck2wQvf3ekhBi1BY1Vk7bjY6xa2LcQL-GlDCJ3Y59hiOZcp3bQHnIRW8ErlibE3Yvcq4NYtEvRTMjbHc0xd8F888hDjeijaf3YQ4hkJ8PQmihYoI5p0zS0fpwQ4PW-HEsekXfB1BAVk9LSoWB6B8IwJuFMcEzfmp_IH-JdygDWv6dVvqpNGOj8Q9ei9s2uNdxtMHYMZ-04lFB3WQMaNbBEPStUsrVohaqu3JwfpyObKFu0puH-sd3qWSl555g7CHsmxkwaxgyzRWR7fV__S2RtYmtrpk3htO4jb42jqTUxBJjdY1lTX9fEva4sVtO708TYf4nEs6X6XfZBGLgn7gHFpp4KZu0snLxnxmVoPmwsG8X9cvB1LGXNRE3aZzO-tmeBunxcRQm0fH_dhXR1_ZKipc55sSMQmF-Oo0_QKa3KVx)**
**We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country.**
**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were[ ONE ELECTION AWAY](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=79657648e6874c469bfc735385860278&_e=OSn7Lf9H_loeEs-fG2GCoQgavQttm-0KrBwHYoDIziVJ0WGnWBmgeNJR2I7G6cOjCyYSiPWJ0C47_sAIzetD_spYHQuLXyRqRf3doNi36WSWv2fi6kkFnevV_SyLdclj2vAFIYSrNhGdDO_NKXHMUzj-EMSM23rr1130jTjum4yIpNFixYfaaS7Dr3FBsa4t36ToIBW2h1Sf9CqtN42rdYDIhJ3pW7UHQpZqbyXZitxtAUY5XYid05nsXwTddNfpdj89krxhoQx-uzGFH3xSXPqmgXeW4qswZgs1HwNMsvLnmVByfYTuliTOEyg87Gy2rl-EsWcFjSOTGD7EUBgOTCvoVm3CRUmHYn5loO9rsKZdsv_JSJ10YOgLlaKPR57hPAUvFm0k4wdliibbehtvnIEGCHuBKnPxUG1RPfsZ5eBDKgkinC7lC60zb_fCAhTkoZOJg9IOCHNjbOvXv7-eFmdVQ2cBRSOD6wtHb0pBt1QyYYEbWAStLI_zjnoMeQxuNVGpDoyv9qF_iqvWdmZhPZMC_2LyjKhDdGbZxuOg4Gq5SMPBh26aJPJH-f7vZXX-X5hBJ618g9PxHX3xMG67kzGVbARi3AGB-ePR4APqDVBOXoHkj0uHftvD4aLLcJmZQD64yzs6-RGwExvd_7b3uLZtfAeSm1LG7qIiNIfD2zCUFOrh2rNoRGk5JljjIfYp2IhYVSTTX2pkUq7Xi366ikNjdO2wjHoBUdGgN5maXlwo6VZb8rl7lUOZt_fRbsm05FDzN4hduVAT7-3H832F7Q4oZkCRSFPszuyXbyBmnv83PhLjr2trWZTxkgxZgWNCdaph4QLlw7DROJiwJrnPXqyhIlYTWMTusGRDQTIM51dSl19KKyDV8L-CAIP9lwbUYgMRB8ZeSTeDqHhRaq9Br-eTIwordXdzybsIBP4isZWsVzfF8cA4vZYYwJjfw35a) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.**
**President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. **
**That 's why this race means so much. **
**So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. **
**And if you haven 't given yet - [and you’re able to spare even $1 today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=79657648e6874c469bfc735385860278&_e=OSn7Lf9H_loeEs-fG2GCoQgavQttm-0KrBwHYoDIziVJ0WGnWBmgeNJR2I7G6cOjCyYSiPWJ0C47_sAIzetD_spYHQuLXyRqRf3doNi36WSWv2fi6kkFnevV_SyLdclj2vAFIYSrNhGdDO_NKXHMUzj-EMSM23rr1130jTjum4yIpNFixYfaaS7Dr3FBsa4t36ToIBW2h1Sf9CqtN42rdYDIhJ3pW7UHQpZqbyXZitxtAUY5XYid05nsXwTddNfpdj89krxhoQx-uzGFH3xSXPqmgXeW4qswZgs1HwNMsvLnmVByfYTuliTOEyg87Gy2rl-EsWcFjSOTGD7EUBgOTCvoVm3CRUmHYn5loO9rsKZr7OFwu4U0vzOZ2p4iF3pasydaoxQGZSen0T_IJHl9jFT6Zi-IsDp1YMqriI4okLdLEu2riHMHZ8NhNqrBABDjrtMwuvxog0YUCWAvJrirfYrNCrcd3ngNP8-An_kLk4rZVlYrYFjHTGTIJa7IRzBiwtaWaoD6PCHEbA6IKh_lAjK9vlOY8SiT44P1lYP544l2T9cX-xK-tJb4Lr5IAFTJCOMc1Ufw03qQVPwRzsA5A7TycsOTGw_SEj2eJGcC4W5u3hMqSrAsZnQKxMOeYF6jwbMOXX96GiRl0F0umzEpa5bBtdkad1Q2TxS06bzGPQbY8B08h3hGqH9dFd3Mpkgt_V2C4sV1frvaQ4N15Lmmm8xkWTAkcpTDdMerer-KzVuvbcAJ6YOU-h2FKJ5kPcfoBtK48k8vfW2wobDykDXWlyJeHiuuygZwHYYWx7FRwDUwOS97ndrwzOlxIg0umMrw7Hu6EJwad0nT-McuU1DEglJwNDIB7nkSlrFmJP214n-zROJVXbYxOsD85eDaCq2WbWaaxkA0yKxILKslQRIUVAWYqN45AONSwX_FbRTeiwLngxYPYAnNtyqDFpofJNbq) - I'd be honored to have you on my team.

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That 's why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. grateful,Vivek Ramaswamy the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse.**| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

Peter, Texas’s gerrymander was the first in a coordinated assault by Republicans to undermine our democracy — waking the nation up to the grave threat that Trump’s redistricting crisis poses to our democracy. The fair maps movement responded in force. From voters’ overwhelming passing of Proposition 50 in California, to a new, fair congressional map approved in Utah, to the courts blocking Texas’s new map because it’s a racial gerrymander — we’ve been fighting back every step of the way in the name of fairness, and these wins show that our strategy is working. The fight doesn't end here. Republicans continue to do everything in their power to attack the very foundation of our democracy. Right now, map manipulators are raising money hand over fist to double down on their cynical scheme to pass even more gerrymandered maps before the midterm elections. **It’s clear: Despite their losses, Republicans aren’t easing up on the attempts to stifle the will of the people. In fact, they’re trying to come back stronger. Peter, the fight to protect fair representation is only going to get harder.** That’s why it’s so incredibly important to have strong grassroots support to make sure we can keep responding whenever and wherever there are attempts to unfairly — and illegally — dilute the people’s voting power. And every single donation makes a huge difference in how we’re able to fight back. clean_body: But we’re confident that together, we can come out on top | Peter, Texas’s gerrymander was the first in a coordinated assault by Republicans to undermine our democracy — waking the nation up to the grave threat that Trump’s redistricting crisis poses to our democracy. The fair maps movement responded in force. From voters’ overwhelming passing of Proposition 50 in California, to a new, fair congressional map approved in Utah, to the courts blocking Texas’s new map because it’s a racial gerrymander — we’ve been fighting back every step of the way in the name of fairness, and these wins show that our strategy is working. The fight doesn't end here. Republicans continue to do everything in their power to attack the very foundation of our democracy. Right now, map manipulators are raising money hand over fist to double down on their cynical scheme to pass even more gerrymandered maps before the midterm elections. It’s clear: Despite their losses, Republicans aren’t easing up on the attempts to stifle the will of the people. In fact, they’re trying to come back stronger. Peter, the fight to protect fair representation is only going to get harder. That’s why it’s so incredibly important to have strong grassroots support to make sure we can keep responding whenever and wherever there are attempts to unfairly — and illegally — dilute the people’s voting power. And every single donation makes a huge difference in how we’re able to fight back. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. name: Rick Larsen
subject: Delicious, nutritious Washington blueberries
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Blueberry farmers across the state are eager to grow by selling delicious, nutritious Washington blueberries to consumers worldwide.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119847632/584424202/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTk0NGQwYS1hMGM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-pilmeTUsAr_inCZR-oU5X8rSNxwKDG5ggegQ1Cgzc=&emci=5d1f4cbb-529a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2e944d0a-a0c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **The U.S. is the world's top blueberry-producing nation, and increasing exports to markets in the Asia-Pacific region supports producers in our districts and states, creating good agricultural jobs.** Blueberry farmers across the state are eager to grow by selling delicious, nutritious Washington blueberries to consumers worldwide. Congress and the administration must continue to work together to create jobs by breaking down barriers that prevent U.S. blueberries from competing in important global markets. That is why I am working with Representative Newhouse to lead bipartisan efforts to push the United States Trade Representative, Jamieson Greer, to prioritize market access for U.S. blueberries in trade discussions with critical partners in Asia. This is what American blueberry farmers and producers are saying about this effort: _"Blueberry growers have a powerful and positive impact on the U.S. economy, generating $9.1 billion in total economic activity and supporting more than 61,000 jobs each year._ _"We strongly support the bipartisan congressional letter urging the administration to address longstanding trade barriers in key markets like Japan, Korea, and Vietnam. Eliminating tariff and nontariff barriers will expand opportunities for family farmers, strengthen the agricultural economy, and ensure the U.S. blueberry industry can thrive globally."_ – Kasey Cronquist, President, North American Blueberry Council **My top priority is to bring economic investments to the 2nd District that create good-paying jobs that support families.** Our economy should work for everyone, and I will continue to push for legislation that protects the values of Northwest Washington. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

name: AZ Dems
subject: Former AZ Senator: "Trump is completely out of touch"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Jeff Flake says Republicans are quietly moving away from Trump. Here's what that means for Arizona. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119847667/584424348/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBmY2JjNTItYTBjOC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3xqE0i3nRG5nLAGDKSJM-kn7t947m5FU5uK3c6om3Ic=)
---
Friends, Trump is **"completely out of touch"** with Americans, and Republicans are starting to migrate away from him. Don’t just take it from us, take it from Former Arizona Senator Jeff Flake. "The president may not want to talk about the affordability crisis, but he's going to have to," Flake told CNN. "The notion that prices are down everywhere. They really aren't, and people know that." The numbers back him up: Trump's approval is at 33% — down 10 points since March. Among Republicans, it's dropped from 81% to 68%. Among independents, it's fallen from 38% to just 25%. As Flake put it: "In politics, migrations rarely happen all at once. They start quietly. But once the wind really changes, the movement becomes unmistakable. I believe that a migration has begun within the Republican Party." Here's what's driving it:
* **Trump denies the affordability crisis.** While Trump claims "every price is down," seven in 10 Americans say grocery bills have gone up. Six in 10 say utility costs increased.
* **The shutdown backfired.** Republicans shut down the government to avoid extending healthcare subsidies. Now 24 million Americans see premiums more than doubling.
* **Trump's tariffs make it worse.** His tariffs raise costs on everything from coffee to medical supplies — inflationary policies that even Republicans know are hurting families.
* **Democrats are winning by talking about affordability.** Democrats won major races nationwide this month by emphasizing the cost of living, while Trump called affordability a "dead” issue.

[**Will you support the Arizona Democratic Party as we capitalize on this moment and flip competitive seats blue in 2026?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119847668/584424349/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBmY2JjNTItYTBjOC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3xqE0i3nRG5nLAGDKSJM-kn7t947m5FU5uK3c6om3Ic=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119847669/584424350/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBmY2JjNTItYTBjOC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3xqE0i3nRG5nLAGDKSJM-kn7t947m5FU5uK3c6om3Ic=)
---
Arizona Republicans like Biggs, Crane, Ciscomani, and Schweikert have tied themselves completely to Trump. They voted for his agenda. They enabled his shutdown. They backed policies that made life more expensive.
Now, as Flake predicts, Republicans are quietly moving away from Trump as they realize he's leading them off a cliff in the midterms. We're making sure Arizona voters know which Republicans stayed with Trump all the way down — and making them pay the price in 2026.
Thank you,
AZ Dems
Arizona Democratic Party
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States **[info@azdem.org](mailto:info@azdem.org)** | **PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG**

After the 2024 election, I desperately needed a little bit of distraction and a whole lot of community. I posted to my neighborhood list serv that I was starting a book club at our community center and welcomed people to join.
Golly gee, did they take me up on the invitation. My book club list, UHills Reads for Pleasure, has 100 members! And since February, we've read 18 books. They've ranged from the genre-defying Ministry of Time to the widely-read and deservedly-praised James. Here are four of my favorites, perfect for settling into indoors fall weather or holiday gifting.
**Wild Dark Shore** by Charlotte McConaghy was my favorite book of 2025. It's atmospheric, weaving together elements of family relationships, environmental harm, mystery and more. The writing is terse and beautiful, and it's short enough that you can finish it without feeling overwhelmed.
**Frozen River** by Ariel Lawhon is historical fiction based on a true life figure. Set in colonial rural Maine, the book reveals the ways in which women struggled for justice. The book features a happy marriage (a rarity in fiction!) and shows how one woman navigated her role in the community and her role as a mother--long before "work-life balance" was an aspiration put on mothers.
**Margo 's Got Money Troubles** by Rufi Thorpe sparkles with creative and original characters. The book follows a young, unmarried mother who finds her own path to independence, while challenging expectations and judgment. Set in Orange County, this book is a reminder of all the different paths people take to try for a better life.
**Road to Tender Hearts** by Annie Hartnett offers a deeply flawed but lovable protagonist: the grieving, generous P.J. Halliday, struggling with alcoholism and enjoying his lottery winnings. With the barest hint of magic in the form of a prescient cat, the book is a story about found and existing families with characters of every age rendered with insight and humanity.
Because I'm in charge, this book group has no BS rules: 1) you must wear a name tag; 2) we don't chat about anything but books; 3) you can come whether you read the book, listened, got half way through or didn't even start but are just curious about the book; and 4) you don't have to come to every meeting. Some people have come once, and a few have never missed a meeting. And that is all okay! It's a judgment-free zone, which is a rare environment these days.
As the political polarization and the fear and fatigue from the Trump administration eat away at our sense of peace, this book group has been such a source of joy and community. Take care of yourselves in the fight, by reading or otherwise!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b52915d3-1bd1-48f2-a7eb-b8c5893f9d16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Will you continue supporting volunteers like Eileen?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/2aYH7oLMDUGCzowlqvcGrQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=xdFLccYpp8VlIknUQg9Mhi0k1//a4M4kPdkGQscgFnnfVd46tc/IUtveCbHxOlOoum6Ypr8fQI8KclG4XaQ0PdvXJIpFPrngg9sxJN0Npbjlsdpy737VY32rmjqT1PCn [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2aYH7oLMDUGCzowlqvcGrQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=xdFLccYpp8VlIknUQg9Mhi0k1//a4M4kPdkGQscgFnnfVd46tc/IUtveCbHxOlOoum6Ypr8fQI8KclG4XaQ0PdvXJIpFPrngg9sxJN0Npbjlsdpy737VY32rmjqT1PCn]
Hi Peter,
Did you know that you can use Oregon’s Political Tax Credit to make a gift to the OLCV PAC and get it back when you file your taxes? With Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, eligible tax-paying Oregonians can give $50 (individual) or $100 (couple filing jointly) to the OLCV PAC, as essentially a free donation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2] Your donation will then go directly to recruiting volunteers to knock on doors and speak to voters about pro-climate and pro-environment candidates in 2026!
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=xdFLccYpp8VlIknUQg9Mhi0k1//a4M4kPdkGQscgFnnfVd46tc/IUtveCbHxOlOoum6Ypr8fQI8KclG4XaQ0PdvXJIpFPrngg9sxJN0Npbjlsdpy737VY32rmjqT1PCn]
A gift to the OLCV PAC will allow us to continue supporting volunteers like Eileen Sleva, from Hillsboro, Oregon. Here’s her story:
I moved to Oregon in 2007 from Pennsylvania. An activist for the environment since Earth Day 1970, I was excited to live in a state that values the health or our earth. I quickly became aware that many people are apathetic when it comes to protecting our earth. Standing on street corners with signs, visiting my senators and representatives, writing letters and making telephone calls to legislators to create awareness of what we are doing to our mother earth became my passion. Eighteen years later and I am still at it. Now I have grandchildren and I grieve for their future. We cannot give up. We must continue to teach, preach and march for our earth. She is all we have.
If you agree with Eileen, please make a gift to the OLCV PAC to support our work! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=xdFLccYpp8VlIknUQg9Mhi0k1//a4M4kPdkGQscgFnnfVd46tc/IUtveCbHxOlOoum6Ypr8fQI8KclG4XaQ0PdvXJIpFPrngg9sxJN0Npbjlsdpy737VY32rmjqT1PCn]
You’re eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
✔ You are an Oregon resident
✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2025
✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly)
We’re coming up on a critical election year for Oregon, so we’re building resources now to ensure we’ve got what it takes to win big in the upcoming election. That means we’ll need a lot of volunteers to help us elect new leaders next year who will fight for our climate and environment. Will you help by using your Political Tax Credit to donate to the OLCV PAC today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Affordable healthcare is a human right
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119848140/584425979/795475316?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmMyYzYzNS1hNWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vEVr5yatsVDuorOYgczECwznLkAK1p5oCRxc44ScxM=)
Peter, Whenever I’m moving through Central and Northwestern Illinois, I hear from dozens, if not hundreds, of constituents about the same thing: The importance of protecting access to affordable, high-quality health care. People in our district -- including seniors on fixed incomes -- are about to see their monthly payments nearly quadruple overnight. That means folks skipping prescriptions. Delaying doctor visits. Falling into debt. All while Republicans hand tax breaks to billionaires and Big Pharma. **This isn't inevitable, Peter, if we don't accept it. ** **To every Republican in Congress: put up or shut up. The American people are exhausted with your fake outrage over the cost of health care.** As one of the leading voices for science in Congress, I'm doing everything to make my Republican colleagues gain some common sense -- and if not, help get them out of office. And right now, what we need is our collective voice to be so overwhelming that they can't ignore our truth: That we can fund healthcare properly. That affordable healthcare is a human right. [**If you're with me, add your name today to demand that the Republican majority restore ACA credits for working folks. And if they won't, pledge that you'll kick them to the curb for a Congress that will.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119848141/584425980/-1932486941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmMyYzYzNS1hNWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vEVr5yatsVDuorOYgczECwznLkAK1p5oCRxc44ScxM=&emci=06c2c635-a5c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0fc2c635-a5c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858) | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119848142/584425981/-1932486941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmMyYzYzNS1hNWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vEVr5yatsVDuorOYgczECwznLkAK1p5oCRxc44ScxM=&emci=06c2c635-a5c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0fc2c635-a5c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858)
---
Thanks for being in this fight with me.
-Eric

---

He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119848147/584425986/795475316?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmMyYzYzNS1hNWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vEVr5yatsVDuorOYgczECwznLkAK1p5oCRxc44ScxM=)

Peter: With the holidays approaching, families are hitting the stores for gifts, groceries, and meals.

And as a result, they’re feeling the consequences of rising costs now more than ever. Here’s the truth: _**Trump’s tariffs are driving up food and household prices right before the holidays.**_

But Republicans REFUSE to take accountability for Trump’s reckless tariff war. Derek, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest.
He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress.
Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year-old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.
**[If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between Chrissy Houlahan and me →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119848608/584427536/169640348?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1196-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTRkNWUwMi1hN2M4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IlzZqOYUPUB68wmyDlt3PLk6X-kim4rZti7aYpDMDH0=)**

That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.

The date of the election has not been set but we know it'll be in the next few weeks. If Republicans lose here, and in the other special elections (TN-07, TX-18, & NJ-11) we would decimate their majority in the House long before next November. Plain and simple. But if MAGA succeeds at replacing MTG in this district, they would help solidify Trump's bloc in Congress through 2026 and stop Democrats' chances in just a few short weeks. That's why my team is all hands on deck right now. We're staffing up, running ads and making phone calls. But we're behind our fundraising target and won't be able to sustain this if we don't catch back up ASAP. Join Jane Fonda’s fight! >>
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: CO-SIGN THE COMMITTEE FOR THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU)
---
80 years after McCarthyism, Trump and his MAGA mob are using the same tactics to scare and SILENCE anyone who disagrees with them.

**Jane Fonda is a Democratic HERO — so she needs YOU in her corner to fight back._Trump will do anything to stop her!_**

[**Will you join Jane Fonda’s movement to defend free speech and stand up to Trump by adding your signature now? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU)
[SIGN: I SUPPORT THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU)
---
**_IF we sit idly by,_** Trump will ELIMINATE free speech and punish anyone who dares to speak out against his MAGA authoritarianism.

**_BUT IF we all band together,_** Trump doesn’t stand a CHANCE against our grassroots momentum — we can SAVE our democracy!

[**So please, SIGN NOW: Co-sign Jane Fonda’s Committee for the First Amendment »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU)

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21977%2E878179%2EXt9yIU).**

name: Matt Van Epps
subject: You probably don’t know me yet. That's okay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
True leadership emerges in the heat of battle
| | | | https://secure.winred.com/matt-van-epps-for-congress/night-stalkers-dont-quit-short_p-pdg?&utm;_term=GAP
---
|
---
Hey Peter, Matt Van Epps here.

You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay.

**What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:_Night Stalkers Don’t Quit._**

We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks.

What I learned was this: **true leadership emerges in the heat of battle.** Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – _no matter the odds._

**Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance.**

**On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast.[_Will you rush in a donation now?_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c0b417fe07434112ac01efacfaf8a2ee&_e=tmlghQM3Z-vtx-7PKFYsvC7NCpnQLdvTV_hE1Q_n__7ePuotTkKo4F2DismjwGGIjXVstI3id5xJxhcqbvPKy87cVzkF7poqjllayvMEIT82FNrvpuq4lYc1KV4dxAAmEtFrs6HQw8xyfMsGAPD3yS_-5SKL1XYo0eKRJhFsKTO_ncf-85u57YfOhvV7dcqtmlJMRk6233_NG7y5sChpDzMfdSqil8oz0lMo8HEqjERtklpPxFrEGz_cJyRE462Z73yN1xvDStuDjNraiZTXn37Sp-Gv9Zv1Q7TvhqhhCU8GV01QNBBNwo_CHSzzUD_UdzbXbOqH_lhheMff0txHdOBY030_BZhHSTF0NRNLE-7UQwSTLiurUGuCc5QWCwvAcHQ4C05EoskndJgsIF-Zz8DxBP7PCExKv0I7QdOxc0SzALEG9bMbxcwpNOJAEclI_8Vlr38ZdMjzID77zACDVR3W_byYEoHnwGQGaCUw7xycQgQGafc51jFflJkh7FOGx7VRjYTq51JTrNpRGRK8ew%3D%3D)**
|
---
[PITCH IN ASAP](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c0b417fe07434112ac01efacfaf8a2ee&_e=tmlghQM3Z-vtx-7PKFYsvC7NCpnQLdvTV_hE1Q_n__7ePuotTkKo4F2DismjwGGIjXVstI3id5xJxhcqbvPKy87cVzkF7poqjllayvMEIT82FNrvpuq4lYc1KV4dxAAmEtFrs6HQw8xyfMsGAPD3yT_k6DRfg_rwLbC8pl10iaIpegeVmgwODRv-J1QIKEj2PAANBDXNZ6ZkdbYpLixI2aLaqOVn_LcCRJF_pfXsxw6a8Tc02bK1NHqPUmrY4OMH2W8tJPYNkWpVg9HPbX7TB9hFZCQnZuEC8CKfDB9QdRoHwBgtP803ktqlLtWaHIxuB3r9iVRrhEuAMb9zknZbZ1XrPYChzsM2DFur08r1izD2SOklL3SijUH12uINK8wHjrfkRaPDxL2F2I42g59Cr2hg0nG-BMr2avekSKcyfFbM3COQp4TIS5kLuiRtjkM1rZCS0FNwN8nOLQhU0_nvEH8JFgcFCcGbDp_3B32q53patIj8fJhWgDXxoIRabIX9Zs-zVZHFGPGiBJHI9nwlZw%3D%3D)
|
---
The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside **Jasmine Crockett** , was previously **endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America** , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal **bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement.** She's already being called "_**the AOC of Tennessee**_ " and is gunning to be the **newest member of "The Squad."** _No thank you._

**I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government.**

**President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.”**

_I’m running to prove him right._

Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. **This race, right now, is the firewall._And it's the only game in town._**

**[I’m not asking for much – just your endorsement and whatever you can pitch in right now. $5 keeps a door-knocker on the street. $25 fuels a mail piece. $100 runs digital ads that could flip undecideds.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c0b417fe07434112ac01efacfaf8a2ee&_e=tmlghQM3Z-vtx-7PKFYsvC7NCpnQLdvTV_hE1Q_n__7ePuotTkKo4F2DismjwGGIjXVstI3id5xJxhcqbvPKy87cVzkF7poqjllayvMEIT82FNrvpuq4lYc1KV4dxAAmEtFrs6HQw8xyfMsGAPD3yTdWU7Qv2fslAplKGl2naiF84BQKEKrtldWF9ZKV7MzjlFFBC0CJPwfKESAiojPSY_NG3WBRLfd8Eq1NXNXP9OgqQncmm3Ga-BEPv866r_jiSYl2alQVNuM5iFjFwbE336ru6LH0fHpbni4fU49HPAXcUn2AuvEAmy1uwo9CLCKwPLbD_KshR_ZuJ2xJnjH6LkYxm-_A_-zEfRZ2Kh1wlis4Bh6KqNnILA_ffAj7aumETqh3pLyZ-cSBV6-l0k6727yEaBaIWBvDeqmBg8V42sN8Sk4Mi51gNgeJdMLe-SmoTmm086Y6GUFomTAYoZk9sVs4LOFbp1Nij_gtYdjtgbX8uV-6nbp6Q3G67Qtn8g4EpO5aIs9SPBsOCDg2eERBEg%3D%3D)**

_**Night Stalkers Don’t Quit.**_

**But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time.**

Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,
Matt Van Epps

clean_body: True leadership emerges in the heat of battle | | | | | Hey Peter, Matt Van Epps here. You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay. What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:Night Stalkers Don’t Quit. We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks. What I learned was this: true leadership emerges in the heat of battle. Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – no matter the odds. Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance. On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast. | | The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside Jasmine Crockett , was previously endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement. She's already being called "the AOC of Tennessee " and is gunning to be the newest member of "The Squad." No thank you. I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government. President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.” I’m running to prove him right. Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. This race, right now, is the firewall.And it's the only game in town. Night Stalkers Don’t Quit. But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time. Thank you for your commitment. Sincerely, Matt Van Epps | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress | Use of Matt Van Epps’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of War. body:
Kellyanne Conway issues her 2025 Election Aftermath Report — take the GOP Priority Survey now. |
Peter,

I've seen plenty of elections in my lifetime — but what happened on November 4th?

That was a catastrophe for America.

_Virginia_. _New Jersey_. _New York City_. Even _California_.
We didn't just lose - we got _**lapped**_.

Democrats are already dancing in the streets, convinced they've found the playbook to take back the Senate in 2026.

That's where you come in.

I've teamed up with the Senate Republicans to sound the alarm and refocus our movement on what matters most: winning back the voters we lost and holding the line in the Senate.

clean_body: Kellyanne Conway issues her 2025 Election Aftermath Report — take the GOP Priority Survey now. | Peter, I've seen plenty of elections in my lifetime — but what happened on November 4th? That was a catastrophe for America. Virginia. New Jersey. New York City. Even California. We didn't just lose - we got lapped. Democrats are already dancing in the streets, convinced they've found the playbook to take back the Senate in 2026. I don't sugarcoat the truth: the Republican Party is bleeding out in blue states, and the ripple effect is coming for our majority. We've got the better ideas, the stronger record, and the momentum - but we're losing the messaging war. That's where you come in. I've teamed up with the Senate Republicans to sound the alarm and refocus our movement on what matters most: winning back the voters we lost and holding the line in the Senate. Your answers will help guide strategy, funding, and messaging in the most competitive races in America. The Democrats are organized, funded, and fired up. We need to match their energy. Every second we delay is another inch they take. For America, Kellyanne Conway If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! body:
The National Journal went on to rank the top 10 most flippable 2026 governor’s races — and guess which race made the cut? 😏😏😏
Folks, it’s Rob Sand! Since day 1, you and I have both known that while the Iowa governor’s race will be tough, it’s absolutely, 100% winnable.
And if people outside of Iowa hadn’t gotten the memo, well, the cat’s sure out of the bag now:

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: 10% Increase in Funding for Community Anti-Violent Groups
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171049.172149.18&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171049.172149.18&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171049.172149.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16216)
#
# **10% Increase in Funding for Community Anti-Violence Groups**
**** Pennsylvania's new state budget has passed. It includes many important investments in education, jobs, affordability, and safety. One of the most notable investments in community safety included $62.15 million dollars for [Pennsylvania's Violence and Intervention Prevention (VIP) grant program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171049.172149.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16217). The program has provided critical support to grassroot groups as they work on the front lines to end gun violence and support communities as they heal from violence. [The VIP grant program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171049.172149.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16219) was **started in 2018** to prevent gun violence by investing in community organizations that actively work every day to fight the gun violence epidemic. **Since Senator Hughes led the start of the VIP initiative with fellow Democrats, the program has awarded over $212 million dollars to over 250 grassroots organization** Reducing gun violence takes all of us, including families, community leaders, educators, public officials, and neighbors working together. This 10% funding increase is a meaningful investment in solutions rooted in community strength. [Continue to follow us on social media](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171049.172149.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16220) to keep up with the latest that's happening in Harrisburg and right here in Philadelphia and Montgomery County.
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---

2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778
| |

Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007

name: Breaking:
subject: Trump calls for execution of Democrats
body:
He’s completely lost his mind.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VnGWzsxp3e9mKCxlFSL3N9_7EPOmAn_7x7uy9ouR-JJq3EP3jLFbU8vpjI_YTnKEjUNMBbi2_xSHwm_CcyKJeE5pRe4rg9R_hsvtDL-12onr-TiWidwWHr7LgpGYP4qfrbq58ipeTBOyL4kCB6TfTcUl6bnxTD9R13-yNmFju32sRpKhsvLU_Skjbm1X367krXPlou2sNv0X0zVOkxKA0GkzfHYzXzZe&c=56dOsCLwteBrUpZ7kOaPLWfQPkwoGT7m94fT5mRtDfHzQWCJSBBS6w==&ch=U_YQUoNeIGvhKe1bIFb0owogObPcG0vQV-PYG20LFZoqvNGwt2gF8A==)
---
|
Peter,
Donald Trump crossed a line he can't walk back--openly calling for elected Democrats to be executed for urging our soldiers to reject illegal orders he might try to give.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VnGWzsxp3e9mKCxlFSL3N9_7EPOmAn_7x7uy9ouR-JJq3EP3jLFbU8vpjI_YTnKEjUNMBbi2_xSHwm_CcyKJeE5pRe4rg9R_hsvtDL-12onr-TiWidwWHr7LgpGYP4qfrbq58ipeTBOyL4kCB6TfTcUl6bnxTD9R13-yNmFju32sRpKhsvLU_Skjbm1X367krXPlou2sNv0X0zVOkxKA0DG_kTPhzWJZ&c=56dOsCLwteBrUpZ7kOaPLWfQPkwoGT7m94fT5mRtDfHzQWCJSBBS6w==&ch=U_YQUoNeIGvhKe1bIFb0owogObPcG0vQV-PYG20LFZoqvNGwt2gF8A==)
---
| This isn't new. Ever since he came down the escalator in 2015, Trump has unleashed violence, hate, and chaos in our politics. He has demanded that Democrats be arrested, silenced, and destroyed for standing up to him. And every time he does it, he pours gasoline onto the fire of political violence already sweeping this county.
And I've experienced it firsthand. Every day, my social media feed is flooded with violent and racist threats. I was tear gassed and hit with a car by Trump's personal gestapo, ICE, at a peaceful protest in Broadview. I've watched Black and brown families kidnapped off the street of my neighborhood with no due process.
This is Trump's America and he's only striving to make it more violent.
Trump is unraveling before our eyes--angry, erratic, possibly dementia-raddled, and cornered by a collapsing economy. Just look at his ties to pedophile and human trafficker Jeffrey Epstein. Look at the overwhelming blowback he's received from the violence ICE is unleashing on our communities. He's completely lost his mind.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VnGWzsxp3e9mKCxlFSL3N9_7EPOmAn_7x7uy9ouR-JJq3EP3jLFbU8vpjI_YTnKEjUNMBbi2_xSHwm_CcyKJeE5pRe4rg9R_hsvtDL-12onr-TiWidwWHr7LgpGYP4qfrbq58ipeTBOyL4kCB6TfTcUl6bnxTD9R13-yNmFju32sRpKhsvLU_Skjbm1X367krXPlou2sNv0X0zVOkxKA0N-wFIDl9k8a&c=56dOsCLwteBrUpZ7kOaPLWfQPkwoGT7m94fT5mRtDfHzQWCJSBBS6w==&ch=U_YQUoNeIGvhKe1bIFb0owogObPcG0vQV-PYG20LFZoqvNGwt2gF8A==)
---
| Democrats cannot meet this moment with timidity. We need fighters willing to confront Trump's fascism head-on--before more blood is shed. That's the fight I'm taking to Congress as the next representative for IL-9. If you're with me, I need your support today:
[Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us stop Trump's violent movement and defend our Democracy?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VnGWzsxp3e9mKCxlFSL3N9_7EPOmAn_7x7uy9ouR-JJq3EP3jLFbU8vpjI_YTnKEuCPV_RK4xyTFKJHunu1afSSngzTheLnmEPZy2pcgjwvNrcuERYwEcmwI8KUVE6SNLCSLVI7uPppZEIFxlC4GdRoFGKjx-oXJU9fT82aOoUhJxJfTDU-XE7GgAwkpCmuTY97UzUrS2WURpaVdVL4Korb6rOI34H5_BrARoo8o42gLkqU-gGSrsg==&c=56dOsCLwteBrUpZ7kOaPLWfQPkwoGT7m94fT5mRtDfHzQWCJSBBS6w==&ch=U_YQUoNeIGvhKe1bIFb0owogObPcG0vQV-PYG20LFZoqvNGwt2gF8A==)

clean_body: He’s completely lost his mind. | | | | | == | Peter, Donald Trump crossed a line he can't walk back--openly calling for elected Democrats to be executed for urging our soldiers to reject illegal orders he might try to give. | | == | This isn't new. Ever since he came down the escalator in 2015, Trump has unleashed violence, hate, and chaos in our politics. He has demanded that Democrats be arrested, silenced, and destroyed for standing up to him. And every time he does it, he pours gasoline onto the fire of political violence already sweeping this county. And I've experienced it firsthand. Every day, my social media feed is flooded with violent and racist threats. I was tear gassed and hit with a car by Trump's personal gestapo, ICE, at a peaceful protest in Broadview. I've watched Black and brown families kidnapped off the street of my neighborhood with no due process. This is Trump's America and he's only striving to make it more violent. Trump is unraveling before our eyes--angry, erratic, possibly dementia-raddled, and cornered by a collapsing economy. Just look at his ties to pedophile and human trafficker Jeffrey Epstein. Look at the overwhelming blowback he's received from the violence ICE is unleashing on our communities. He's completely lost his mind. | == | Democrats cannot meet this moment with timidity. We need fighters willing to confront Trump's fascism head-on--before more blood is shed. That's the fight I'm taking to Congress as the next representative for IL-9. If you're with me, I need your support today: == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | If Trump is willing to call for our execution, we must fight like hell to end his reign of violence. | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is attacking folks like my son, Ben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57f231b2-e2ef-4bdf-9449-fd9d13d68873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d5ae52d-faff-413b-8728-001d9734459e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, this is Maggie Hassan, and I’d like to take a moment to talk about my 37-year-old son, Ben. When Ben was born with cerebral palsy, I knew his life would look a little different from other kids. As Ben grew up, I became an advocate to ensure that kids with disabilities would have every opportunity to succeed. Being Ben’s mother taught me about the critical role that public health plays in helping people with disabilities thrive. At times, Ben has needed up to nine doctors, a dozen or more different medications, and 24-hour care. So when I hear top public health officials like RFK Jr. make offensive statements about folks with disabilities and attempt to slash the programs that support them, I am outraged. And so are millions of Americans. RFK Jr.’s radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and disinformation campaign around autism undermine key rights and protections for people with disabilities. We can’t stop calling him out. Donald Trump and RFK Jr. are attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access. This injustice and cruelty cannot stand. [I’m more than ready to continue taking action in the face of RFK Jr.’s prejudice, falsehoods, and malice, but I need your support: Will you please split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action before our end-of-month deadline and help elect a wave of disability champions in the midterms?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T182b3f91-c520-46f6-8fba-8fbd60b9d2ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5e3df9e-1067-4f37-b1c0-b54c02acdd9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kathy Hochul
subject: I'm ready for this fight
disclaimer_text: paid for by Kathy Hochul for Governor
body:
Our progress is on the chopping block because Trump’s number one ally in Congress, Elise Stefanik, announced her campaign.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Kathy Hochul.
Serving as the first mom Governor of New York has been the honor of my life — and I could not be more proud of the work we’ve accomplished.
We’ve put money back in New Yorkers’ pockets, passed universal free school meals for our kids, and stood up to the Trump administration’s attacks on our state.
We’ve also protected reproductive rights, expanded access to child care and affordable housing, and kept our communities safe. And there’s still more work to do.
But all of our progress is on the chopping block because Trump’s number one ally in Congress, Elise Stefanik, announced her campaign to flip New York’s Governorship red.
I’m ready for this fight, but I need you by my side.
**[So I’m personally asking: Will you split a contribution between me and Tim Walz so that we can keep fighting back and keep New York and Minnesota blue?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251123_2_hochul.AJ1ahI&amount=5&refcode=em20251123-153&t=1&akid=153%2E34582%2EIiFMiQ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251123_2_hochul.AJ1ahI&amount=5&refcode=20251123-153&t=20&akid=153%2E34582%2EIiFMiQ)**
No one — not Stefanik, not Trump, not any D.C. Republican — will stand between me and the work to deliver for New Yorkers.
**I’m a mom from Buffalo. Fighting is second nature to me. So believe me when I say – I’m ready to fight like hell to protect New Yorkers and build on the progress we’ve made.**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251123_2_hochul.AJ1ahI&amount=5&refcode=20251123-153&t=39&akid=153%2E34582%2EIiFMiQ)**
Thank you for being with me in this fight.
Ever Upward,
Kathy
Prepared and paid for by Kathy Hochul for Governor

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251123-153&t=40&refcode2=153_34582_IiFMiQ&akid=153%2E34582%2EIiFMiQ)**
