clean_body: Our progress is on the chopping block because Trump’s number one ally in Congress, Elise Stefanik, announced her campaign. Hi Peter, it’s Kathy Hochul. Serving as the first mom Governor of New York has been the honor of my life — and I could not be more proud of the work we’ve accomplished. We’ve put money back in New Yorkers’ pockets, passed universal free school meals for our kids, and stood up to the Trump administration’s attacks on our state. We’ve also protected reproductive rights, expanded access to child care and affordable housing, and kept our communities safe. And there’s still more work to do. But all of our progress is on the chopping block because Trump’s number one ally in Congress, Elise Stefanik, announced her campaign to flip New York’s Governorship red. I’m ready for this fight, but I need you by my side. No one — not Stefanik, not Trump, not any D.C. Republican — will stand between me and the work to deliver for New Yorkers. I’m a mom from Buffalo. Fighting is second nature to me. So believe me when I say – I’m ready to fight like hell to protect New Yorkers and build on the progress we’ve made. Thank you for being with me in this fight. Ever Upward, Kathy Prepared and paid for by Kathy Hochul for Governor Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

name: TO: Congressional Republicans [re: Social Security] >> Fight For Reform
subject: FROM: A Concerned Democrat
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv) Team – We need you to sign and chip in to our open letter **right now** to tell Congressional Republicans:

[**KEEP YOUR HANDS OFF OUR SOCIAL SECURITY →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70250?t=3&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv) | [ADD YOUR NAME & CHIP IN $10 →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70250?t=4&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv)
---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70250?t=5&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv)

Dear Congressional Republicans,

We are NOT going to let you get away with CUTTING Social Security.

_Let us be clear:_

**We paid into Social Security. We earned it.**

These benefits represent decades of work and contributions — not political bargaining chips.

They are not yours to touch — and they are NOT up for negotiation.

Instead of doing your job and keeping the government running, you pushed an extremist agenda that punishes seniors, veterans, people with disabilities, and every working American who relies on this vital program. These aren’t numbers — they’re real people whose futures you’re putting at risk.

We see what you’re doing, and we won’t forget it.

We refuse to let you undermine one of the most trusted programs in our nation’s history or use a shutdown of your own making as a weapon against the American people.

**Keep your hands off our Social Security. We’re watching. And we _will_ hold you accountable.**
[ **So we’re sending you a MASSIVE LETTER telling you just how PISSED OFF we are – and we WON’T let you touch our Social Security. Sign the letter now →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70250?t=6&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv)
[ADD YOUR NAME & CHIP IN $10 →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70250?t=7&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv)
---
Sincerely,

[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70250?t=8&akid=23660%2E4449941%2EPjQhLv)
Thank you for taking the time to sign.

_— Fight For Reform_

Gustav Klimt's "[Portrait of Elisabeth Lederer](https://substack.com/redirect/3e4db253-9cd5-4b81-accc-f3ba303916be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" [sold](https://substack.com/redirect/aa4d8ce1-91a4-4040-a3f8-941d0d3bfbd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this past week for a record $236.4 million at a Sotheby's auction in New York. Like many, the transaction price caught my attention. But it also sent my "bubble-spotting" seismograph gyrating, elevating the probability of a possibly imminent asset earthquake.
As I've previously written, record-setting art prices have been a pretty reliable predictor of bubbles about to burst. Regular readers of my work know that I am a staunch advocate of multi-disciplinary thinking. My thinking is simple: if every lens is biased, limited, and incomplete, why not use multiple lenses? Such multi-lens thinking is the essence of the generalist approach I suggest is the most effective way to navigate uncertainty.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Owz1PrgyK73g3vHXAhyFR2JL92dxDfHlk5Tp-hCaznM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179694562)
Almost 15 years ago, I summarized my generalist approach to navigating financial bubbles in my first book, _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/23e3719f-e5be-460e-a1c6-4acaaabebcb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Specifically, I shared my framework for understanding financial bubbles that is based on connecting insights from economics, psychology, epidemiology, and biology. I also highlighted some of my "seemingly irrelevant" indicators that had proven useful through history in identifying financial bubbles - before they popped. These included the world's tallest skyscrapers, the financial performance of auction houses (see piece below), and yes, record-setting prices of treasure assets such as art, wine, and other collectibles. [Derek Thompson](https://open.substack.com/users/157561-derek-thompson?utm_source=mentions) even profiled my ideas in _The Atlantic_ ("[The Art of Bubbles: How Sotheby's Predicts the World Economy](https://substack.com/redirect/d7cd776e-f892-4586-a32b-64e52a287e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)").
* * *
## [Sotheby's Stock Price: The World's Best Overconfidence Indicator?](https://substack.com/redirect/e0cebe23-e27b-425b-9010-79ae2121a803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| December 17, 2012
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e0cebe23-e27b-425b-9010-79ae2121a803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Anyone who has witnessed a live auction in which bidding far exceeds pre-auction estimates or sets a new world record price understands there is something curious in the air. There is something elect...](https://substack.com/redirect/e0cebe23-e27b-425b-9010-79ae2121a803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/e0cebe23-e27b-425b-9010-79ae2121a803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Because, art doesn't have any intrinsic value, has no practical uses, and its value is entirely in the eye of the beholder, art is a luxury good in the truest sense, and for people to buy it at record-setting prices, several conditions must be met.
First, they must have money, and lots of it. Setting a world record price for a painting, given prior records, is the very embodiment of _**conspicuous consumption**_ on steroids. Purchasers must have piles of excess cash to set record prices. That cash usually comes from people who have made "bubble windfalls" of extreme financial returns in a short time. Think of the Japanese bubble economy, the internet boom and bust, etc.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Owz1PrgyK73g3vHXAhyFR2JL92dxDfHlk5Tp-hCaznM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179694562)
But not only do those with newfound wealth have to be eager to bid, but they must also believe the good times will continue indefinitely. The overconfidence and irrational extrapolation encourage risk-taking and speculative behaviors...such as buying art at record prices. Rather than deter such bidders, high prices tend to attract them. The track record of world record art prices indicating asset market exuberance is pretty impressive. My 2015 piece on this subject (link below) is worth skimming for those that are skeptical.
* * *
## [The "Art" of Spotting Bubbles](https://substack.com/redirect/3c34eb91-6afe-410d-9bf7-eed3d25f950f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| May 20, 2015
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3c34eb91-6afe-410d-9bf7-eed3d25f950f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The last two weeks marked a major milestone in the world of art. Between May 5 and May 15, a record $2.7 billion of art was sold at Christie's, Sotheby's, and Phillips during a Spring auction bonanza...](https://substack.com/redirect/3c34eb91-6afe-410d-9bf7-eed3d25f950f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/3c34eb91-6afe-410d-9bf7-eed3d25f950f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Record art prices often reflect the entry of new bidders into the art-collecting game. These newer buyers, in general, are from a new art-collecting class created by the "new new thing." Think fracking entrepreneurs, crypto billionaires, or artificial intelligence gazillionaires. And who's selling also matters. Record art prices are rarely set by the buying activity of long-time and sophisticated art collectors; rather, those very collectors are usually sellers in these transactions.
So, what are we to make of the Klimt sale?
Yes, the record price is noteworthy for a piece of art. But it's perhaps more noteworthy for the conditions it reflects. It's been said that art is a reflection of the reality in which it was created. Well, I have a caveat: _**Art prices are a reflection of the economy in which they were paid**_.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Owz1PrgyK73g3vHXAhyFR2JL92dxDfHlk5Tp-hCaznM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179694562)
So who was the buyer of the Klimt? Someone with newfound wealth from an overconfident sector that believes the gains will continue indefinitely? A gold speculator? An AI-entrepreneur? A real estate tycoon focused on data centers? Or perhaps a Washington lobbyist specializing in tariff mitigation strategies with China as a major client? Sooner or later the name (and background) of the buyer will leak, and when it does, it will likely shed light on an industry with unsustainable returns. Could the Klimt sale be an indicator of a AI bubble about to burst? Time will tell.
Or what about the seller? The Lauder family (of cosmetics fame) has been one of the most sophisticated art collectors of all time. While the sale of the Klimt was part of an estate sale driven by the passing of Leonard Lauder, it's unlikely the family would have sold into a weak market.
As I wrote in 2015, "[one thing remains clear: art markets are flashing a caution sign and given their track record, I believe it's better at this point for investors to focus on risk of loss rather than on opportunity to gain](https://substack.com/redirect/3c34eb91-6afe-410d-9bf7-eed3d25f950f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." Paying $236 million for a painting is a sign of greed, not one of fear. And as Warren Buffett has often noted, it's wise to be greedy when others are fearful and fearful when others are greedy.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=179694562&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Njk0NTYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM5MzE4MTksImV4cCI6MTc2NjUyMzgxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.G6wHUCO7h3DSKif4y-T25PxS3Kh-v9IeAwUOhBo8Kpg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Owz1PrgyK73g3vHXAhyFR2JL92dxDfHlk5Tp-hCaznM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=179694562)

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/54f186c1-dab3-4a3f-9554-ab5aec12641c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/4de898e9-3984-493f-899e-33ae6e05bb23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/82f8d089-d2b9-4be8-bc35-b9a4b35ed7be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

subject: Did Bernie Sanders just upend this Senate race?

body:
I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=46b790fb0af8480895de343ab6ba1d2e&_e=J2hgA2GEmp865dF1zVq0v72WQGlUxn-E8cH2-beMJDiIkvd1u5V4kUYhgIPZQYveY-1ncr2GFUhLDgnTkWWUTeX1IPwxeQFuc0OkKCDTIWK_7iKdujMi4H4FSdNIG4lTaVQ_9NhZ-rWWZdKlsJqZFEl8zHhhRZFz5deKTGKRnryMih7niRHTy_wnWGWbUy1g4xxPASkrxXbOFX_2247PgxaKGPGjHFtpOC8dHNUyYit-EVoo9afVWXcNzWw_5dNN1LLeXncGxm6v2QTlF7BddyCQ0MgcrA1kUOQzwMWYTV66D7YvBaL-lgw5g4ToeCHOtj7oLnLPuAWbtCSNPa2mp20KnPdCkXW4Vv7jGB556p3XGWrLvgZEn4KodF8g34H0wI43yNDWS47lNH000jsyweqF3kWCc3rdmaTTNdNKT1KXzJwMniaII2WKFwVIBS3pjz_CuvaWuTORPY87VvJKKfQ1SztXi8761E2zVip9NUL9X4t1g20uhTYDZ9R2lr0KcQytX4jcN8DgNtSLtSXzyd6AROI6H6D74537ZlBxx-WwH_t0F9zafJ8kAJAMYfCCW75ujRbIhZleYaLnRLyicMO21AdMjyNPzUJGyNqGXcJwzu3LWujAze67mdT5JlGnKYeZonf_jr2T1sTBMYwnHcUMrRd3uOtxkPux0xxZy5woNnDZehLFX0hgfxA5LT0FHUoiXR3uviddURSOGAG80PWyb8q4HUC9Oy0A6SlRlUIQMDskmlHWKrhPNj_kkJCLDwvKT7PT6TpmTrd-5hwwyUcAMenR7UAXB12BfP9xpH0%3D)

---
Peter,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=46b790fb0af8480895de343ab6ba1d2e&_e=J2hgA2GEmp865dF1zVq0v72WQGlUxn-E8cH2-beMJDiIkvd1u5V4kUYhgIPZQYveY-1ncr2GFUhLDgnTkWWUTeX1IPwxeQFuc0OkKCDTIWK_7iKdujMi4H4FSdNIG4lTaVQ_9NhZ-rWWZdKlsJqZFEl8zHhhRZFz5deKTGKRnryMih7niRHTy_wnWGWbUy1g4xxPASkrxXbOFX_2247PgxaKGPGjHFtpOC8dHNUyYit-EVoo9afVWXcNzWw_5dNN1LLeXncGxm6v2QTlF7BddyCQ0MgcrA1kUOQzwMWYTV7xnryew9tOqWwRgzhaReXzdNuYuNPWP-46dbpAjq8pY0x1eTfdFycgR65iEBIxgIz-MVYHMOCUTVnhF3g5e9vry0vuCACwEX02sYjn_dAZyg4XpwXOU_KvP64tZHtyJTHogWG2Yeo-OZxTtbZjc1z6ZFnf-OTwu4pqJ0Ax60qTdZQVdkPR9VyHN9RqwudS_pOgY6CtKz4iBJ6Si6hRa08X0IsAdi0VGd41s7uUykJExMJqKVjhgZCq3Xy-Ymz6JliZKzwufOyD4lylVgI1h0rNon23gmjDpQjnOCjSqdh70TcnojxTLEO4CzRDr8T-REYPPvsKFFlFL-LK8VdjGRLV0Rofo5AkB3nGI2hM9VUzmxYc1droFz1ouguKwjiR9CrlQ8h48stHRkEJ2PXR56wN1j2gKjHEDrv7aIIVW0yYIegTmyB82YMOZ1Yl9CNDbTQyzp4oDCXktTMHQ4l-hWh69QEDxKUa9r2OLPvz1VVCT44WAHJW7B5q9N1pz60KMug%3D)**_

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests. ” Translation: She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash. That’s not leadership. That’s the socialism I fought against overseas. I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach. As a Navy SEAL Officer , I deployed nine times across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa. I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth. Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in DECADES. What I don’t have right now is money. **** The depth of Donald Trump’s betrayal is a profound shock to our nation. Even after U.S. intelligence confirmed that Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman personally approved the brutal murder of journalist Jamal Khashoggi, Trump hosted the prince in the White House. He didn’t just defend him; he attacked the free press asking for accountability. His response to the reporter was venomous: "It’s not the question I mind. It’s your attitude. I think you’re a terrible reporter... a terrible person.” Then he announced the sale of advanced F-35 fighter jets to Saudi Arabia, a nation _doing business_ with Trump, rewarding a leader linked to murder and terrorism. This is a devastating display of corruption, cruelty, and moral cowardice. **At Able Dems, we understand the urgency. We fight back by electing Democrats with disabilities and dedicated allies who will uncompromisingly uphold accountability, truth, and justice.** _We will not tolerate Trump's attempt to shield international killers and bully the press while systematically dismantling the pillars of our democracy._ **[Please contribute $10 today to help us defeat those who enable this degradation and elect leaders who will defend human dignity and our foundational democratic values.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAXTZvBaxwdbCtQWh1rQQdr_KIPOty4KESIlpqVCWOOyGrFYDup1IROXnzbOsUfcM09CyPt6ntISCBuwSxMiF3OnmnPwroHZf6UsiDYOM7CXFkcMbzgBG4H3R_jFp44rxzCn2SoqtGgiCIK9CcX5iPWkHojqVJL7ssbxkg_HPcpzObW_AeHK6OsEqGJHBfiho_ANcH3u5tAZcIx-8SxO0b9NFKj4nwJe2K9oNuYElD7YcO1A7iBHtdWdBGchukxQXGCnrTJmEVvwZ2AAZqfzOusl4j6hNlI9pvjQ0hxQWj0YPQTsTRJ2nJCv9ArpYyvUaA5C1SaMDZl54EjdHO7EjdP5Q95mW4XTjmHwnT15G_-emT5xcbrxNRHWTqiKl6i8xw/4lu/C5L7cMP1RrCgbwNztQKejg/h2/h001.IpC5kQQBkgEYSTI57uw58nUqo2ZNYnIuCIprPS-pWe0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

What I just learned about the situation unfolding in Appalachia is stunning...

And you need to see it for yourself.

Once you see what's really going on in small town America, you'll understand why I rushed this interview to you today.

[**Click here to watch this video**](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=0b00f10bc3904ed092309c8de55fcd6f&_e=jeQTv_v4n4TvAq-Cxg9zub8zj9p2gJdG27Zvx40Qp8pG-JKXRy3jYx81m5xtyQOFYLOG3zzzC-cqmV9JBFFN7de9tQTa9SAr0RYLhPm2e1QKDOs37W21Cv79oGiZ4SN6xug6YSMmt8WuCyASi3fZ16PqPeKOfgqBNUP1ujKoXhmQ6VK-g-BRXp0m1eGhRgGLZceOqjPHVugxx4zVf9V348E_qiQs_rj22HZ6BEDdadT7BCKfBh9r01cG-u4aTni5uKTQVwPJQO8qOlvicl5-iFH-fvUA25h54YCH51Zb-n7iCU2apAfHPVzBpy36mFkZxykSTnctNeqnp6XUBSnVps8quJRKVhplMekMkYq15g4XtcgcPb_jjGr0EowN6hOEG8Mih0mlCD6w-VWGPvlkS_92KIAVaTWtwYBw_hZHto2hAGP6CDD44IFEdidXTsH8xU-ex4brvYxK1qh7aDYiuF174WHZlkqcoVVo2_uwLicRkYYXwLpWoFpwKEc1t7p8vs8LYIZTbokrXRu_shhhSv9tpJfJYG_cfagPOW1ZduoaLsQ1NWFmcpVsEf1V1HZT)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. body:
I refuse to let them Make America Saudi Arabia again.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xgj1lzA6G3hkzD7uRE4slgoDWWPS0LD1wTx-eEZ7bpLQuoxza7D0VQD8a2iZQlWlov179ddrYg6S5PPuOBQix1duQvodh2aPibIiRONtK74aeszdQqjaA7bXDT_jJYyMT76c9Yeg0LHfLbzRYWBoy923qwa2DMyEXO8nsMzedhfWOxAhi1WiIIa2aBEzgZYOKFeTEpiTCjufgV0X9uUIQttKhsvTMPa_&c=msPf6R_UA2fSPni_kLuZ2rJoiDaprXm0Ms3aXtZWgdyS7nglmVU1uA==&ch=5HjpIHbT9tNpgIoIw_jKjVPhGLAjBrpul6RrlAaKqe1kN4_2eMT3oA==)
---
|

Peter,
Over the past few months Trump has welcomed just about every despotic totalitarian killer in the world for warm welcomes on American shores.
First it was far-right Israeli mass killer Netanyahu. Then it Russia's Putin. Last week it was *former* Al-Qaeda terrorist turned Syrian President Jolani (up until just a few months ago had a $10,000,000 State Dept. bounty on his head for personally beheading people, killing US soldiers, and waging a war against the US).
This week, President Trump gave a warm welcome to another blood soaked dictator, Saudi Arabian Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman (MBS) who was visiting the United States from Monday to Wednesday night.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xgj1lzA6G3hkzD7uRE4slgoDWWPS0LD1wTx-eEZ7bpLQuoxza7D0VQD8a2iZQlWlov179ddrYg6S5PPuOBQix1duQvodh2aPibIiRONtK74aeszdQqjaA7bXDT_jJYyMT76c9Yeg0LHfLbzRYWBoy923qwa2DMyEXO8nsMzedhfWOxAhi1WiIIa2aBEzgZYOKFeTEpiTCjv4ITMEAnRtM35Lz65o7Q7p&c=msPf6R_UA2fSPni_kLuZ2rJoiDaprXm0Ms3aXtZWgdyS7nglmVU1uA==&ch=5HjpIHbT9tNpgIoIw_jKjVPhGLAjBrpul6RrlAaKqe1kN4_2eMT3oA==)
---
Bin Salman became an international pariah after he ordered the brutal execution, butchering, and dismemberment of American journalist Jamal Khashoggi.
MBS rules his country with an iron fist and allows for slave labor, horrible conditions for women, and a judicial system where people can be executed for one wrong word against the regime.
And last year, a federal judge ruled that Saudi Arabia must face litigation for the role they played in aiding the 9/11 hijackers and orchestrating the attacks, denying them immunity and allowing victims' families to proceed with seeking damages.
Unlike my opponent Lauren Boebert who refuses to condemn Saudi Arabia, has helped Trump obfuscate his business dealings there, and recently helped fellow Gulf State autocracy Qatar get an airbase on US soil, I am no friend to these dictators.
During the height of the Arab Spring I was a reporter for Yahoo! News and met dozens of Saudi human rights activists like now imprisoned human rights lawyer Waleed Abulkhair, Wajeha al Huwaider, "the most dangerous woman in Saudi," Samar Badawi, and Manal al-Sharif whom I helped with her autobiography, Daring to Drive, and thanked me in the credit section of the book.
I was so moved by their stories that I founded Honk for Saudi Women, an international pressure campaign where people the world over "honked" and made noise to call out Saudi Arabia. It went viral and we got thousands of people including Nancy Pelosi, Roseann Barr, and Amy Poehler to honk in defiance of Saudi misogynist autocrats.
I will never kowtow to dictators like Putin, Netanyahu, or MBS. I stand unflinchingly for human rights and dignity. [Boebert idolizes these dictators and hopes to emulate their rule in America unless we defeat her. Can you make a monthly donation to our campaign to stop her before she turns America into the far-right theocracy she envisions?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xgj1lzA6G3hkzD7uRE4slgoDWWPS0LD1wTx-eEZ7bpLQuoxza7D0VQD8a2iZQlWlov179ddrYg6S5PPuOBQix1duQvodh2aPibIiRONtK74aeszdQqjaA7bXDT_jJYyMT76c9Yeg0LHfLbzRYWBoy923qwa2DMyEXO8nsMzedhfWOxAhi1WiIIa2aBEzgZYOKFeTEpiTCjs3zQ-fjnPzx_owp3mQhmk3&c=msPf6R_UA2fSPni_kLuZ2rJoiDaprXm0Ms3aXtZWgdyS7nglmVU1uA==&ch=5HjpIHbT9tNpgIoIw_jKjVPhGLAjBrpul6RrlAaKqe1kN4_2eMT3oA==)
---

This year’s elections marked a major shift. Republicans have held a two-thirds supermajority in our State Senate for six years now, and it’s been decades since Democrats added seats in the legislature.
But those days are over now.
Breaking the supermajority means restoring checks and balances — Senate Republicans won’t be able to unilaterally override the governor’s veto or advance state constitutional amendments on their own.
And Mississippi Senate Democrats will keep fighting to lower costs, create good jobs, and make sure everyone in our state can make their voices heard.
**I’m grateful for Fair Fight’s support in Mississippi — and I truly appreciate how activists like you make this work possible.**
**[To help reach more voters, bolster more campaigns, and elect more candidates who look out for all of our communities, please make a contribution to Fair Fight today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119850685/584434468/-413138639?refcode=emm_ff_20251123_T1_DerrickSimmonsMS_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmI1MTlmOC1hZmM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R40BRD_3gKuOSK3K3blIK_umh8rXwKS2JSDlJZG7rXE=)**

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: We’re welcoming 9/11 perpetrators, head choppers, & mass killers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
I refuse to let them Make America Saudi Arabia again.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rPU5tO1FsZ7Mz9vU35f31WqGPr_kmRp_Srorbv763BEifDJKVzg9rvjiwgspLZhPmcwLZ29a7mZnK3KsUK32lOLozZ0GIAtpDJJzkXMwUiMeisbE7qrhNePOftdZQ0fJMnirOmYcCMqKfk7V3TscefvIB2mAddJSV7w364XWN3CtEN_FXe3TMqN1bKrOIzbQ4CKC0PXYe38hzUOR1k8WqkwNKM-mGiYg&c=Dx8spG2XJO48TXfACKcoU7qgDBFoaxMyYAT2xE4q7CSReFWUXU3SxQ==&ch=iN5Bpj16_MrxeOoMFr8HzIZZS6P_QyCAGgvN_uNtlKKLIOpdkEa5iA==)
---
|

Peter,
Over the past few months Trump has welcomed just about every despotic totalitarian killer in the world for warm welcomes on American shores.
First it was far-right Israeli mass killer Netanyahu. Then it Russia's Putin. Last week it was *former* Al-Qaeda terrorist turned Syrian President Jolani (up until just a few months ago had a $10,000,000 State Dept. bounty on his head for personally beheading people, killing US soldiers, and waging a war against the US).
This week, President Trump gave a warm welcome to another blood soaked dictator, Saudi Arabian Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman (MBS) who was visiting the United States from Monday to Wednesday night.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rPU5tO1FsZ7Mz9vU35f31WqGPr_kmRp_Srorbv763BEifDJKVzg9rvjiwgspLZhPmcwLZ29a7mZnK3KsUK32lOLozZ0GIAtpDJJzkXMwUiMeisbE7qrhNePOftdZQ0fJMnirOmYcCMqKfk7V3TscefvIB2mAddJSV7w364XWN3CtEN_FXe3TMqN1bKrOIzbQ4CKC0PXYe3-TPvoJbUJ3HJi9-C9iL_Qy&c=Dx8spG2XJO48TXfACKcoU7qgDBFoaxMyYAT2xE4q7CSReFWUXU3SxQ==&ch=iN5Bpj16_MrxeOoMFr8HzIZZS6P_QyCAGgvN_uNtlKKLIOpdkEa5iA==)
---
Bin Salman became an international pariah after he ordered the brutal execution, butchering, and dismemberment of American journalist Jamal Khashoggi.
MBS rules his country with an iron fist and allows for slave labor, horrible conditions for women, and a judicial system where people can be executed for one wrong word against the regime.
And last year, a federal judge ruled that Saudi Arabia must face litigation for the role they played in aiding the 9/11 hijackers and orchestrating the attacks, denying them immunity and allowing victims' families to proceed with seeking damages.
Unlike my opponent Lauren Boebert who refuses to condemn Saudi Arabia, has helped Trump obfuscate his business dealings there, and recently helped fellow Gulf State autocracy Qatar get an airbase on US soil, I am no friend to these dictators.
During the height of the Arab Spring I was a reporter for Yahoo! News and met dozens of Saudi human rights activists like now imprisoned human rights lawyer Waleed Abulkhair, Wajeha al Huwaider, "the most dangerous woman in Saudi," Samar Badawi, and Manal al-Sharif whom I helped with her autobiography, Daring to Drive, and thanked me in the credit section of the book.
I was so moved by their stories that I founded Honk for Saudi Women, an international pressure campaign where people the world over "honked" and made noise to call out Saudi Arabia. It went viral and we got thousands of people including Nancy Pelosi, Roseann Barr, and Amy Poehler to honk in defiance of Saudi misogynist autocrats.
I will never kowtow to dictators like Putin, Netanyahu, or MBS. I stand unflinchingly for human rights and dignity. [Boebert idolizes these dictators and hopes to emulate their rule in America unless we defeat her. Can you make a monthly donation to our campaign to stop her before she turns America into the far-right theocracy she envisions?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rPU5tO1FsZ7Mz9vU35f31WqGPr_kmRp_Srorbv763BEifDJKVzg9rvjiwgspLZhPmcwLZ29a7mZnK3KsUK32lOLozZ0GIAtpDJJzkXMwUiMeisbE7qrhNePOftdZQ0fJMnirOmYcCMqKfk7V3TscefvIB2mAddJSV7w364XWN3CtEN_FXe3TMqN1bKrOIzbQ4CKC0PXYe39Nr2ozBLL0puqZHSgSEDVG&c=Dx8spG2XJO48TXfACKcoU7qgDBFoaxMyYAT2xE4q7CSReFWUXU3SxQ==&ch=iN5Bpj16_MrxeOoMFr8HzIZZS6P_QyCAGgvN_uNtlKKLIOpdkEa5iA==)
---

clean_body: I refuse to let them Make America Saudi Arabia again. | | | | | == | Peter, Over the past few months Trump has welcomed just about every despotic totalitarian killer in the world for warm welcomes on American shores. First it was far-right Israeli mass killer Netanyahu. Then it Russia's Putin. Last week it was former Al-Qaeda terrorist turned Syrian President Jolani (up until just a few months ago had a $10,000,000 State Dept. bounty on his head for personally beheading people, killing US soldiers, and waging a war against the US). This week, President Trump gave a warm welcome to another blood soaked dictator, Saudi Arabian Crown Prince Mohammed Bin Salman (MBS) who was visiting the United States from Monday to Wednesday night. | == Bin Salman became an international pariah after he ordered the brutal execution, butchering, and dismemberment of American journalist Jamal Khashoggi. MBS rules his country with an iron fist and allows for slave labor, horrible conditions for women, and a judicial system where people can be executed for one wrong word against the regime. And last year, a federal judge ruled that Saudi Arabia must face litigation for the role they played in aiding the 9/11 hijackers and orchestrating the attacks, denying them immunity and allowing victims' families to proceed with seeking damages. Unlike my opponent Lauren Boebert who refuses to condemn Saudi Arabia, has helped Trump obfuscate his business dealings there, and recently helped fellow Gulf State autocracy Qatar get an airbase on US soil, I am no friend to these dictators. During the height of the Arab Spring I was a reporter for Yahoo! News and met dozens of Saudi human rights activists like now imprisoned human rights lawyer Waleed Abulkhair, Wajeha al Huwaider, "the most dangerous woman in Saudi," Samar Badawi, and Manal al-Sharif whom I helped with her autobiography, Daring to Drive, and thanked me in the credit section of the book. I was so moved by their stories that I founded Honk for Saudi Women, an international pressure campaign where people the world over "honked" and made noise to call out Saudi Arabia. It went viral and we got thousands of people including Nancy Pelosi, Roseann Barr, and Amy Poehler to honk in defiance of Saudi misogynist autocrats. I will never kowtow to dictators like Putin, Netanyahu, or MBS. I stand unflinchingly for human rights and dignity. == Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | I refuse to let Trump Make America Saudi Arabia again. Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: We do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251123em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251123em-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251104-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251104-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251123em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251123em-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251123em-portland-pet-rs]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)

Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: Sign my Conservative Contract
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Nebraska is uniting behind a new conservative roadmap.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter,
Today, I’m unveiling something that represents far more than a campaign message.
It’s a **promise**. It’s a direction. It’s a commitment.

---
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
This is a 5-pillar commitment to protect our values and strengthen our state. And before it launches publicly, I’m asking supporters like you to be the first to sign it.
**[SIGN THE CONTRACT EARLY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
[BECOME A FOUNDING SIGNER >>](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
**THE FIVE PILLARS**
1\. **Lower Taxes for Working Families** : a stable Nebraska begins with families who can breathe financially. 2\. **Protect Parents & Kids: ****parents—** not bureaucrats—make decisions about their children. 3\. **Back Law Enforcement:** No defunding. No hesitation. Nebraska stands with its officers. 4\. **Border & Safety Protections**: cartel trafficking and illegal entry impact every state now — including ours. 5\. **Push Back on Federal Overreach:** Nebraska should never be governed by Washington mandates.
**WHY IT MATTERS:** People are tired of vague politics. Nebraska deserves a clear conservative roadmap that can be trusted. That’s why your signature _before the public rollout_ is so important.
**[ADD YOUR NAME NOW>>](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)** We’re aiming for **1,000 Founding Signers** in the first 48 hours, and we’re still short.
[SIGN THE CONTRACT & BACK IT WITH A GIFT >>](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Your voice and your support will define Nebraska’s future.
With gratitude,
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for NE-02

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: The thing Donald Trump fears most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it’s Jon. In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to my reelection campaign in Georgia.
But first I’ll explain why — especially right now.
This is going to be one of the closest and most expensive elections in the history of the United States Senate. I think you’d agree?
Republicans are already going all-out to defeat me. Between my opponents and right-wing Super PACs, they’ve already spent more than $10 million here in Georgia.
By Election Day, that number will be in the hundreds of millions.
[**If you believe Trump and his administration have to be stopped, I’m asking you to chip in $5 today to help me fight back, win reelection, and take back control of Congress just like we did in 2021.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=1&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=2&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)**
We cannot allow Donald Trump even more power. _And the thing he fears most is losing his rubber-stamp Congress._
It is more vital than at any time in modern American history that the political opposition have the resources to win.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But together, we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won._That victory won the Senate majority._**
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
[**So please. If you can afford it, I am humbly asking you to chip in $5 — or whatever amount feels right — to help me win reelection and keep another MAGA extremist out of the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=3&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.BLoU2S&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=23&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.J64VtC&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=24&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.W_itv2&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=25&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.uHqGmT&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=26&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)**

| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.OIdw5j&refcode=em251123-1-subs&t=27&akid=1128%2E5691347%2EQ9-xWZ)**
---
****
Keep up the fight!
Senator Jon Ossoff

name: Seth Moulton
subject: This is exactly what I’ve been talking about
body:
When I launched, I said the status quo wasn’t working. Washington just proved it.

| |
---
Team, This right here is what my campaign is about. When I launched, I said I was running to challenge the status quo because it’s not working. And the latest shutdown deal proves it better than any stump speech ever could. Democrats caved. Again. We gave away what little leverage we had and got nothing in return, no progress on affordable healthcare, no real wins for working families, and no accountability for the people who keep letting Donald Trump dictate the agenda. We need to start fighting for something better than the status quo. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851010/584435697/2090747700?refcode=251123_sm_status_img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThmMmVmNC1iNmM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMJL5BJHwKz653PQahRgHufXHnAKTg9TK7GjCUv1rOY=) That’s not leadership. That’s the problem. This campaign is about fighting back against exactly that kind of complacency, and building a new generation of leadership in the Senate that’s willing to take risks, tell the truth, and actually deliver for the people we represent. I didn't come to Washington to make a career. I came here to make a difference. And frankly, I think we have ended up where we are today because too many in our party prioritize their careers over their service to you. **[If you’re ready to move past the same playbook and demand something better, join our team today. clean_body: When I launched, I said the status quo wasn’t working. Washington just proved it. | | Team, This right here is what my campaign is about. When I launched, I said I was running to challenge the status quo because it’s not working. And the latest shutdown deal proves it better than any stump speech ever could. Democrats caved. Again. We gave away what little leverage we had and got nothing in return, no progress on affordable healthcare, no real wins for working families, and no accountability for the people who keep letting Donald Trump dictate the agenda. We need to start fighting for something better than the status quo. = That’s not leadership. That’s the problem. This campaign is about fighting back against exactly that kind of complacency, and building a new generation of leadership in the Senate that’s willing to take risks, tell the truth, and actually deliver for the people we represent. I didn't come to Washington to make a career. I came here to make a difference. And frankly, I think we have ended up where we are today because too many in our party prioritize their careers over their service to you. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thanks for being part of this fight, Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Research Survey [Voter Action Project]
subject: The use of ballot initiatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Democracy Docket: Lawmakers Look To Restrict Ballot Initiative Process in Florida, Missouri and Ohio [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DD_BallotInitiativesHarder.png]
In state legislative sessions, suppressive lawmakers across the country have looked to curtail the ballot initiative process, which allows citizens to directly affect policy change by voting on proposals to change state laws and state constitutions.
In recent years, progressive policies — including Medicaid expansion, minimum-wage increases, marijuana legalization and establishment of independent redistricting commissions — have proved overwhelmingly popular with voters and have been put into law via this process.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about ballot initiatives. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should state officials limit the ballot initiative process?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112325_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112325_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112325_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112325_1&amount=20]

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: CA-19’s backbone is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851441/584437371/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251123_FR_farmers_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVjY2VkMi1iOWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9Wy92pDP6FJmeJc6h_NyoNG_hj0eWZuFDcvxpujWaQ=&emci=b55cced2-b9c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b95cced2-b9c8-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

I’ve always believed that the strength of our district starts with the people who feed it. Here in California, our farmers and farmworkers are the backbone of our economy and our communities. They show up every single day — _through droughts, storms, rising costs, and endless uncertainty_ — to keep families fed across the country.

But the truth is, they’re being hit from every direction. Prices keep climbing. Tariffs are driving up the cost of business. **And too many leaders in Washington are making decisions that put politics ahead of the people who grow the food on our tables.**

I’m fighting for a future where our farmers have stability, fair trade conditions, and a federal government that actually has their backs. That means pushing for smarter trade policies and reducing unnecessary costs to ensure agriculture in California’s 19th Congressional District isn’t left behind.

[Peter, I’m showing up every day for our farmers in Congress, but I can’t do it without your help. If you’re able, can you chip in any amount today to support my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851442/584437372/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251123_FR_farmers_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVjY2VkMi1iOWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9Wy92pDP6FJmeJc6h_NyoNG_hj0eWZuFDcvxpujWaQ=) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851443/584437373/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251123_FR_farmers_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVjY2VkMi1iOWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9Wy92pDP6FJmeJc6h_NyoNG_hj0eWZuFDcvxpujWaQ=)
---
Every time I speak with farmers, one thing is clear: they don’t want political games. They want stability, predictability, and a federal government that respects the work they do every day.

That’s what I’m fighting for, and with your help, we won’t back down.

Thank you,

Jimmy Panetta

clean_body: | Peter, I’ve always believed that the strength of our district starts with the people who feed it. Here in California, our farmers and farmworkers are the backbone of our economy and our communities. They show up every single day — through droughts, storms, rising costs, and endless uncertainty — to keep families fed across the country. But the truth is, they’re being hit from every direction. Prices keep climbing. Tariffs are driving up the cost of business. And too many leaders in Washington are making decisions that put politics ahead of the people who grow the food on our tables. I’m fighting for a future where our farmers have stability, fair trade conditions, and a federal government that actually has their backs. That means pushing for smarter trade policies and reducing unnecessary costs to ensure agriculture in California’s 19th Congressional District isn’t left behind. = | = Every time I speak with farmers, one thing is clear: they don’t want political games. They want stability, predictability, and a federal government that respects the work they do every day. That’s what I’m fighting for, and with your help, we won’t back down. Thank you, Jimmy Panetta If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: I’m stressed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
A quick (and honest) update from inside our campaign headquarters.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251123-839&t=1&akid=845%2E294397%2EvhHAtW)
Hey, it’s Ashley, Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign manager.
I wanted to share a quick, honest update from inside our campaign headquarters.
Later this week, your inbox will likely be quiet, our campaign staff will be spending time with family, and grassroots fundraising will slow _way_ down.
That’s totally understandable. Everyone deserves time with loved ones.
**But the reality is, there’s never a dull moment when you’re running a statewide campaign.**
Our campaign will be preparing to collect nomination signatures beginning in early December — the process to get Judge Chris Taylor on the ballot for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race.
We’ll need to recruit volunteers, print materials, order clipboards, and plan for lots of travel.
**So even though we’ll all take a moment to rest and recharge, we’ll be hitting the ground running soon after.**
That’s why we need to get everything ready now, and all of that prep work costs real money.
This team’s grassroots donations fuel our efforts to collect every signature we need to get Chris on the ballot and compete with the right-wing money machine that’s backing our extreme opponent.
[**If you can contribute $10 or any amount today, it’d go a long way in getting us ready for the next phase of this campaign. Thanks in advance.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251123_1_ak.0FELe_&amount=10&refcode=em20251123-839&t=3&akid=845%2E294397%2EvhHAtW)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251123_1_ak.0FELe_&amount=10&refcode=em20251123-839&t=22&akid=845%2E294397%2EvhHAtW)**
With gratitude,
Ashley
Campaign Manager
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251123-839&t=23&refcode2=845_294397_vhHAtW&akid=845%2E294397%2EvhHAtW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=845%2E294397%2EvhHAtW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=845%2E294397%2EvhHAtW)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: Heidi Hall
subject: What people are actually saying about this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend, it's Heidi.
Throughout this campaign I've been attending forums and town halls and meeting with members of our district to take the time to actually listen to what they have to say.
I want to know where they want their representative to stand on issues and what they want them to focus on when they get to Congress so that I can deliver real results as soon as we win this race.
And I'm hearing a lot of things, both good and bad...
But before I get into them, can you chip in to help us reach our November fundraising goal before Thanksgiving? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
The good: Our campaign is resonating with people! By focusing on universal healthcare, climate action, and affordability, we're tackling the root of what's wrong in our country and fighting to deliver the change that people have been asking for for years.
Establishment politicians are the ones who got us into this mess, and we need bold progressive leadership to get us out.
The bad: A lot of people don't know that our opponents in this race don't actually live in our district, and when we tell them, they're angry, and rightfully so. The thirst for power by these D.C. politicians is honestly disgusting.
Our district needs to know about how 3 candidates (2 Democrats and 1 Republican) met behind closed doors to run against each other and strategized to shut me out of this race. All to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars of corporate PAC money to buy a seat and represent a place they have no stake in.
This is the toxic politics that we need to fight against and the type of D.C. politicians that we can't afford to send to Congress.
Friend, will you help us continue to meet with our neighbors and fight for real progressive change in Congress by donating what you can to reach our $13,227 End of Month Fundraising Goal before Thanksgiving? We aren't taking corporate PAC money, and our outreach efforts rely on people like you. Chip in! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251122_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:

Grass Valley, CA 95945

clean_body: [] Friend, it's Heidi. Throughout this campaign I've been attending forums and town halls and meeting with members of our district to take the time to actually listen to what they have to say. I want to know where they want their representative to stand on issues and what they want them to focus on when they get to Congress so that I can deliver real results as soon as we win this race. And I'm hearing a lot of things, both good and bad... But before I get into them, can you chip in to help us reach our November fundraising goal before Thanksgiving? >> [] DONATE [] The good: Our campaign is resonating with people! By focusing on universal healthcare, climate action, and affordability, we're tackling the root of what's wrong in our country and fighting to deliver the change that people have been asking for for years. Establishment politicians are the ones who got us into this mess, and we need bold progressive leadership to get us out. The bad: A lot of people don't know that our opponents in this race don't actually live in our district, and when we tell them, they're angry, and rightfully so. The thirst for power by these D.C. politicians is honestly disgusting. Our district needs to know about how 3 candidates (2 Democrats and 1 Republican) met behind closed doors to run against each other and strategized to shut me out of this race. All to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars of corporate PAC money to buy a seat and represent a place they have no stake in. This is the toxic politics that we need to fight against and the type of D.C. politicians that we can't afford to send to Congress. Friend, will you help us continue to meet with our neighbors and fight for real progressive change in Congress by donating what you can to reach our $13,227 End of Month Fundraising Goal before Thanksgiving? We aren't taking corporate PAC money, and our outreach efforts rely on people like you. Chip in! [] If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Another amount [] Thank you, Heidi Hall Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom. [] Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice. After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable. Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 SUPPORT HEIDI [] PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | Dear Fellow American,

Immigration has dominated American politics since President Trump entered the political arena.

This issue affects so many aspects of American life including the economy, crime prevention, and culture. All Americans must be well informed on immigration and how it affects citizens like you.

That's why my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation created our **Official Immigration Quiz.**

This quiz will test your knowledge of the history of American immigration and how immigration policy impacts our country to this day.

**You can take the Official Heritage Foundation Immigration Quiz by clicking the button below.**

[ Take the Quiz ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/BjEUZdLZa1deLfyqrIQtaupJxrE9fn2h2_sl3mGQdkMoJrtfEjCOYy_uM5_WxysAr9STGzpW6HZL1AbdBtcuw7O63hIR6iie657EwMheuplHe0Ln1MFVrStZicmlkmPDgDIecaPuvJTlzlENDuaD0vaOBgKQ5Fy3r-4FDQXB4xA2xW2cXc2Gm1ulpInr3IGahWqjf4EFdmbkLwqyRHSHPZFdZAn1hu2vxEjiiDtVfSpuHY5RHFzgwyRKgcSlUM0oNwxGQZkiJZ7OUaFZ-4W8PPCQrhLiOJwL1OGItSJbd1jopQ2clN1IbC6I40gJb92WwupJJFV1eJLqybGjUKDflpI_ZYdkKriC1eC5HgeN6VXdkLJvXOmYLLTiyg9FMFRQZqFwYzRzAJSvoDzmQP3KLsFUllEoUYS8z8ZD-VjI4LRgNRR2ge3CWAqVDUFYQlShoR4zubQWD7oZFAJUN6Z-5EPQDcxcyRVNNwuGYXE4iAJexDC3l5x5mW1VQ4B_ey943ovjhqJxuCVsHZ3fMQIyo2-lC9FXL3fBtKOZi8UCev2AoyUczBSOr1k0R1WpPY3vBuRRW48Zgxv_dLTh-X894WG8i5IaQWFvAA7xGUoZpEp4FWxpRv2cB3MLNAfpK6k8VFb_h838itPYCjwsMcnJz2ux9JW_CaHxdy_TadB18Wrkv2gV17ijPPpVB6xe7MGyQOqdNIRynvOwhgoBLslfMeIJCVv5dnXad6oP-Qo/6w9M128x_7aPEBg15IAM80pa_u12DxUZ/15) Do you think you know the facts? body:
My thoughts on this month's election results
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851736/584438391/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkyZDk5NC1iZWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQLrGVvGgEjJs2IlR4KO6ygG3x1FAfWwBcfcBq3k9DA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851737/584438392/-309737922?refcode=251123_RG_results-fr-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkyZDk5NC1iZWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQLrGVvGgEjJs2IlR4KO6ygG3x1FAfWwBcfcBq3k9DA=)
Zohran Mamdani.
Abigail Spanberger.
Mikie Sherrill.
Prop 50.
All winners.
In 2026, we will flip the House of Representatives.
In 2028, we will win the presidency.
A better world is possible.
Despite this month's incredible success, the new district maps put me into a much more conservative district. And Republicans are DESPERATE to pick off a Democratic seat in California, so they’re going to pour huge sums of cash to try to kick me out of Congress.
**So if you’re ready to build that better world, I need your help. This is going to be one of the most competitive races in California. And the only way to win is a strong grassroots campaign powered by regular folks like you.****[Please donate a few bucks to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851738/584438393/789508428?refcode=251123_RG_results-fr-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkyZDk5NC1iZWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQLrGVvGgEjJs2IlR4KO6ygG3x1FAfWwBcfcBq3k9DA=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119851739/584438394/-309737922?refcode=251123_RG_results-fr-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDkyZDk5NC1iZWM4LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQLrGVvGgEjJs2IlR4KO6ygG3x1FAfWwBcfcBq3k9DA=)
Thank you and congratulations on last night's VICTORY!
